    <item>
      <title>Umbrel: Customer Support (non-technical)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
</p>

<p>In this role, you will:</p><ul><li><p>Support our users across all online channels (email, Discord, website chat, forums, social medias, etc) for non-technical issues (such as Umbrel Home order related queries)</p></li><li><p>Work with our logistics and fulfillment team to resolve order/shipping issues</p></li><li><p>Help users with various non-technical tasks, such as order modifications, returns, replacements, and repairs</p></li><li><p>Create how-tos, guides, wikis, knowledge base, etc for recurring questions</p></li></ul><p></p><p>We hope you:</p><ul><li><p>Have great written communication skills</p></li><li><p>Like talking to users and are willing to constantly do so without external encouragement</p></li><li><p>Are able to empathize with users, and genuinely care about their problems — we can’t exist without them</p></li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/umbrel-customer-support-non-technical">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/umbrel-customer-support-non-technical</a></p>
</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 06 Jun 2026 20:31:08 +0000</pubDate>
      <expires_at>Mon, 06 Jul 2026 20:31:08 +0000</expires_at>

      <link>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/umbrel-customer-support-non-technical</link>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Dentology: Full Stack Product Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> UK (Remote)
</p>

<p><strong>If you’re an exceptional coder, love shaping product, and are excited by the chance to work with bleeding-edge AI - this is your role.</strong></p><p></p><p>Dentology is one of the UK’s fastest-growing performance marketing agencies, partnering exclusively with high-end cosmetic dental practices. We’re a 30+ person team spanning across content, ads, sales, and engineering - and one of the only agencies building an end-to-end patient acquisition system that blends agency services with proprietary software.</p><p></p><p>Our platform combines real-time lead tracking, performance analytics, and AI-driven insights to give practices unprecedented visibility into what’s driving results. From high-production content shoots and paid campaigns to in-house sales teams who close the leads, we deliver predictable, profitable growth for some of the biggest names in UK dentistry.</p><p></p><p><strong>Role Overview</strong></p><p>We’re looking for a Full Stack Product Engineer to join us and help build a product that will transform how dental practices attract and convert patients. You’ll work across the stack, from database to frontend, and take ownership of key features, integrations, and user experiences. You’ll collaborate closely with the founders (marketing + tech backgrounds), bringing your own ideas to the table, influencing product direction, and helping us move fast with high-quality, clean, and scalable code.</p><p></p><p><strong>What you'll be doing</strong></p><ul><li><p>Take ownership of engineering projects, delivering features end-to-end - from database design to polished frontend.</p></li><li><p>Build and scale resilient backend services and high-usage API integrations.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate with the team to align technical execution with real-world clinic needs and marketing performance goals.</p></li><li><p>Help shape the engineering culture, setting best practices, tooling standards, and mentoring future hires.</p></li><li><p>Drive continuous improvements to our UX/UI, working closely with non-technical team members to deliver seamless user experiences.</p></li><li><p>Tackle challenges like real-time data syncing, performance optimisation, lead-tracking infrastructure, and AI-enhanced tools.</p></li><li><p>Contribute ideas around product strategy - we want you thinking beyond code.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>What we're looking for</strong></p><ul><li><p>2+ years of full stack experience with React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, or similar web frameworks</p></li><li><p>Solid understanding of data flows and state management in web applications</p></li><li><p>Experience working with Prisma, PostgreSQL, and building robust API integrations</p></li><li><p>A passion for clean, scalable code and practical solutions</p></li><li><p>Empathy for the user - understanding how they interact with the product and shaping the experience to meet their needs</p></li><li><p>Curiosity - a willingness to learn quickly, adapt, and grow with new technologies</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Success in the Role</strong></p><p>6 Months:</p><ul><li><p>Gain deep expertise in our entire tech stack, including deployments and infrastructure</p></li><li><p>Take ownership of smaller features, ensuring high-quality delivery and end-to-end responsibility</p></li><li><p>Become the go-to person for understanding how all systems work together and contribute to ongoing projects</p></li><li><p>Work autonomously on both frontend and backend development, applying best practices across the full stack</p></li></ul><p></p><p>12 Months:</p><ul><li><p>Play a key role in hiring, working closely with the engineering team to evaluate potential candidates</p></li><li><p>Take on mentorship responsibilities, helping junior developers grow their skills</p></li><li><p>Contribute to engineering decisions around architecture, tech stack improvements, and development practices</p></li><li><p>Lead efforts in scaling systems, optimising performance, and ensuring robustness of integrations</p></li></ul><p></p><p>18 Months +:</p><ul><li><p>Lead a team of developers, managing projects and ensuring delivery aligns with product goals</p></li><li><p>Take ownership of more strategic decisions, including setting long-term engineering direction</p></li><li><p>Mentor and guide other engineers on complex problems, promoting a culture of technical excellence and collaboration</p></li><li><p>Influence the company’s growth trajectory by playing a major role in key product and engineering initiatives</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Why Join Us</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Incredible category</strong> – We’re blending agency speed with SaaS scalability in a niche ripe for disruption.</p></li><li><p><strong>Cutting-edge tech</strong> – Work with the latest AI and workflows.</p></li><li><p><strong>Real ownership</strong> – You’ll build the product, not just ship tickets.</p></li><li><p><strong>Clear progression</strong> – We’re scaling quickly; there are huge opportunities to grow into leadership.</p></li><li><p><strong>Startup energy, proven team</strong> – Fast-moving, ambitious culture - but with a 30+ person company behind you.</p></li><li><p><strong>Remote-first</strong> – Work from anywhere, tightly connected to a high-performance, collaborative team.</p></li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dentology-full-stack-product-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dentology-full-stack-product-engineer</a></p>
</description>

      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dentology-full-stack-product-engineer</guid>
      <link>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dentology-full-stack-product-engineer</link>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Patrianna: DevOps Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Ukraine
</p>

<p><strong> About Patrianna</strong></p><p>Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.</p><p>We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.</p><p>Whether you're a domain expert or an agile thinker who thrives in change, at Patrianna you'll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help us lead the next wave of gaming innovation.</p><p>Join us—and be part of something extraordinary.</p><p></p><p><strong>The Role</strong></p><p>You'll architect and operate the infrastructure backbone that powers millions of gaming experiences, driving platform reliability and scalability at pace.</p><p></p><p><strong>What you will be doing</strong></p><p>• Design, operate, and evolve production-grade Kubernetes clusters with focus on high availability, scaling, networking, and security</p><p>• Lead incident response and troubleshooting across distributed systems, conducting thorough postmortems to drive continuous improvement</p><p>• Build and maintain robust CI/CD and release pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and Azure DevOps</p><p>• Manage Infrastructure as Code and environments using Terraform, Terragrunt, and Helm</p><p>• Implement GitOps-based deployments with Argo CD for seamless, automated releases</p><p>• Drive observability and alerting strategies using Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki/ELK to ensure system health</p><p></p><p><strong>What we are looking for</strong></p><p>• Strong production experience with Google Cloud Platform including Compute Engine, GKE, networking, IAM, DNS, and cost optimization</p><p>• Deep hands-on expertise with Kubernetes architecture, networking, ingress, storage, autoscaling, and upgrades</p><p>• Proven experience with Terraform, Terragrunt, and Helm in production environments</p><p>• Solid CI/CD and GitOps expertise, particularly with Argo CD</p><p>• Strong Linux, networking, and troubleshooting skills including TCP/IP, DNS, and TLS</p><p>• Experience with on-call rotations and incident management using tools like PagerDuty</p><p></p><p><strong>Why you will love it</strong></p><p>You'll work at the cutting edge of gaming infrastructure, solving complex technical challenges that directly impact millions of players worldwide. With our high-growth environment, you'll have continuous opportunities to learn new technologies, drive meaningful improvements, and shape the platform that powers our next wave of innovation. Plus, you'll be part of an ego-free, collaborative team where your expertise is valued and your impact is immediately visible.</p><p></p><p><strong>Other Benefits</strong></p><p><strong>Full Remote Work</strong>: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely from wherever you feel most productive.<br><strong>Generous Leave Policy:</strong> Take advantage of 30 days of paid time off, encompassing both vacation and sick leave, to ensure you can recharge and recover when needed. Take your time on bank holidays as well.<br><strong>Company Events:</strong> Engage in our vibrant company culture through a variety of informal events designed to foster camaraderie and teamwork.<br><strong>Continuously Development:</strong> Get an opportunity to join a fast-growing business where the sky’s the limit.</p><p></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/patrianna-devops-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/patrianna-devops-engineer</a></p>
</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 06 Jun 2026 20:30:53 +0000</pubDate>
      <expires_at>Mon, 06 Jul 2026 20:30:53 +0000</expires_at>
      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/patrianna-devops-engineer</guid>
      <link>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/patrianna-devops-engineer</link>
    </item>
    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/5449/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Memora ApS: Founding Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Sjælland</state>
      <skills>AWS, PostgreSQL, React, and TypeScript</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5449/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Copenhagen, Denmark
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://memora.dk/">https://memora.dk/</a>
</p>

<h3>About Us</h3>
<div>
<p>At Memora, we're digitizing one of the oldest and most overlooked categories on earth: the cemetery. Most still run on paper maps, spreadsheets, and institutional memory. We are replacing this with an ecosystem for everyone who touches a cemetery: the leadership running it, the field teams maintaining it, the families visiting it, and the local partners serving them.&nbsp;</p>
<p>We’re backed by leading investors and guided by a team of experienced founders and engineers from well known tech names reimagining a category long overdue change. We’re deliberately lean, and will keep it that way.</p>
</div>
<h3>Job Description</h3>
<div>
<p>This is a remote position.</p>
<h1><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Founding Engineer - Memora</span></span></span></span></h1>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">We're hiring a Founding Engineer to step into one of the broadest roles on the team: A hands-on IC role with real product and cultural ownership.</span></span></span></span></p>
<h2><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">The Why</span></span></span></span></h2>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Memora is growing rapidly. We need an awesome engineer in the team who can lead from all angles of the technical stack:</span></span></span></span></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">IaC end-to-end (Terraform, AWS, deploys, observability)</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Data ingestion pipelines (large exports, QGIS, PostGIS, multi tenant setups)</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Shipping core product features across NestJS, React, and React Native (Expo) mobile apps</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Being a thoughtful, methodical technical voice in a small team where every engineer has outsized influence</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">The What (real examples from what we shipped in the last 30 days)</span></span></span></span></h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Attribute-based filter systems across PostGIS, NestJS APIs, the React, and PMTiles-backed map tiles, so our clients can visualize by contracts, preservation status to even the flower season.</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Data import pipelines that convert raw PDF cemetery maps into geo-referenced GeoPackages in QGIS, then ingesting into PostGIS
          //  Owning the end-to-end onboarding for new clientele.</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Terraform: multi-AZ RDS, ECS Fargate autoscaling, CI workflows, AI guardrails, WAF, SNS, and much more.</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">AI: Designing, evaluating and building harnesses where prompts for summaries and activity can be elegantly delivered to communities, tuning guardrails.</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Production foundations such as RLS (multi-tenancy), idempotency keys + optimistic locking… so on</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">The Stack</span></span></span></span></h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Backend: NestJS, TypeScript, MikroORM, PostgreSQL + PostGIS, Inngest for durable workflows</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Web: React, TanStack Query, MapLibre + PMTiles</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Mobile: React Native + Expo, Expo Router, native iOS/Android push</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Infra: AWS (ECS Fargate, RDS, S3, CloudFront, SNS, Bedrock, WAF), Terraform, GH actions (OIDC), Logto</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Observability: Grafana Cloud, Sentry, CloudWatch</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Geospatial tooling: QGIS, GeoPackage, PMTiles</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">AI: AWS Bedrock + guardrails, Promptfoo for evals</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Who you are</span></span></span></span></h2>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Must have:</span></span></span></span></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Typically 8+ years building production software, including at least one role at a growth startup or as a founding/early engineer with sizeable revenue</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Full-stack: comfortable shipping in TypeScript across backend (Node/NestJS or similar) and React-based frontends</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Hands-on cloud infrastructure experience: you've owned a Terraform stack on AWS, not just consumed one</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Strong relational database fundamentals: you've designed schemas, optimized queries, run migrations against large live datasets</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Comfortable operating in a small team without a clear playbook: you can scope your own work, write your own docs, and triage your own bugs</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Strongly preferred:</span></span></span></span></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">React Native / Expo experience shipping to App Store + Play Store</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">PostGIS or any production geospatial work</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Experience with row-level security, multi-tenancy patterns, or compliance-sensitive data (we're GDPR + public-sector)</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Production AI/LLM work prompt design, evals, guardrails</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">B2B/B2G SaaS experience: sales cycles, real customer relationships, public-sector quirks</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Bonus:</span></span></span></span></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Experience with cemetery, GIS, or public records systems</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">A Note on AI</span></span></span></span></h2>
<div><span class="s1">Yes, we lean hard on AI coding tools: Claude, Perplexity, Cursor, etc. and we expect you to as well. Engineers who refuse them aren't a fit, but neither are vibe coders. We ship to municipalities managing data for real families, so the bar is robust, well-tested, human-reviewed code, not "the model said it worked."</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span class="s1">We treat these tools like a sharp junior pair-programmer: fast, occasionally brilliant, frequently wrong, and never the final authority. That means reading every diff, spotting when its tests are theatre, pushing back on its first "all-inclusive plan" building workflows with planning and review gates baked in, and being able to ship the same feature with the tools turned off. "AI wrote it" is never a defence in a postmortem.</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span class="s1">If that distinction is obvious to you, we should talk. If your instinct is to paste this post into Claude and ask for "the final application, make no mistakes", wrong place. We're hiring humans, not the sub-agents we already work with and know well.</span></div>
<h2><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">How we work</span></span></span></span></h2>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">We’re building Memora to be the kind of company we’d want to work for ourselves: high trust, low bureaucracy, and full of people who care deeply about doing great work.</span></span></span></span></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">We’re remote by design. No, we don’t track hours or expect people to be online all day, but we do expect ownership, communication, and roughly 4 hours of overlap with Copenhagen (CET).</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">We believe great work and great lives aren’t in competition with each other. Remote work means your whole life doesn’t stop when work starts and that’s a good thing by us. Families, school pickups, deep-focus afternoons: we welcome the whole human. We optimize for people doing the best work of their careers while still having a life they’re excited to live.</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">We’re a small team. Currently 5 people, which means you’ll have real autonomy and real influence. Engineers talk to customers, help onboard them, visit cemeteries, and see first-hand how their work impacts real people. There are no layers of management and no “that’s someone else’s problem” mentality.</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">We’re low ego and high standards. We challenge ideas, admit mistakes, ask questions, and care more about getting to the right answer than being right. Psychological safety matters here, and so does excellence.</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">We’re async-first and intentionally lightweight. We write things down, keep meetings purposeful, and avoid process for process’ sake. Our default approach is simple: communicate clearly, make good decisions, and ship.</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">And because we’re building a real team, not just a collection of Slack profiles, we get together for an offsite every quarter somewhere in the world. Last time, we spent the week skiing and working together, because the best ideas don’t always happen in a meeting room.&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Compensation &amp; equity</span></span></span></span></h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Senior IC salary (currency calibrated to location)</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Meaningful founding-engineer equity grant: we're early enough that this matters and we want you for the full journey</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Annual leave + Danish-equivalent benefits</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Quarterly offsites around the world</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">How to apply</span></span></span></span></strong></p>
<p><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">Please send us:</span></span></span></span><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size"><br></span></span></span></span><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">1. A relevant CV</span></span></span></span><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size"><br></span></span></span></span><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">2. A short introduction<br></span></span></span></span><span class="highlight"><span class="colour"><span class="font"><span class="size">3. Pick 2 questions in the&nbsp;questionnaire</span></span></span></span></p>

      <title>Vista Fulfillment Group: Customer Support Operations Manager - Intercom & Fin AI</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Customer Support</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5448/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Santee, California, United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://vistafulfillmentgroup.com/">https://vistafulfillmentgroup.com/</a>
</p>

<p><strong>Remote — United States Only</strong><br><strong>Full-Time | 40 Hours/Week</strong><br><strong>Hourly Rate:</strong> $30-$40/hour, depending on experience<br><strong>Benefits:</strong> Medical and dental benefits available<br><strong>Reports To:</strong> COO</p>
<h3>About the Role</h3>
<p>Vista Fulfillment Group is hiring a full-time <strong>Customer Support Operations Manager</strong> to lead our customer support team and improve the systems, workflows, and response times behind our customer service operation.</p>
<p>This is a remote position open to candidates located anywhere in the United States. The schedule is a standard 40-hour work week, Monday through Friday, with availability required during business hours from <strong>9:00 AM to 5:00 PM</strong>.</p>
<p>This role is responsible for managing a team of approximately 10 customer support agents who handle customer tickets, refunds, disputes, order issues, phone support, email support, and Intercom chat support.</p>
<p>We are looking for a hands-on CS leader who can both manage people and improve systems. The ideal candidate must have strong experience with <strong>Intercom</strong>, including inbox management, reporting, routing, workflows, automations, and help center structure. They must also have strong experience with <strong>Fin AI</strong>, Intercom's AI agent, including setup, flow design, automation planning, content structure, and implementation.</p>
<p>Our current first response time averages around 48 hours. A major goal of this role is to reduce first response time to <strong>12 hours ideally, and no later than 24 hours</strong>, while improving ticket quality, accountability, and SLA performance.</p>
<p></p>
<h3>Preferred Experience</h3>
<p>Experience implementing Fin AI from the ground up or rescuing a failed AI support implementation.</p>
<p>Experience in ecommerce, fulfillment, logistics, retail, marketplaces, alcohol, or order-management support environments.</p>
<p>Experience handling refund, dispute, chargeback, delivery issue, and customer complaint workflows.</p>
<p>Experience creating CS dashboards, weekly KPI reports, SOPs, internal playbooks, and quality assurance scorecards.</p>
<p>Experience working with technical teams to improve integrations, reporting, AI workflows, and automation logic.</p>
<h3>Ideal Candidate</h3>
<p>The ideal candidate is a hands-on customer support operator who can manage a team, improve accountability, and personally help build a better Intercom and Fin AI support system.</p>
<p>This person should not only understand customer service management, but also know how to structure support workflows, build automations, analyze ticket data, and use AI to reduce manual workload without sacrificing service quality.</p>
<p>We are looking for someone who can take a support department with a 48-hour average first response time and build the systems, team discipline, and automation needed to bring that down to 12-24 hours.</p>
<p></p>
<h3>Location</h3>
<p>Remote, United States only.</p>
<p><strong>Requirements</strong></p>
<h3>Key Responsibilities</h3>
<ul><li>Lead and manage a customer support team of approximately 10 agents handling tickets, refunds, disputes, order issues, chat, email, and phone support.</li></ul>
<ul>
<li>Monitor daily support performance, ticket queues, backlog, response times, resolution times, SLA compliance, quality standards, and agent productivity.</li>
<li>Reduce average first response time from approximately 24 hours to 12 hours ideally, and no later than 24 hours.</li>
<li>Build, improve, and manage Intercom workflows, routing rules, inbox structure, automations, tags, macros, reporting dashboards, team assignments, and escalation paths.</li>
<li>Lead the implementation of Fin AI, including flow design, AI response logic, help center content strategy, escalation rules, automation structure, and ongoing optimization.</li>
<li>Work with developers, consultants, or internal technical resources when needed to properly implement Fin AI, integrations, reporting, and automation improvements.</li>
<li>Analyze Intercom reports and support data to identify bottlenecks, agent performance issues, recurring customer problems, workflow gaps, and automation opportunities.</li>
<li>Create and maintain SOPs for ticket handling, refunds, disputes, escalations, SLA standards, phone support, chat support, and email support.</li>
<li>Train customer support agents on Intercom usage, Fin AI workflows, support quality expectations, communication standards, escalation procedures, and performance goals.</li>
<li>Review team performance and recommend staffing changes, coaching plans, disciplinary actions, promotions, or workflow adjustments to leadership.</li>
<li>Ensure support operations meet partner expectations and that SLA risks are identified and escalated quickly.</li>
<li>Work closely with the COO, operations team, fulfillment team, account management, and developers to improve customer experience and resolve recurring issues.</li>
</ul>
<p></p>
<h3>Required Qualifications</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Must be located in the United States.</strong></li>
<li>Bachelor's degree required.</li>
<li>Experience managing customer support teams of at least 10 people.</li>
<li>Minimum 3 years of hands-on Intercom experience.</li>
<li>Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with Fin AI, Intercom's AI agent, including setup, flow design, automation, and optimization.</li>
<li>Strong understanding of customer support KPIs, including first response time, resolution time, backlog, SLA compliance, CSAT, escalation volume, ticket volume, productivity, and quality assurance.</li>
<li>Experience managing chat, email, and phone support teams.</li>
<li>Ability to build and improve Intercom workflows, inbox rules, routing logic, macros, reports, automations, help center content, and escalation processes.</li>
<li>Technical comfort with basic APIs, integrations, reporting exports, data analysis, and working with developers or consultants to complete support system improvements.</li>
<li>Strong leadership skills with the ability to coach, train, hold agents accountable, and recommend changes when needed.</li>
<li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li>
<li>Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Benefits</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>This is a full-time hourly role with a rate of <strong>$30-$40/hour</strong>, depending on experience, leadership background, Intercom expertise, Fin AI implementation experience, and technical ability.</li>
<li>Medical and dental benefits are available.</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vista-fulfillment-group-customer-support-operations-manager-intercom-fin-ai">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vista-fulfillment-group-customer-support-operations-manager-intercom-fin-ai</a></p>
</description>

      <skills>Adobe Creative Suite, Community Growth, Competitor Analysis, Architect, Architecture, Bug Tracking, Blog Writing,  Editing, Audio Editing, and Brand Identity Design</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5443/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Tijuana, Mexico
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://varicent.com">http://varicent.com</a>
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>&nbsp;</p>
<div class="p-rich_text_section">At Varicent, we’re not just transforming the Sales Performance Management (SPM) market—we’re redefining how organizations achieve revenue success. Our cutting-edge SaaS solutions empower revenue leaders globally to design smarter go-to-market strategies, maximize seller performance, and unlock untapped potential. Varicent stands at the forefront of innovation, celebrated as a market leader in the&nbsp;<em>2025 Forrester Wave Report for SPM</em>,&nbsp;<em>2023 Ventana Research Revenue Performance Management (RPM) Value Index</em>,&nbsp;<em>Gartner Peer Insights</em>,&nbsp;<em>2024 Gartner SPM Market Guide</em>, and&nbsp;<em>G2.&nbsp;</em>Our solutions are trusted by a diverse range of global industry leaders like T-Mobile, ServiceNow, Wawanesa Bank, Shaw Industries, Moody's, Stryker and hundreds more. Here’s why you’ll thrive at Varicent:</div>
<ul class="p-rich_text_list p-rich_text_list__bullet p-rich_text_list--nested">
<li><strong>Innovate with Purpose: Build impactful solutions for customers worldwide.</strong></li>
<li><strong>Join Excellence: Work in a diverse, collaborative, and innovative team.</strong></li>
<li><strong>Shape the Future: Lead in redefining revenue optimization.</strong></li>
<li><strong>Grow Together: Unlock your potential in a supportive environment.</strong></li>
</ul>
<div class="p-rich_text_section">Join us at Varicent—where your talent and ambition meet limitless opportunities for success!</div></div><div><p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong><span>THE OPPORTUNITY </span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>Our Technical Support Team serves as the frontline of customer success, specializing in providing expert assistance to users navigating our SaaS solutions. They troubleshoot technical challenges, answer complex queries, and ensure that customers can maximize the value of our products. Beyond solving immediate issues, the team collaborates closely with product and development teams to report bugs, contribute to product enhancements, and share insights into user experiences. Their ultimate goal is to deliver exceptional service, foster customer satisfaction, and enable seamless adoption of our technology across diverse use cases.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>THE TEAM</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>The Technical Analyst I works with clients to resolve issues, lead conversations and coordinate activities across departments,</span><span> and reproduces issues to </span><span>maintain high client satisfaction.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>As a</span><strong><span> Technical Analyst</span></strong><span> you will have the opportunity to work side-by-side with some of the most experienced technology leaders for both on-premises and SaaS products to support our customers/business partners and connect with them by video conference, email and CRM and other state of the art communication methods. You will also be exposed to a variety of technologies and take responsibility for the creation of a positive customer experience.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>Technical Analysts are at the center of our after-sales value proposition to our clients, and you will lead conversations and coordinate activities with experts and leaders across departments and divisions in Varicent.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>WHAT YOU BRING&nbsp;</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span><strong><span>Technical Skills</span></strong></p>
<ul>
<li><span>2+ Years of relevant technical experience.&nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Proven experience working with SaaS platforms (mandatory)</span></li>
<li><span><span>Familiar with relational databases concepts, both basic administration and SQL scripting. </span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span><span>Familiar with client server architecture. </span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Ability to communicate clearly (both verbally and in written form) technical instructions to people with limited experience. </span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span><span>Sharing best practices for the </span><span>utilization</span><span> and deployment of Varicent products. </span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span><span>Help customers maximize their product’s business value.</span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span><span>Troubleshooting experience for web-based applications.&nbsp;</span></span></li>
</ul>
<p><strong><span>Collaboration and Communication: </span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li><span>CEFR B2 level English proficiency or higher is required.</span></li>
<li><span>Ability to work and collaborate effectively in cross-functional teams.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>WHAT YOU’LL DO </span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li><span>Resolve technical problems by troubleshooting incidents, including but not limited to collecting detailed problem description, traces, log files, and replication.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Communicate progress of investigation with clients while ensuring all related records are properly updated in the CRM system.</span></li>
<li><span>Proficient in utilizing all support tools and processes to resolve cases.</span></li>
<li><span>Share best practices for the utilization and deployment of Varicent products.</span></li>
<li><span>Support KPI targets (SLA, QA, Resolution, etc.).</span></li>
<li><span>Available for scheduled weekend coverage for on call rotation . </span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>1-3 MONTHS</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li><span>Efficiently familiarize oneself with the organization's systems, processes, and team dynamics.</span></li>
<li><span>Establish a working knowledge of key technologies and tools relevant to the role.</span></li>
<li><span>Complete Training and start solving support cases.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>4-6 MONTHS</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li><span>Demonstrate proficiency in using relevant analytical tools and technologies.</span></li>
<li><span>Be able to solve 90% of cases without need for assistance.</span></li>
<li><span>Actively contribute to team projects and initiatives.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>7 MONTHS &amp; BEYOND</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li><span>Be able to solve 99% of cases without assistance, help build knowledge for the rest of team.</span></li>
<li><span>Conduct in-depth analysis of complex technical issues and provide well-reasoned solutions.</span></li>
<li><span>Proactively anticipate and address potential challenges before they escalate.</span></li>
<li><span>Build and maintain positive relationships with key stakeholders.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>Note&nbsp;</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li><span>Candidates selected for this position will be hired by Varicent’s designated professional employer organization. Your employment may be transferred to a local Varicent entity in the future. In such event, Varicent may recognize your seniority and provide you with comparable role, responsibilities and benefits.&nbsp; We are excited to welcome you and support you throughout this journey!</span></li>
<li><span>This role requires employees to work within Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours. While we are open to candidates from outside the EST time zone, please be prepared to adjust your working hours to align with this time zone. Flexibility will be essential to ensure seamless collaboration with the team and stakeholders.</span></li>
<li><span>This position is fully remote. We embrace a results-driven work culture, focusing on performance and collaboration over location. As part of our team, you’ll have the opportunity to build a work-life balance that suits you, while staying connected with a diverse, global team through virtual tools and regular online communication. Whether you're working from home or a co-working space we’re committed to supporting you with the resources and autonomy needed to succeed in a remote environment.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>Benefits&nbsp;</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li><span><strong>Market Leading </strong>Compensation Package.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span><strong>Wellness Programs&nbsp;</strong>to Support Health and Wellbeing. &nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Working with the latest<strong> tools and technologies </strong>in a fast-paced environment. &nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Remote Work Flexibility.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Comprehensive Employee Insurance Coverage: Medical, Dental, Vision, Life Insurance. </span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Annual Time Off: Time off is provided in accordance with applicable legislative requirements. </span><span>&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Global Connected Culture: Hubs in Romania, UK, US, Canada.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Dynamic Work Culture: Thrive in our innovative and multicultural environment.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span>Grow with Us: Continuous development opportunities.&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span>&nbsp;</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><strong><span>Want to Learn More About Us? Check out these Resources Below:&nbsp;</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://www.varicent.com/blog?utm_source=Google&amp;utm_campaign=DN_Google_US_Brand&amp;utm_content=Brand_Product_Tour_Page_Fall+AO+Refreshct_Tour_Page_Always_On&amp;utm_medium=paidsearch&amp;_gl=1*qhz6pt*_up*MQ..&amp;gclid=Cj0KCQjwtsy1BhD7ARIsAHOi4xbc72l3bTLx9rhjxbs2lsK9V7zbHda2nAeNVMaIchjVBLSiegt1Yc0aAl3WEALw_wcB"><span><span>Varicent Blog&nbsp;</span></span></a></li>

      <title>Akamai: Senior Software Development Engineer in Test II - Automation</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Adobe Creative Suite, CMS Development, Community Growth, Competitor Analysis, Architect, Architecture, Blog Writing,  Editing, Audio Editing, and Brand Identity Design</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://akamai.com">http://akamai.com</a>
</p>

<div><strong>Description</strong><br><p><strong>Are you excited to work on innovative enterprise security products?</strong></p>
<p><strong>Do you enjoy collaborating with developers and impacting products touching life online for millions of users billions times a day?</strong></p>
<p><strong>Join Our Team</strong></p>
<p>Our team operates within the Zero Trust Security Group, developing advanced security solutions for government and defense customers. We build and operate secure, mission-critical platforms in highly regulated environments. As part of a global team, we design/deploy cloud-native/edge solutions that integrate with tactical networks, enterprise systems, and partner technologies.</p>
<p><strong>Partner with the best</strong></p>
<p>As a Senior Software Engineer in Test II, you will develop, execute, and maintain test suites for our cloud services/web applications, focusing on FedRAMP standards. Working on top-notch network security projects with highly skilled colleagues, you will enjoy challenges in an exciting, dynamic learning environment.</p>
<p>As a Senior II Software Development Engineer in Test, you will be responsible for:</p>
<ul>
<li>Providing high-quality test strategies using industry-standard tools and frameworks</li>
<li>Designing, maintaining, and executing automated test suites for our Zero Trust solution</li>
<li>Managing test executions, including application functionality, performance and security</li>
<li>Working closely with the development and product teams to understand project requirements and identify test scenarios for automation</li>
<li>Contributing to the enhancement of the automated testing infrastructure and integrate it into our CI/CD pipelines</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Do what you love</strong></p>
<p>To be successful in this role you will:</p>
<ul>
<li>Have 8+ years as Automation Engineer experience and a degree in CS or related field</li>
<li>Have experience writing/maintaining tests using Python and spinning up environments using tools like K8s, Podman, VMware or other cloud platforms</li>
<li>Have hands-on experience with test automation frameworks and tools</li>
<li>Be proficient in writing and executing SQL queries for database validation</li>
<li>Have experience with version control systems (e.g., Git), continuous integration tools (e.g., Jenkins), and project management and tracking tools (e.g., JIRA)</li>
<li>Have experience developing/maintaining component and integration tests ensuring the seamless interaction and functionality of individual services within the larger system</li>
<li>Demonstrate understanding of containerization and orchestration technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes</li>
<li>Be eligible to obtain a Secret Security Clearance</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Work in a way that works for you</strong></p>
<p>FlexBase, Akamai's Global Flexible Working Program, is based on the principles that are helping us create the best workplace in the world. When our colleagues said that flexible working was important to them, we listened. We also know flexible working is important to many of the incredible people considering joining Akamai. FlexBase, gives 95% of employees the choice to work from their home, their office, or both (in the country advertised). This permanent workplace flexibility program is consistent and fair globally, to help us find incredible talent, virtually anywhere. We are happy to discuss working options for this role and encourage you to speak with your recruiter in more detail when you apply.&nbsp;<br><br><a href="https://www.akamai.com/careers">Learn</a>&nbsp;what makes Akamai a great place to work</p>



Connect with us on social and see what life at Akamai is like!
<a href="https://twitter.com/Akamai?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor"></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/akamaicareers/"></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/akamai-technologies/"></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.instagram.com/akamaicareers/"></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.akamai.com/blog?"></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLYo5nh8xQFpnnPl17sQRURR9ugKL-KMRO"></a>



<p><strong>We power and protect life online, by solving the toughest challenges, together.</strong></p>
<p>At Akamai, we're curious, innovative, collaborative and tenacious. We celebrate diversity of thought and we hold an unwavering belief that we can make a meaningful difference. Our teams use their global perspectives to put customers at the forefront of everything they do, so if you are people-centric, you'll thrive here.</p>
<p><strong>Working for you</strong></p>
<p>At Akamai, we will provide you with opportunities to grow, flourish, and achieve great things. Our benefit options are designed to meet your individual needs for today and in the future. We provide benefits surrounding all aspects of your life:</p>
<ul>
<li>Your health</li>
<li>Your finances</li>
<li>Your family</li>
<li>Your time at work</li>
<li>Your time pursuing other endeavors</li>
</ul>
<p>Our benefit plan options are designed to meet your individual needs and budget, both today and in the future.</p>
<p><strong>About us</strong></p>
<p>Akamai powers and protects life online. Leading companies worldwide choose Akamai to build, deliver, and secure their digital experiences helping billions of people live, work, and play every day. With the world's most distributed compute platform from cloud to edge we make it easy for customers to develop and run applications, while we keep experiences closer to users and threats farther away.</p>
<p><strong>Join us</strong></p>
<p>Are you seeking an opportunity to make a real difference in a company with a global reach and exciting services and clients? Come join us and grow with a team of people who will energize and inspire you!<br><br>
  Akamai Technologies is an Affirmative Action, Equal Opportunity Employer that values the strength that diversity brings to the workplace. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment and will not be discriminated against on the basis of gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, race/ethnicity, protected veteran status, disability, or other protected group status.<br><br>
  If no date is displayed, applications are being accepted on an ongoing basis until the job is filled.</p>
<p><strong>Compensation</strong></p>
<p>Akamai is committed to fair and equitable compensation practices. For US based candidates only - the base salary for this position ranges from $146,400 - $263,600/year; a candidate’s salary is determined by various factors including, but not limited to, relevant work experience, skills, certifications and location. Compensation for candidates outside the US will vary. The compensation package may also include incentive compensation opportunities in the form of annual bonus or incentives, equity awards and an Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP). Akamai provides industry-leading benefits including healthcare, 401K savings plan, company holidays, vacation (in the form of PTO), sick time, family friendly benefits including parental leave and an employee assistance program including a focus on mental and financial wellness; Eligibility requirements apply.</p><br><br><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/akamai-senior-software-development-engineer-in-test-ii-automation">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/akamai-senior-software-development-engineer-in-test-ii-automation</a></p>

      <region>Florida</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Management and Finance</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5439/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote, Florida, 33146 United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://blossom.net">http://blossom.net</a>
</p>

<div class="js-area-container js-section-job-description">
<div class="js-area-heading">
        Job Description
      </div>
<div class="js-job-description">
<p><br></p><p><strong>Job Summary:</strong></p><p><strong>The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) is responsible for overseeing the company’s financial strategy, planning, and operations in support of sustainable growth, operational discipline, and regulatory credibility. The CFO provides executive leadership over accounting, financial reporting, budgeting, forecasting, and financial controls, ensuring the organization maintains strong financial governance appropriate for a fintech serving credit unions. The CFO operates as both a strategic advisor and hands-on financial leader, partnering closely with executive leadership, Engineering, Compliance, and external advisors to support growth, audits, and client due diligence.</strong></p><p><strong><br></strong></p><p><strong>Supervisory Responsibilities:</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Provides leadership and oversight for the Accounting and Finance functions.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Manages internal accounting staff and external vendors (e.g., accounting firms, tax advisors).</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Oversees budget preparation, financial controls, and audit coordination.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Collaborates with department leaders to monitor financial performance and resource allocation.</strong></p></li></ul><p><strong><br></strong></p><p><strong>Duties/ Responsibilities: </strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Directs the preparation and review of all financial statements, including income statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, and management reports.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Oversees budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes, including variance analysis and recommendations for corrective action.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Ensures timely and accurate tax filings and compliance with applicable federal, state, and local requirements.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Establishes and maintains financial controls, policies, and procedures aligned with audit and SOC expectations.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Partners with executive leadership to support strategic planning, prioritization, and resource allocation.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Analyzes operational and financial data to identify opportunities for efficiency, scalability, and cost optimization.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Supports pricing models, contract reviews, and revenue recognition practices appropriate for SaaS and fintech environments.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Oversees cash management, banking relationships, and capital planning.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Works with external partners, investors, or lenders as needed to support financing or growth initiatives.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Supports client due diligence requests related to financial stability and controls.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Monitors economic and industry trends relevant to fintech and credit unions and advises leadership accordingly.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Lead changes to the company's legal entity structure, including subsidiary formations, corporate reorganizations, and entity conversions.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Direct mergers and acquisitions activity, including target evaluation, financial due diligence, deal structuring, transaction execution, and post-merger integration.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Performs other related duties as assigned.</strong></p></li></ul><p><strong><br></strong></p><p><strong>Required Skills/ Abilities: </strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Strong leadership, management, and financial governance skills.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Excellent analytical, organizational, and problem-solving abilities.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Deep understanding of accounting principles, financial reporting, and budgeting.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Experience with financial systems and accounting software appropriate for growth-stage companies.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Ability to communicate financial concepts clearly to non-financial stakeholders.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>High level of integrity, discretion, and judgment.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Ability to operate effectively in a fast-paced, regulated fintech environment.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Proficient in Google Workspace or similar software.</strong></p></li></ul><p><strong><br></strong></p><p><strong>Education and Experience: </strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Master’s degree in Business Administration, Accounting, Finance, or a related field preferred.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>10 or more years of progressive experience in finance or accounting, including leadership responsibility.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Experience in fintech, SaaS, or financial services, particularly within banking or credit union environments, strongly preferred.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Certified Public Accountant (CPA) designation preferred but not required.</strong></p></li></ul><p><strong><br></strong></p><p><strong>Physical Requirements: </strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer.</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Must be able to lift up to 15 pounds at times.<br></strong></p></li></ul><p><strong><br></strong></p><p><strong>What We Offer:</strong></p><ul><li><strong>Company-paid medical, dental, and vision insurance for employees</strong></li><li><strong>Company-paid life and AD&amp;D insurance</strong></li><li><strong>Company-paid short- and long-term disability</strong></li><li><strong>401(k) retirement plan</strong></li><li><strong>Flexible Spending Accounts (FSA)/ Dependent Care Spending Account (DCSA)</strong></li><li><strong>Unlimited PTO</strong></li><li><strong>Employee Assistance Program (EAP)</strong></li><li><strong>Voluntary supplemental insurance option</strong></li></ul><p><strong><br></strong></p><p><strong><br></strong></p><p><br></p>
</div>
</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/blossom-chief-financial-officer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/blossom-chief-financial-officer</a></p>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/5440/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Collectly: Strategic Account Executive</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Analytics, Google Analytics, Monitoring and Analytics, Predictive Analytics, Cyber Security, Endpoint Security, Analytics Tools, Sales Analytics, Ecommerce Web Development, and Ecommerce Management</skills>
      <category>Management and Finance</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5440/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://collectly.co">http://collectly.co</a>
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div>
<div><span><strong>About Collectly</strong></span></div>
<div>Collectly is a fast-growing healthcare technology company transforming revenue cycle management (RCM) through AI-driven automation. Millions of patients navigate inefficient billing systems every day, while providers face delayed payments, rising administrative burden, and operational complexity.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>Collectly applies artificial intelligence to automate workflows, accelerate cash flow, and modernize the patient financial experience; enabling healthcare organizations to operate more efficiently and focus on delivering care.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>There could not be a hotter space to play in.&nbsp; Healthcare is a $4.9T industry and is adopting AI technology at 2.2x the rate of the rest of the economy.&nbsp; RCM is at the heart of this transformation as it has a clear and demonstrable ROI to our customers.&nbsp;&nbsp;</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span><strong>The Opportunity</strong></span></div>
<div>We are hiring a <strong>Strategic Account Executive</strong> to drive high-impact enterprise revenue during a critical phase of growth.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>The role is focused on sourcing, developing, and closing complex six and seven figure deals with large healthcare organizations. You will own a defined set of strategic accounts and operate as a senior deal leader. The ideal candidate is capable of navigating complex buying committees, diagnosing deeply rooted revenue cycle challenges, and building compelling business cases that resonate at the executive level.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>This is not a transactional sales role. It is designed for a seller who thrives in long, consultative sales cycles, brings discipline to opportunity strategy, and can consistently win in complex, multi-stakeholder environments.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>You will partner closely with leadership, product, and marketing to expand our presence within large healthcare systems and deliver measureable value to the organizations we serve.&nbsp;</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Key Responsibilities</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><h3>Lead Complex Deal Strategy:</h3>
<ul>
<li>Operate as the quarterback for complex, multi-threaded opportunities involving numerous stakeholders and decision makers.</li>
<li>Develop clear win strategies, champion maps, and executive alignment plans.</li>
<li>Navigate procurement, legal, security, and compliance processes typical within large healthcare organizations.</li>
<li>Maintain disciplined deal execution through structured opportunity planning and internal collaboration.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Elevate Discovery and Value Diagnosis:</h3>
<ul>
<li>Conduct high-quality discovery that surfaces operational challenges across the revenue cycle.</li>
<li>Diagnose workflow inefficiencies, patient billing friction, and revenue leakage that impact healthcare organizations.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Translate these insights into compelling ROI and operational improvement narratives that resonate with executive buyers.</li>
<li>Position Collectly as a strategic partner in improving the patient billing experience while helping healthcare organizations collect what they are owed.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Build and Maintain Strategic Pipeline:</h3>
<ul>
<li>Develop and maintain a healthy pipeline of strategic opportunities through targeted outbound activity and account planning.</li>
<li>Partner with Sales Development and Marketing to penetrate priority healthcare systems.</li>
<li>Build multi-threaded engagement across clinical, operational, and financial stakeholders within targeted accounts.</li>
<li>Maintain disciplined opportunity management and accurate forecasting.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Operate with Precision and Accountability:</h3>
<ul>
<li>Maintain strong command of pipeline health, opportunity progression, and close plans.</li>
<li>Use data to evaluate deal momentum and identify risks early.</li>
<li>Collaborate closely with leadership to continuously refine strategic sales motion and execution.</li>
<li>Operate with a high degree of ownership over both individual performance and team success.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What Success Looks Like</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><h3>Within the first 90 days:</h3>
<ul>
<li>Develop a deep understanding of Collectly's platform, buyer personas, and healthcare revenue cycle workflows.</li>
<li>Build a clear strategic plan for their assigned territory and target accounts.</li>
<li>Establish strong internal alignment with product, marketing, and sales leadership.</li>
<li>Create early-stage pipeline within priority health systems.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Over two quarters, success includes:</h3>
<ul>
<li>Closing strategic six-figure opportunities.</li>
<li>Building a predictable pipeline of enterprise healthcare opportunities.</li>
<li>Developing strong executive relationships within large health systems.</li>
<li>Consistently progressing complex deals with clear strategy and momentum.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Qualifications</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><h3>Required</h3>
<ul>
<li>7+ years of B2B SaaS experience selling revenue cycle management technology or solutions within healthcare.</li>
<li>Demonstrated success closing 6-7 figure contracts in multi-stakeholder sales environments.</li>
<li>Proven ability to navigate complex healthcare buying processes including finance, IT, compliance, and procurement.</li>
<li>Strong enterprise sales methodology experience (MEDDPICC, Challenger, GAP selling, or similar).</li>
<li>Consistency in meeting or exceeding quota in strategic or enterprise sales roles.</li>
<li>Demonstrated ability to independently drive complex opportunities from discovery through close.</li>
<li><strong>Alignment with Collectly's GTM Values</strong>:
<ul>
<li><span>We are owners</span> - we have humility and put the team first.</li>
<li><span>We know our numbers</span> - we are data-driven and understand how to impact our business internally and our customers' business externally.</li>
<li><span>We are AI powered</span> - we automate easy repetitive tasks and research so we can solve harder problems and have a greater impact.</li>
<li><span>We are one with the Buffalo</span> - we expect that there will be challenges along the way and, like the Buffalo, we confront these challenges head on by running INTO the storm.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Core Competencies</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>Deep expertise in enterprise qualification and deal strategy.</li>
<li>Strong discovery and diagnostic skills in complex operational environments.</li>
<li>Ability to build executive-level business cases that quantify financial and operational value.</li>
<li>Highly disciplined pipeline management and forecasting capabilities.</li>
<li>Excellent executive communication and stakeholder management.</li>
<li>High ownership with strong internal collaboration.</li>
<li>Ability to thrive in a fast-paced startup environemtn.</li>
<li>Deep curiosity and a growth mindset.</li>
<li>Experience with a modern sales technology stack.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Preferred</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>Experience selling directly into health systems, IDNs, or large healthcare provider organizations.</li>
<li>Background selling revenue cycle, patient financial experience, or healthcare workflow automation solutions.</li>
<li>Experience in early-stage or high-growth startup SaaS companies.</li>
<li>Familiarity with AI-driven or automation technology within healthcare operations.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Why You'll Love It Here</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li><strong>Unlimited PTO:</strong> We believe in work-life balance and encourage you to recharge when you need it.</li>
<li><strong>Comprehensive Health Coverage: </strong>Fully paid medical, dental, and vision insurance for you and your dependents, because your well-being matters to us.</li>
<li><strong>Equity Opportunities:</strong> Share in our success with stock options - your hard work will drive our growth.</li>
<li><strong>Retirement Planning Made Easy: </strong>Enjoy a 401(k) with a generous company match to secure your future.</li>
<li><strong>Student Loan Support:</strong> We help lighten the load with contributions toward your student loans.</li>
<li><strong>Compensation Range:</strong> This role offers a competitive on-target earnings package with a strong base salary, uncapped commission, and meaningful equity - designed to reward top performers closing complex, high-value strategic deals.</li>
</ul>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>If you think you’re a “Buffalo” who has what it takes to have a meaningful impact within our rapidly growing organization and to the broader healthcare industry - apply to come join our team today!</div></div></div></div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/collectly-strategic-account-executive">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/collectly-strategic-account-executive</a></p>
</description>

      <expires_at>Sun, 05 Jul 2026 20:36:48 +0000</expires_at>
      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/collectly-strategic-account-executive</guid>
      <link>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/collectly-strategic-account-executive</link>
    </item>

      <title>Boston Medical Center: System Finance and Special Projects Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Management and Finance</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5438/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://bmc.org">http://bmc.org</a>
</p>

<div><p><b>POSITION SUMMARY</b><b>:</b></p><p></p><p>The System Finance &amp; Special Projects Manager will play a highly visible role in supporting the execution of BMCHS’s financial strategy in alignment with organizational goals. This position leads and delivers key financial initiatives, including strategic balance sheet and expense management, business case development, budgeting, financial planning and analysis, and operational improvement efforts. The position combines strong systems-level thinking with hands-on execution, translating complex financial data into actionable insights to support informed decision-making and optimize financial performance.</p><p></p><p></p><p><b>Position: System Finance and Special Projects Manager&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </b></p><p><b>Department: BMCHS Corporate Finance</b></p><p><b>Schedule: Full Time</b></p><p></p><p><b>ESSENTIAL RESPONSIBILITIES / DUTIES:</b></p><p>Working under the direction of one or more System Finance (Sr.) Directors on several projects at a time, this job will:</p><ul><li>In partnership with the Sr. Director of Corporate Finance, support the annual budget process to ensure alignment with hospital goals</li><li>Monitor budget performance and identify variances, recommending corrective actions as necessary</li><li>Conduct in-depth financial analysis to identify trends, variances, and opportunities for cost savings and efficiency improvements</li><li>Help manage cross-functional initiatives throughout BMCHS, including supporting the selection and implementation process for technology / AI solutions for key use cases</li><li>Help lead development and preparation of external financial communications for various stakeholders, including board materials, investor presentations, and capital markets engagement</li><li>Create and maintain financial dashboard and analytics tools that enable leaders to monitor performance against targets and drive accountability</li><li>Develop and standardize external financial communications for various stakeholders, including board materials, investor presentations, and capital markets engagement.</li><li>Drive operational excellence within the Finance function, including KPI development, process optimization, and continuous improvement initiatives.</li></ul><p></p><p><b>(The above statements in this job description are intended to depict the general nature and level of work assigned to the employee(s) in this job. The above is not intended to represent an exhaustive list of accountable duties and responsibilities required)</b></p><p></p><p></p><p><b>JOB REQUIREMENTS</b></p><p></p><p><b>REQUIRED EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE:</b></p><ul><li>Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or related field and a minimum of 2 years of experience in strategy consulting, investment banking or private equity with a healthcare focus; or equivalent combination of education and experience</li></ul><p></p><p><b>PREFERRED EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE (If none, please enter “N/A”):</b></p><ul><li>MBA, MPH or other advanced degree</li><li>At least 3-4 years of experience in strategic finance or FP&amp;A at a healthcare-services focused organization</li></ul><p></p><p><b>CERTIFICATIONS, LICENSES, REGISTRATIONS REQUIRED (If none, please enter “N/A”):</b></p><p>None</p><p></p><p><b>CERTIFICATIONS, LICENSES, REGISTRATIONS PREFERRED (If none, please enter “N/A”):</b></p><p>None</p><p></p><p><b>KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS &amp; ABILITIES (KSAs) (If none, please enter “N/A”):</b></p><ul><li>Ability to manage and prioritize across multiple projects to meet deadlines</li><li>Advanced proficiency in financial software and Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel and Power Point; Proficient in financial modeling, budgeting, and forecasting techniques.</li><li>Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex financial data and provide actionable insights.</li><li>Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to convey financial information to non-financial stakeholders.</li></ul><p></p><p></p><p></p><p><b>Compensation Range:</b></p>$78,000.00- $113,000.00<p>This range offers an estimate based on the minimum job qualifications. However, our approach to determining base pay is comprehensive, and a broad range of factors is considered when making an offer. This includes education, experience, skills, and certifications/licensures as they directly relate to position requirements; as well as business/organizational needs, internal equity, and market-competitiveness. In addition, BMCHS offers generous total compensation that includes, but is not limited to, benefits (medical, dental, vision, pharmacy), discretionary annual bonuses and merit increases, Flexible Spending Accounts, 403(b) savings matches, paid time off, career advancement opportunities, and resources to support employee and family well-being.&nbsp;</p><p><b>NOTE</b>: This range is based on Boston-area data, and is subject to modification based on geographic location.</p><p></p><p></p><p>Equal Opportunity <span class="WOR0">Employer/Disabled/Veterans</span></p><p>According to the FTC, there has been a rise in employment offer scams. Our current job openings are listed on our website and applications are received only through our website. We do not ask or require downloads of any applications, or “apps” job offers are not extended over text messages or social media platforms. We do not ask individuals to purchase equipment for or prior to employment.&nbsp;</p></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/boston-medical-center-system-finance-and-special-projects-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/boston-medical-center-system-finance-and-special-projects-manager</a></p>
</description>
