      <title>Arineo: Senior Consultant Microsoft Dynamics 365 FSCM - Finance (all genders)</title>
      <region>Hesse</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Cross-Browser Development and Cross-Selling</skills>
      <category>Management and Finance</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Butzbach, Hesse, 35510, Germany
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://arineo.com">http://arineo.com</a>
</p>

<div>Möglicher Arbeitsort: Göttingen, Aachen, Bielefeld, Bremen, Butzbach, Chemnitz, Düsseldorf, Hamburg, München, Nürnberg - Fürth, Paderborn, Salzburg, Wien, Remote

### Hier bringst du dich ein:

Finanzprozesse müssen präzise zusammenspielen, damit Unternehmen handlungsfähig bleiben. Bei Arineo berätst du Kunden rund um Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance &amp; Controlling, entwickelst tragfähige Lösungskonzepte und begleitest ihre Umsetzung als Senior Berater:in.

- Ganzheitliche Beratung imDynamics-365-Umfeld:&nbsp;Du berätst unsere Kunden bei der Einführung und Weiterentwicklung von Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance- und Controlling-Lösungen und begleitest Projekte über alle Phasen hinweg – von der Analyse bis zum Go-live und darüber hinaus.
- **Analyse und Optimierung von Finance-Prozessen**: Du analysierst bestehende Prozesse in Finance und Controlling, identifizierst Verbesserungspotenziale und übersetzt fachliche Anforderungen in umsetzbare Lösungen.
- **Lösungsdesign und Umsetzung:** Du entwickelst maßgeschneiderte Lösungskonzepte und setzt diese gemeinsam mit dem Projektteam um – von der Konzeption über Customizing und Spezifikation bis hin zur erfolgreichen Implementierung.
- Verantwortung im Projekt:&nbsp;Du arbeitest eigenverantwortlich in Kundenprojekten, übernimmst fachliche Teilverantwortung und steuerst Themenbereiche eigenständig.
- Workshops und Abstimmung mit Kunden:&nbsp;Du moderierst Workshops, strukturierst Anforderungen und bist zentrale Ansprechperson für fachliche Fragestellungen im Projekt.
- Mitwirkung im Presales:&nbsp;Du bringst deine Erfahrung in Presales-Terminen oder Angebotsprozesse ein und unterstützt bei der Gewinnung neuer Projekte.

Wünschenswert:

- Business Development:&nbsp;Du bringst deine Expertise in Presales‑Terminen, Pitches oder Angebotsprozessen ein und unterstützt so bei der Akquise neuer Projekte und Kunden.

### Das bringst du mit

- **Erfahrung im Dynamics-365-Consulting**:&nbsp;Du hast mehrjährige Erfahrung als Berater:in im Umfeld von Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance mit Schwerpunkt Finance und Controlling.
- Breites Prozessverständnis im Finance-Bereich: Du kennst zentrale Finance- und Controlling-Prozesse und kannst diese strukturiert analysieren und weiterentwickeln.
- End-to-End-Projekterfahrung:&nbsp;Du hast Erfahrung über den gesamten Projektlebenszyklus hinweg – von der Analyse über die Umsetzung bis zum Go-live.
- Funktionale und technische Nähe:&nbsp;Du bewegst dich sicher im Spannungsfeld zwischen Fachbereich und Umsetzung und bringst Erfahrung in Customizing, Spezifikation oder Integrationsszenarien mit.
- Eigenverantwortung und Struktur:&nbsp;Du arbeitest selbstständig, übernimmst Verantwortung für deine Themen und behältst auch in komplexen Projekten den Überblick.
- Kommunikationsstärke:&nbsp;Du kannst komplexe Inhalte verständlich vermitteln und bewegst dich souverän im Austausch mit Kund:innen und Projektteams.
- Sprachkenntnisse und Reisebereitschaft:&nbsp;Du verfügst über sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse und bist bereit, im Rahmen von Projekten zu reisen (ca. 25 -40 %).
- **Umgang mit KI &amp; neuen Technologien:** Du bist vertraut mit KI-Lösungen, nutzt sie aktiv in deinem täglichen Arbeiten und bist offen für neue Tools und Methoden.

### Freu dich auf

- Intensive Betreuung während der Einarbeitung
- Selbstständiges Arbeiten, mit großen Freiräumen zum Einbringen deiner Ideen
- Ein agiles Team, das vertrauensvoll und eng zusammenarbeitet
- Individuelle Entwicklungs- und Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten
- Spannende Kundenprojekte im In- und Ausland
- Arbeitszeitkonto und 30+ Urlaubstage
- Dienstwagen mit freier Markenwahl
- Aktive Nutzung moderner KI- Tools

Bitte bewerbe dich ausschließlich über unser Jobportal [Arineo Jobs](https://jobs.arineo.com/jobs?page=1&amp;size=10&amp;country=&amp;fullTime=&amp;partTime=&amp;searchTerm=).</div>

      <title>Inserm: Assistant-e en gestion financière et comptable</title>
      <region>Île-de-France</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Management and Finance</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5441/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> 15 rue de l&#39;Ecole de Médecine 75006 Paris
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://inserm.fr">http://inserm.fr</a>
</p>

<div class="strate-two-columns fr-pt-3w fr-pt-md-8w fr-pb-3w fr-pb-md-7w bg-color--white">
<div class="fr-container">
<div class="fr-grid-row fr-grid-row--gutters">
<div class="fr-col-12 fr-col-md-12 fr-col-lg-6 fr-col-offset-lg-2 col-left rte">
<h2>Vos missions en quelques mots</h2>
<div>
<div class="text-clamp--text fr-mb-3w">
<p>L’Inserm est le seul organisme public français entièrement dédié à la recherche biologique, médicale et en santé des populations. Il dispose de laboratoires de recherche sur l’ensemble du territoire, regroupés en 12 Délégations Régionales. Notre institut réunit 15 000 chercheurs, ingénieurs, techniciens et personnels administratifs, avec un objectif commun : améliorer la santé de tous par le progrès des connaissances sur le vivant et sur les maladies, l’innovation dans les traitements et la recherche en santé publique.</p> </div>

<div class="text-clamp--hiddentext fr-mb-0"><p>Rejoindre l’Inserm, c’est intégrer un institut engagé pour la parité et l’égalité professionnelle, la diversité et l’accompagnement de ses agents en situation de handicap, dès le recrutement et tout au long de la carrière. Afin de préserver le bien-être au travail, l’Inserm mène une politique active en matière de conditions de travail, reposant notamment sur un juste équilibre entre vie personnelle et vie professionnelle.</p><p>L'Inserm a reçu en 2016 le label européen HR Excellence in Research et s'est engagé à faire évoluer ses pratiques de recrutement et d'évaluation des chercheurs.</p>
</div>
</div>
<h2 class="fr-mt-8w">Profil recherché</h2>
<div>
<div class="text-clamp--text">
<p><span><strong>Mission principale:</strong></span></p><p><br>La personne recrutée aura pour mission de coordonner le suivi administratif, RH et financier d’une ou plusieurs équipes du Centre de Recherche des Cordeliers sous la responsabilité de la secrétaire générale et de la responsable administrative et Finances dans le respect des règles et des procédures applicables aux différentes tutelles du CRC (Inserm, Université Paris Cité, Sorbonne Université).</p><p><br><span><strong>Activités principales:</strong></span></p> </div>

<div class="text-clamp--hiddentext"><p><br>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Assurer la coordination et/ou la réalisation des activités administratives, financières et de gestion du personnel au sein de la plateforme de gestion du CRC dans un environnement multi-tutelles</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Assurer la coordination et/ou la réalisation des aspects juridiques et financiers des subventions et contrats de recherche :</p><p>o&nbsp;&nbsp; Aider à la rédaction des demandes de financement des chercheurs en lien avec les services de montage de projets des tutelles,</p><p>o&nbsp;&nbsp; S’assurer de la mise en place budgétaire des subventions et contrats ;</p><p>o&nbsp;&nbsp; Assurer un suivi financier des allocations (éligibilité des dépenses, dates de fin de contrats etc.) ;</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Exécution budgétaire :</p><p>o&nbsp;&nbsp; Prendre en charge et gérer des commandes, missions, recrutements etc.</p><p>o&nbsp;&nbsp; Apporter à l’équipe des gestionnaires du CRC ressources et expertise dans le domaine de la gestion financière</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Préparer et suivre les dossiers de recrutement (CDD, vacataires)</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Gestion des conventions de stage et des gratifications de stage.</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Accueillir, informer et orienter dans les démarches administratives les personnels recrutés (français et étrangers) et tenir les listes des personnels du CRC à jour</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Établir, à partir du système d'information de l'établissement, les états et bilans comptables et/ou financiers et les tableaux de bord nécessaires au suivi de l'activité</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Suivre l'évolution des règles, directives et procédures financières et/ou comptables</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Proposer et concevoir des outils, des processus et des modes opératoires pour améliorer la gestion financière au sein du CRC</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Assurer la circulation de l'information, communiquer avec les services de la structure et les partenairesextérieurs, transmettre les informations pratiques sur les procédures administratives, financières et/ou comptables, sur l'évolution de la législation et de ses conséquences,</p><p>·&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Classer et archiver les justificatifs des opérations financières et/ou comptables</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="block-cards">
<h2 class="fr-mb-5w">Éléments de candidature</h2>
<div class="fr-callout">
<h3 class="fr-callout__title">
			Personnes à contacter		</h3>
<div class="fr-callout__text">
			Catherine.dastier@inserm.fr 		</div>
</div> </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

    <item>
      <title>Fonio: Founding Product Engineer (m/w/d)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
</p>

<h2><strong>Über fonio</strong></h2><p>In den letzten 12 Monaten haben wir Fonio zum führenden KI-Telefonanbieter im DACH-Raum aufgebaut. Jetzt skalieren wir nach ganz Europa und revolutionieren, wie KMUs miteinander kommunizieren.</p><p>Als <strong>Founding Product Engineer</strong> übernimmst du End-to-End Ownership: von der Idee über den Prototyp bis hin zum fertigen Feature, das von tausenden Unternehmen europaweit genutzt wird.</p><p></p><h2><strong>Dein Profil: Product Engineer durch und durch</strong></h2><p>Product Engineers bei fonio haben volle Onwership über den value, den sie für unsere Kunden stiften. Es gibt bei uns niemanden, der dir sagt was Du bauen sollst - das definierst Du selbst. Bei fonio bist Du “Product Engineer”, nicht nur “Software Developer”.</p><ul><li><p><strong>Product Mindset:</strong> Du übernimmst Verantwortung, die über das bloße Schreiben von Code hinausgeht. Du denkst mit und misst Deinen Erfolg an dem Mehrwert, den Deine Software für unsere Kunden stiftet.</p></li><li><p><strong>Customer Focus:</strong> Du suchst den engen Austausch mit Kunden und bist in der Lage, daraus aussagekräftige Eindrücke zu gewinnen.</p></li><li><p><strong>Tech Stack:</strong> Du bist Full Stack Software Developer mit relevanter Erfahrung in der Arbeit mit Node.js, Typescript, NestJS und React. Die Arbeit mit der Integration von LLMs ist von großem Vorteil.</p></li><li><p><strong>Experimentierfreudigkeit:</strong> Du suchst zu allererst immer nach handfester Validierung bei geringstem Aufwand bevor Du skalierbare Software baust und wirst dabei sehr kreativ.</p></li><li><p><strong>Pragmatismus:</strong> Du siehst Software als ein Tool, nicht als Selbstzweck. Deine Erfahrung erlaubt es Dir, fundiert Entscheidungen dazu zu treffen, wie viel Aufwand dein Code an welcher Stelle verdient.</p></li><li><p><strong>Deutsch auf Muttersprache Niveau:</strong> Wir bauen einen KI Telefonassistenten und haben aktuell einen starken Fokus auf den deutsch-sprachigen Markt - ein gutes Verständnis für die Nuancen der Deutschen Sprache ist dabei unerlässlich.</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>Deine Aufgaben</strong></h2><ul><li><p><strong>Konstanter Research:</strong> Du stehst im engen Austausch mit Kunden, Partnern und unserem Sales Team um ein tiefes Verständnis davon zu haben, welche Pain Points unsere Kunden haben und wie wir Mehrwert für sie schaffen können.</p></li><li><p><strong>Product Discovery:</strong> Du entwickelst Hypothesen und testest diese schnell und effizient durch Experimente um fundierte Produktentscheidungen treffen zu können.</p></li><li><p><strong>Tracking &amp; Daten:</strong> Du findest oder erhebst alle Zahlen, die für Deinen Verantwortungsbereich relevant sind, selbst um stets in der Lage zu sein, datengetrieben zu argumentieren und fundierte Entscheidungen zu treffen.</p></li><li><p><strong>Software Development:</strong> Du baust Software end-to-end von ersten Architekturentscheidungen bis zum Release und zwar so, dass die den Zweck erfüllt, für den sie gebaut ist mit der richtigen Balance von Pragmatismus und Skalierbarkeit.</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>Was wir dir bieten</strong></h2><p>Wir haben bei fonio eine klare Philosophie, mit der wir die Firma und vor allem das Product Team aufbauen. Hier die wichtigsten Elemente:</p><ul><li><p><strong>Focus on Shipping:</strong> Bei uns verbringst Du keine Zeit in unnötigen “Alignment Meetings”, “Update Check Ins” oder sonstwas - wir schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem Du dich voll und ganz darauf konzentrieren kannst, durch Software Mehrwert für unsere Kunden zu stiften. Meetings reduzieren wir auf ein Minimum und priorisieren in der Regel asychrone Kommunikation per Slack, Voice Messages oder Loom.</p></li><li><p><strong>Radical Ownership:</strong> Wenn Du glaubst, dass uns ein Feature oder eine Initiative vorwärts bringt, musst Du nicht auf Freigaben warten oder um Erlaubnis bitten - wenn wir Dich an Bord holen dann tun wir das weil wir glauben, dass Du gute Entscheidungen treffen wirst und Dein Handwerk verstehst</p></li><li><p><strong>Remote First:</strong> Arbeite von wo immer Du willst solange Du einen relevanten Overlap mit dem Team in CET hast. Gleichzeitig haben wir aber auch ein schönes Office in Wien, das Dir immer offen steht.</p></li><li><p><strong>High Growth Environment:</strong> Wir haben Product Market Fit und wachsen extrem schnell - das bedeutet auch, dass Stagnation bei uns nicht existiert. Wenn Du schnell an Deinen Herausforderungen wachsen willst um das meiste aus Dir herauszuholen bist Du genau richtig bei uns!</p></li><li><p><strong>Kompetitive Vergütung:</strong> Wir bauen ganz bewusst ein kleines Team mit viel Verantwortung und Erwartungen an jeden einzelnen. im Gegenzug zahlen wir ein durchaus wettbewerbsfähiges Gehalt und großzügige Equity Packages.</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>Unser Bewerbungsprozess</strong></h2><ol><li><p><strong>Screening Call</strong> – 20 Minuten Kennenlernen</p></li><li><p><strong>Hiring Manager Interview</strong> - 30 Minuten Kennenlernen mit unseren Co-Founder und CTO Matthias</p></li><li><p><strong>Technical Interview</strong> – 60–90 Minuten inkl. Coding Challenge</p></li><li><p><strong>Culture Fit Interview</strong> – 60 Minuten zu Arbeitsweise &amp; Erwartungen</p></li></ol>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fonio-founding-product-engineer-m-w-d">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fonio-founding-product-engineer-m-w-d</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Ssc Hr Solutions: Architect Concept Design Lead - Remote Job</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Design</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cairo, Cairo Governorate, Egypt
</p>

<p>We are seeking a highly creative and visionary Concept Architect to join our team. The Concept Architect will be responsible for the initial design phase of projects, bringing ideas to life through innovative architectural concepts. This role involves translating client needs and ideas into compelling architectural visions, combining functionality with aesthetics to ensure designs are both practical and visually stunning. </p><p>Key Responsibilities: </p><ul> <li>Design Development: Create original and imaginative architectural concepts based on client briefs and project objectives.</li> <li>Concept Visualization: Develop sketches, 3D models, and renderings to communicate architectural ideas effectively.</li> <li>Research &amp; Innovation: Stay informed about new materials, technologies, and trends in architecture and design to push the boundaries of creative solutions.</li> <li>Feasibility Studies: Conduct preliminary assessments of the feasibility of design concepts, including structural, environmental, and budgetary considerations. </li> <li>Presentation: Prepare and present architectural concepts to clients, project stakeholders, and internal teams, ensuring designs meet both client expectations and regulatory standards. </li> <li>Revisions &amp; Adaptations: Make necessary revisions to the concept designs based on client feedback or changing project requirements. </li> <li>They should possess very good skills in producing 2D and 3D rendering softwares, besides using AI (artificial intelligence) for the same. </li> </ul> <p>Qualifications &amp; Skills: </p><ul> <li>Bachelor’s or master’s degree in architecture or related field. </li> <li>Experience: 10-15 years of experience in concept design or architectural design. </li> <li>Skills: o Proficiency in design software such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, Rhino, and Adobe Creative Suite. o Strong understanding of architectural styles, materials, and trends. </li> <li>Ability to translate abstract ideas into tangible, visually appealing designs. </li> <li>Excellent communication and presentation skills. </li> <li>Strong problem-solving skills with attention to detail. </li> <li>Portfolio: A strong design portfolio showcasing innovative architectural concepts. </li> </ul>

      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Analytics, CRM, Digital Marketing, Email Marketing and Automation, Google Analytics, Inbound Marketing, Influencer Marketing, CRM Systems, Analytics Tools, and CRM Integration</skills>
      <category>Front-End Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Fully Remote - US
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://ahutech.com">http://ahutech.com</a>
</p>

<div class="job-description-container">
<div>
<div class="badge" title="This company contacts applicants fast, usually within 24 hours.">
<i class="fa fa-clock-o"></i>
<span>Replies within 24 hours</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="trix-content">
<div>About the Role:<br><br>
</div><div>We are looking for a results-driven Manager – Business Development to accelerate<br><br>
</div><div>Software Finder’s SaaS revenue growth in the US market. This role is ideal for a high-<br><br>
</div><div>performing individual contributor who thrives on closing deals, building strong client<br><br>
</div><div>relationships, and consistently exceeding targets.<br><br>
</div><div>You will own the full sales cycle—from prospecting to closing—while collaborating closely<br><br>
</div><div>with marketing, product, and customer success teams to deliver long-term customer<br><br>
</div><div>value. This role requires strong SaaS sales expertise, consultative selling skills, and the<br><br>
</div><div>ability to operate in a fast-scaling, performance-focused environment.<br><br>
</div><div>Key Responsibilities<br><br>
</div><div>Revenue &amp; Pipeline Growth<br><br>
</div><div>* Drive new business acquisition across the US SaaS market.<br><br>
</div><div>* Manage the full sales cycle: prospecting, discovery, demos, negotiation, and<br><br>
</div><div>closing.<br><br>
</div><div>* Consistently achieve and exceed monthly, quarterly, and annual revenue targets.<br><br>
</div><div>* Maintain a strong, predictable pipeline of qualified opportunities.<br><br>
</div><div>Client Engagement<br><br>
</div><div>* Build trusted relationships with decision-makers and senior stakeholders.<br><br>
</div><div>* Understand client pain points and position solutions through consultative selling.<br><br>
</div><div>* Lead product demonstrations and tailored proposals.<br><br>
</div><div>Strategy &amp; Market Execution<br><br>
</div><div>* Execute go-to-market strategies within assigned segments or territories.<br><br>
</div><div>* Identify emerging opportunities and contribute insights on market trends.<br><br>
</div><div>* Collaborate with marketing on outbound campaigns and lead generation initiatives.<br><br>
</div><div>Cross-Functional Collaboration<br><br>
</div><div>* Partner with Customer Success to ensure smooth onboarding and retention.<br><br>
</div><div>* Provide customer feedback to Product teams to improve offerings.<br><br>
</div><div>* Work closely with Sales leadership on forecasting and performance planning.<br><br>
</div><div>Sales Operations<br><br>
</div><div>* Maintain accurate CRM records and pipeline hygiene.<br><br>
</div><div>* Deliver reliable forecasts and sales reports.<br><br>
</div><div>* Use data and metrics to optimize conversion and deal velocity.<br><br>
</div><div>Qualifications<br><br>
</div><div>* 5+ years of SaaS sales experience in the US market.<br><br>
</div><div>* Proven track record of exceeding B2B sales quotas.<br><br>
</div><div>* Strong experience managing full-cycle SaaS sales.<br><br>
</div><div>* Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.<br><br>
</div><div>* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.<br><br>
</div><div>* Proficiency in CRM platforms (Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar).<br><br>
</div><div>* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or related field preferred.<br><br>
</div><div>&nbsp;</div>
</div>
<p>This is a remote position.</p>
<div class="job-compensation">
          Compensation: $100,000.00 per year
        </div>
<br><br><br> <div class="account_description">
<h1>About Us</h1> <div><strong>AHU Technologies INC. </strong>is an IT consulting and permanent staffing firm that meets and exceeds the evolving IT service needs of leading corporations within the United States. We have been providing IT solutions to customers from different industry sectors, helping them control costs and release internal resources to focus on strategic issues.&nbsp;<br><br></div> <div><strong>AHU Technologies INC.</strong> was co-founded by visionary young techno-commercial entrepreneurs who remain as our principal consultants. Maintaining working relationships with a cadre of other highly skilled independent consultants, we have a growing number of resources available for development projects. We are currently working on Various projects such as media entertainment, ERP Solutions, data warehousing, Web Applications, Telecommunications and medical to our clients all over the world.<br><br></div>
</div>
<br></div>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - Australia
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://gensler.com">http://gensler.com</a>
</p>

<div><p></p><p></p><p><b>Your Role</b></p><p>You will direct multidisciplinary design teams and specialist consultants on the industry's most influential projects. From world-class stadiums to immersive live entertainment venues, you will oversee the intersection of complex architecture and the electric energy of a live crowd.</p><p></p><p>As a Senior Design Manager at Gensler, you will lead the delivery of sports and entertainment projects, working hands‑on across all project phases from concept through completion. You act as the central point of coordination between clients and multidisciplinary teams, helping shape project strategy while maintaining momentum, quality, and alignment with client objectives.</p><p></p><p>Operating with a high degree of autonomy, you are responsible for overall project execution, including managing client relationships, coordinating consultants, contractors, and authorities, and ensuring successful outcomes. As the primary client contact, you drive communication, mentor junior team members, and uphold Gensler’s design excellence and standards throughout the life of each project.</p><p></p><p>This position will be based in Melbourne.</p><p></p><p><b>What You Will Do</b></p><ul><li>Lead design and project management, ensuing alignment with client goals and firm standards.</li><li>Drive the project delivery during all phases of the project ensuring milestones and deliverables are met</li><li>Develop and maintain project schedules, budgets, and work plans to guide successful delivery</li><li>Lead relationships with the&nbsp;client, contractor, agencies, as well as engineering and specialty consultants</li><li>Prepare and review proposals, contracts, and consultant agreements to establish clear scope and expectations.</li><li>Track internal project financial metrics and coordinate with the accounting team on invoicing</li><li>Participate in marketing and business development including, proposal development, and project interviews</li><li>Manage mid-size to large project teams, assign and monitor completion of tasks</li><li>Support mentorship of junior staff</li><li>Oversee the coordination and document preparation for the project and provide quality assurance via review of project documentation</li></ul><p></p><p><b>Your Qualifications</b></p><ul><li>12+&nbsp;years of project/design management experience in an architecture firm</li><li>Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Architecture</li><li>Extensive experience in all phases of architectural projects, preferrably for sport stadium, training facilities, and entertainment venues</li><li>Ability to provide excellent client service and assure project profitability</li><li>Desire to lead teams and to mentor junior staff</li><li>High level of architecture competence and expertise in mixed-use developments</li><li>High level of knowledge of state and local building codes, including accessibility</li><li>Sustainable design experience, with a preference for hands-on LEED project participation and accreditation</li><li>Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to distill complex design concepts into compelling narratives for client presentations, consultant coordination, and internal team alignment</li><li>Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook, Teams, and Project), AutoCAD and/or Revit</li></ul><p></p><p><b>Life at Gensler</b></p><p>As a people-first organization, we are as committed to enjoying life as we are to delivering best-in-class design. From internal design competitions to research grants to “Well-being Week,” our offices reflect our people’s diverse interests.</p><p></p><p>We encourage every person at Gensler to lead a healthy and balanced life. We offer profit sharing and twice annual bonus opportunities.</p><p></p><p>As part of the firm’s commitment to licensure and professional development, Gensler offers reimbursement for certain professional licenses and associated renewals and exam fees. In addition, we reimburse tuition for certain eligible programs or classes. We view our professional development programs as strategic investments in our future.</p><p></p><p></p></div>

      <title>CI&T: [Job 29629] Program Manager Sr-  Redesign de Superapp</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Design</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5432/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Brazil
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://ciandt.com">http://ciandt.com</a>
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Somos especialistas em <b>transformação tecnológica</b>, unindo expertise humana à IA para criar soluções tech escaláveis. Com mais de 8,000 CI&amp;Ters ao redor do mundo, já formamos parcerias com mais de 1,000 clientes durante nossos 30 anos de história. Inteligência Artificial é nossa realidade.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span><b>Importante</b>: se você reside na Região Metropolitana de Campinas, sua presença nos escritórios da cidade será obrigatória, conforme a política de frequencia vigente.</span></div><div><br></div><div>
<p>Sobre o Programa<br>Estamos redesenhando a superapp de um cliente do zero: nova arquitetura de produto, nova experiência do usuário e uma nova proposta de valor integrada. Trata-se de um programa estratégico de larga escala, com múltiplas squads trabalhando em paralelo e alta visibilidade executiva.</p>
<p>O que você vai fazer</p>
<p>Você será o elo entre a estratégia do programa e a execução das squads. Seu papel é garantir que o todo faça sentido — que cada time saiba para onde está indo, o que precisa entregar e como sua peça se encaixa no grande redesign.</p>
<p>Na prática, isso significa:</p>
<p>- Liderar o programa end-to-end: estruturar e manter o roadmap integrado do redesign, identificando dependências, riscos e bloqueios entre squads antes que se tornem problemas.<br>- Definir e refinar milestones estratégicos: trabalhar com liderança de produto, tech e negócio para traduzir a visão do programa em objetivos claros, priorizados e alcançáveis para cada squad.<br>- Garantir alinhamento contínuo entre times: facilitar rituais de sincronização entre squads, promover visibilidade cruzada e atuar como árbitro de prioridades quando houver conflitos de agenda ou escopo.<br>- Fazer a ponte com a liderança executiva: produzir reports executivos de alta qualidade — claros, orientados a decisão e com o nível certo de detalhe para cada audiência.<br>- Remover impedimentos: atuar de forma proativa para destravar o que estiver atrasando as squads, seja um processo, uma dependência técnica ou uma decisão em aberto.</p>
<p>O que esperamos de você</p>
<p>- Experiência em gestão de programas ou portfólios de produto em ambientes digitais complexos, preferencialmente com múltiplas squads em paralelo.<br>- Capacidade de transitar com naturalidade entre o estratégico e o operacional — de uma conversa de diretoria a um refinamento de backlog.<br>- Habilidade para estruturar ambiguidade: transformar diretrizes amplas em objetivos concretos e critérios de sucesso mensuráveis.<br>- Forte comunicação, tanto em apresentações quanto em documentos escritos.<br>- Background em produto digital, fintechs, insurtechs ou empresas de tecnologia de grande porte é valorizado.</p>
<p>Localização<br>São Paulo – SP (modelo híbrido)</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<div>MidSenior</div>
<div>LI-RW1</div>
</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><span><b>Nossos benefícios:</b></span></div><div><br></div><div><span>- Plano de saúde e odontológico;</span></div><div><span>- Vale alimentação e refeição;</span></div><div><span>- Auxílio-creche;</span></div><div><span>- Licença parental estendida;</span></div><div><span>- Parceria com academias e profissionais de saúde e bem-estar via Wellhub (Gympass)&nbsp; TotalPass;</span></div><div><span>- Participação nos Lucros e Resultados (PLR);</span></div><div><span>- Seguro de Vida;</span></div><div><span>- Plataforma de aprendizagem contínua (CI&amp;T University);</span></div><div><span>- Clube de descontos;</span></div><div><span>- Plataforma online gratuita dedicada à promoção da saúde física, mental e bem-estar;</span></div><div><span>- Curso gestante e parentalidade responsável;</span></div><div><span>- Parceria com plataformas de cursos online;</span></div><div><span>- Plataforma para aprendizagem de idiomas;</span></div><div><span>- E muitos outros</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Mais detalhes sobre os nossos benefícios aqui: </span><a href="https://ciandt.com/br/pt-br/carreiras"><span>https://ciandt.com/br/pt-br/carreiras</span></a></div><div><br></div><div><span>Na CI&amp;T, a inclusão começa no primeiro contato. <p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Argentina
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://huzzle.app">http://huzzle.app</a>
</p>

<strong>Description</strong><br><h3>About Huzzle</h3><p>At Huzzle, we connect high-performing B2B sales professionals with global companies across the UK, US, Canada, Europe, and Australia. Our clients include startups, digital agencies, and tech platforms in industries like SaaS, MarTech, FinTech, and EdTech. We match top sales talent to full-time remote roles where they’re hired directly into client teams and provided ongoing support by Huzzle.</p><p></p><p><strong>Role Type: Part-time to start (20 hours)</strong></p><p><strong>Engagement: Independent Contractor </strong></p><p></p><h3><strong>About the Company</strong></h3><p>Our client is a fast-growing digital marketing agency based in the U.S., specializing in building high-performing websites and marketing campaigns for Home Services and Healthcare companies. Their mission is simple: create visually compelling websites that drive measurable business results.</p><p></p><h3><strong>Job Summary</strong></h3><p>We are hiring an experienced <strong>Webflow Designer</strong> with strong expertise in <strong>Figma, UX/UI design, and Webflow development</strong>. This is a hands-on role where you will design and build conversion-focused websites from scratch, create marketing assets, and develop scalable design systems.</p><p>This role is ideal for someone who combines <strong>creative design thinking with technical Webflow execution</strong>, and thrives in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.</p><p></p><h3>Key Responsibilities</h3><ul><li>Design and build fully responsive websites from scratch using <strong>Webflow </strong></li><li> Create high-fidelity <strong>wireframes, prototypes, and UI designs in Figma </strong></li><li> Develop landing pages, ad creatives, email newsletters, and social media graphics </li><li> Build and maintain scalable <strong>UX design systems</strong> (component libraries, style guides, brand systems) </li><li> Collaborate with account managers to understand client goals and deliver projects on time </li><li> Implement and maintain <strong>Client-First or Relume</strong> naming conventions in <strong>Webflow </strong></li><li> Ensure all designs meet high standards for responsiveness, usability, and conversion performance</li></ul><br><br><strong>Requirements</strong><br><ul><li>3+ years of experience in <strong>Webflow design and development</strong> </li><li>Advanced proficiency in <strong>Figma</strong> (wireframing, prototyping, design systems) </li><li>Strong expertise in <strong>Webflow CMS, animations, and responsive design</strong> </li><li>Proven experience building <strong>scalable design systems</strong> (component libraries, style guides, brand systems) </li><li>Solid understanding of <strong>design fundamentals</strong> (typography, layout, spacing, color theory, visual hierarchy) </li><li>Experience creating <strong>digital marketing assets</strong> (ads, emails, social graphics) </li><li>Strong English communication skills (written and verbal) </li><li>Ability to work <strong>U.S. Central Time</strong></li></ul><p></p><h3><strong>Nice-to-Haves</strong></h3><ul><li>Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS </li><li>Advanced Webflow animations and interactions </li><li>CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) or A/B testing experience </li><li>Experience working with Home Services or Healthcare brands</li></ul><br><br><strong>Benefits</strong><br><p>💰 Competitive monthly salary based on experience starting from $700 USD - $2000</p><p>🌎 <strong>Fully Remote:</strong> Work from anywhere with flexible hours and US overlap</p><p>🚀 Work with a fast-growing, design-forward travel-tech company</p><p>🧪 Be part of an agile team using modern design tooling and weekly sprint cycles</p><p>🤝 Peer Community: Connect with high-performing sales professionals in our network</p><p>🧭 Ongoing Support: Receive guidance from Huzzle before and after placement</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/huzzle-senior-webflow-designer-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/huzzle-senior-webflow-designer-developer</a></p>

  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Nationwide
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://powerdesigninc.us">http://powerdesigninc.us</a>
</p>

<div><h1>about the position…</h1><p>Do you love working with your hands? Are you interested in construction and in becoming an electrician? Then the electrical apprentice position could be perfect for you! Electrical apprentices are able to earn a paycheck while learning the trade through firsthand experience. This position has a clear career path to becoming an electrician with the potential and opportunity to become a manager of a team and larger scope of work.</p><p></p><h1>position details/responsibilities…</h1><ul><li>The electrical apprentice is partnered with a licensed journeyman electrician and has on-the-job training (OJT) to become an electrician.</li><li>You’ll help perform electrical installations of a multifamily and commercial nature.</li><li>Learn and perform all scopes of large-scale projects, from distribution to rough in, trim and deck work.</li><li>Participate in official apprenticeship program and attend classes as required.</li><li>The pay range for this role is: $20.00 - $40.00 dollars an hour.</li></ul><p></p><h1>here’s what we’re looking for…</h1><ul><li>OSHA 30 certification preferred.</li><li>Motivated individuals who want to learn the electrical trade and have a high school diploma or GED as well as reliable transportation.</li><li>Successfully register, enroll and participate in an electrical apprenticeship program (and remain in good standing) until program is completed.</li><li>Able to physically perform the essential functions of the job.</li><li>Willing to learn electrical codes and other construction safety requirements.</li><li>Demonstrate and uphold all of Power Design’s core values, which include integrity, accountability, teamwork, innovation and growth.</li></ul><p></p><p><b>Click here to learn more about PDI's Electrical Apprenticeship Program: </b></p><p><a href="http://www.powerdesigninc.us/careers/apprenticeship"><b>Power Design's Apprenticeship</b></a></p><p></p><p>#LI-LD1</p><p>&nbsp;&nbsp;</p><h1></h1><p><span>At Power Design, we are committed to providing an environment of mutual respect where equal employment opportunities are available to all applicants and teammates without regard to race, color, religion, sex, pregnancy, national origin, age, physical and mental disability, marital status, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, genetic information, military and veteran status, and any other characteristic protected by applicable law. Power Design believes that diversity and inclusion among our teammates is paramount to our success as a national company, and we seek to recruit, develop and retain the most talented people from a diverse candidate pool nationwide.</span></p><p></p><p></p><p><span>Individual compensation is determined by skills, qualifications, experience, and location. </span></p><p></p><p></p><p><span><span>We offer a comprehensive benefits package, including health, dental, and vision insurance, 401(k) matching, generous paid time off, including holidays, and more.</span></span></p></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/power-design-electrical-apprentice">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/power-design-electrical-apprentice</a></p>

      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0017/3233/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Animalz: Senior Content Marketer, SEO</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇦🇹 Austria, 🇧🇪 Belgium, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇳🇬 Nigeria, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇺🇸 United States of America, and 🇿🇦 South Africa</country>
      <state>New York</state>
      <skills>Search Engine Optimization (SEO), AI Content Creation, Content Writing, Content Creation,  SEO, Content Strategy, and Content Planning</skills>
      <category>Sales and Marketing</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0017/3233/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Diego, California
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://animalz.co">https://animalz.co</a>
</p>

<p>We're looking for a Senior Content Marketer to join our SEO team, writing and optimizing content for a portfolio of B2B technology customers. This is a writing-first role — the majority of your time will be spent producing high-quality SEO content yourself — but you'll also bring strategic depth: diagnosing why content isn't performing, identifying opportunities in the competitive landscape, and translating data into action.</p>
<p>You'll work closely with a Head of Content on strategy direction while owning execution with a high degree of independence. You'll manage a small number of accounts end-to-end, occasionally oversee freelance writers, and lead performance reporting for your customers.</p>
<h2>What You'll Do</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Write gold-standard, hand-crafted content: flagship blogs, guides, and landing pages that demand deep research, original thinking, and editorial craft, aligned with search intent, customer strategy, and our highest quality standards</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Edit and elevate AI-generated content from our AI-assisted workflows to publication quality, and help teammates and freelancers do the same through clear feedback and example</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Partner with our AI implementation team to shape and improve AI content workflows, contributing editorial input, feedback, and real-world testing (you don't need to build the systems, but you help make them better)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Contribute to AEO work—including prompt tracking, citation monitoring, and AEO audits—to improve how customer content surfaces and gets cited across AI-powered search</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Diagnose content performance gaps using technical SEO analysis, competitive research, and content quality assessments, and recommend clear, prioritized improvements</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Refresh and optimize existing content to improve rankings, engagement, and visibility across both traditional search and AI-powered discovery tools</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Stay current on how AI search tools (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, AI Overviews) surface and cite content, and factor this into content recommendations</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Own content execution for 3–4 customer accounts, managing quality, calendars, and deadlines with increasing independence</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Occasionally manage freelance writers on your accounts, providing clear briefs, feedback, and quality oversight</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Lead monthly performance reports for your customers, communicating results, insights, and strategic recommendations</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Join customer calls and build trusted relationships through clear communication and demonstrated expertise</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Collaborate with design on visuals and graphics that support your content deliverables</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Contribute to team knowledge-sharing and internal initiatives, including process improvements</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>What We're Looking For</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>4–6 years of experience in content marketing, preferably in B2B SaaS or an agency setting</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Exceptional writing ability: You produce publication-ready SEO content with minimal revision, writing clearly and persuasively across formats while adapting to different brand voices</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Deep SEO knowledge: You're fluent in keyword research, on-page optimization, content audits, and competitive analysis — and you know how to diagnose why a piece isn't ranking and what to do about it</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Emerging AEO fluency: You understand how AI-driven discovery tools are changing content visibility and are actively building hands-on skills in this space — prompt tracking, citation monitoring, AEO audits, and optimizing for AI Overviews</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Comfort working with AI content workflows: You can edit and elevate AI-generated content to publication quality, and you're eager to give input that helps shape and improve those workflows over time</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Analytical mindset: You interpret performance data (traffic, rankings, engagement) and use it to inform content decisions, not just report on them</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Familiarity with content and analytics tools such as GA4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, Clearscope, or equivalents</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>AI fluency: You use AI tools to support your workflow responsibly and efficiently, and stay current on emerging best practices</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Technical curiosity: You genuinely enjoy learning how software products work so you can write about them with authority</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Content operations: You manage multiple accounts and contributors while maintaining quality and meeting deadlines</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong communication and remote collaboration skills; you build trust with customers through transparency and insight</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Coachability and ownership: You take initiative, adapt when priorities shift, and are always looking to sharpen your craft</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>Our Values</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Value Over Vanity: We measure success in customer impact, not surface-level praise.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Two Steps Ahead: We're proactive and strategic, solving problems before they become blockers.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Power Source, Not Power Trip: We lead through service, energizing teammates and customers.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Pursue Mastery: We're always learning, evolving, and testing new approaches.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Left Brain, Right Brain, Robot Brain: Our best work blends creativity, analysis, and smart use of AI.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>In the Arena: We experiment boldly and stay immersed in our customers' industries.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>Your First 90 Days</h2>
<p><strong>Days 1–30: Learn &amp; Integrate</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Complete onboarding and master our tools, processes, and editorial standards</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Deep dive into your assigned customer accounts</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Create your first content deliverables with guidance from your Head of Content</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Build relationships with your team and customers</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p><strong>Days 31–60: Execute &amp; Own</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Take ownership of 2–3 customer accounts with increasing independence</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Begin occasionally managing freelance writers and content calendars</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Lead your first performance reports with support</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Contribute to team meetings and internal initiatives</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p><strong>Days 61–90: Drive Impact</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Own content execution and reporting for 3–4 customer accounts</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Lead strategy refinements based on SEO data and customer feedback</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Demonstrate measurable improvements in content performance</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Share expertise and contribute to team improvement</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>Working Arrangements</h2>
<p><strong>Location</strong>: Fully remote (AMERICAS or EMEA)<br><strong>Timezone Requirements:</strong> At least 4 hours of overlap with US timezones (EST/PST)</p>
<h2>Compensation &amp; Benefits</h2>
<p>Salary Range: $70,000 – $85,000 USD annually</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Unlimited PTO policy</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Flexible working schedule</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Technology stipend</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Learning stipend</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Health &amp; wellness stipend</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Team lunch stipend</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Health &amp; vision insurance (US only)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>401(k) retirement plan (US only)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2>Diversity, Equity &amp; Inclusion</h2>
<p>At Animalz, we believe diverse perspectives make us stronger. We're committed to building an inclusive workplace where people of all backgrounds, experiences, and identities can thrive. We particularly encourage applications from historically underrepresented groups in tech and marketing.</p>
<h2>Equal Opportunity</h2>
<p>Animalz is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/animalz-senior-content-marketer-seo">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/animalz-senior-content-marketer-seo</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/5429/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Level: Support Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>North Carolina</state>
      <skills>Documentation, Technical Support, Technical Writing, Windows/Linux/MacOS, and Networking</skills>
      <category>Customer Support</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5429/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Asheville, NC
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://level.io">https://level.io</a>
</p>

<h1 class="h1-smaller margin-bottom-1-5rem"><span class="word"><span class="char">S</span><span class="char">u</span><span class="char">p</span><span class="char">p</span><span class="char">o</span><span class="char">r</span><span class="char">t</span></span>&nbsp;<span class="word"><span class="char">E</span><span class="char">n</span><span class="char">g</span><span class="char">i</span><span class="char">n</span><span class="char">e</span><span class="char">e</span><span class="char">r</span></span></h1>
<p><span class="word">We're building the future of RMM, and the people who deploy it for our customers are mission critical. This is not a traditional support role. You'll close hard tickets, onboard customers running thousands of endpoints, build automations that ship to everyone, and be the IT professional MSP owners trust on sight. If you want real ownership, real impact, and zero bureaucracy, you'll feel at home here.</span></p>
<div>
<h2 class="h3 margin-bottom-1-25rem"><strong>The opportunity</strong></h2>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<p class="paragraph-l margin-bottom-2rem">We're looking for a seasoned IT professional with 10+ years of real-world MSP or enterprise experience who can do all of this in a single week: close hard technical tickets, run a deep onboarding for a customer managing 1,000+ endpoints, build a reusable automation, record a platform how-to video, and flag a product bug to engineering with enough detail to reproduce it.<br><br>When sales closes a new customer, we want to say: "We're assigning you a dedicated IT professional with years of real-world experience who will learn your environment and personally help you deploy Level across your infrastructure." That's the bar. You're the kind of person MSP owners trust immediately.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<h2 class="h3 margin-bottom-1-25rem">What you'll own</h2>
<p class="paragraph-l margin-bottom-1rem"><strong>Tickets and triage</strong></p>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li>Own the full inbound support queue, open to close. Respond to customer questions with clarity, speed, and empathy.</li>
<li>Diagnose whether an issue is a Level bug or a customer-side environment problem, and route it accordingly.</li>
<li>QA features before they reach production, catching issues before customers do.</li>
<li>Write up findings for engineering with enough detail to reproduce and fix.</li>
</ul>
</div>
<p class="paragraph-l margin-bottom-1rem"><strong>Customer onboarding</strong></p>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li>Meet newly signed customers to understand their infrastructure, team, and current workflows.</li>
<li>Learn their existing RMM setup and map it to how Level works.</li>
<li>Write custom automations tailored to each customer's environment as part of onboarding.</li>
<li>Train their team, from basics to advanced, until they're fully independent.</li>
<li>Own the post-sale relationship through onboarding and set customers up for the long term.</li>
<li>Think at scale: onboarding 1,000+ endpoint environments takes planning, staging, and precision.</li>
</ul>
</div>
<p class="paragraph-l margin-bottom-1rem"><strong>Live support sessions</strong></p>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li>Join scheduled video sessions, connect to the customer's Level account, and resolve issues live.</li>
<li>Be the face of Level technical support for customers who need more than a ticket reply.</li>
</ul>
</div>
<p class="paragraph-l margin-bottom-1rem"><strong>Automations and content</strong></p>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li>Build reusable automations and contribute them to Level's library for every customer to use.</li>
<li>Record how-to videos for customers and our YouTube channel. Solid on-camera skills are a must.</li>
<li>Keep documentation accurate as the platform evolves.</li>
<li>Take on ad hoc projects: cleaning up the automation library, standardizing naming, auditing help content.</li>
<li>Help support our SOC 2 and ISO efforts. No prior experience needed, we'll train you.</li>
<li>Run community outreach across Discord and other channels. Keep members engaged and represent Level well.</li>
<li>Host regular office hours and product demos.</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<h2 class="h3 margin-bottom-1-25rem">What you'll need</h2>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li>10+ years hands-on as an MSP technician or internal IT pro who has run real environments at scale.</li>
<li>Deep experience with at least one major RMM platform, so you can speak the language of customers migrating to Level.</li>
<li>Strong Windows, macOS, and Linux skills. All three are required.</li>
<li>Strong scripting in PowerShell and Bash.</li>
<li>Experience managing 500+ endpoints; 1,000+ preferred.</li>
<li>Comfortable running customer-facing sessions: onboarding calls, training, live troubleshooting.</li>
<li>You think like a technician and a consultant, and you understand how IT departments actually operate.</li>
<li>Strong communication, written, verbal, and on camera. You'll write docs, record YouTube videos, host office hours, and represent Level to paying customers.</li>
<li>Self-directed and organized. You manage your own workload across competing priorities without a manager hovering.</li>
<li>Sharp diagnostic instincts. You know the difference between a platform bug and a misconfigured firewall.</li>
<li>You use AI tools heavily (Claude, ChatGPT, or whatever works) and know when the output is wrong and how to fix it.</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<h2 class="h3 margin-bottom-1-25rem">Nice to have</h2>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li>QA or software testing experience in a technical support context.</li>
<li>A background creating how-to video content or product documentation.</li>
<li>Familiarity with Level specifically.</li>
<li>Knowledge of compliance frameworks (SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO 27001) relevant to MSP customers.</li>
<li>Familiarity with endpoint security tools (SentinelOne, CrowdStrike, and similar).</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<h2 class="h3 margin-bottom-1-25rem">Why you might want this</h2>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li>Your work ships to everyone. The automations you build and the bugs your QA catches reach every Level customer.</li>
<li>Enormous ownership. You carry the customer relationship from the first onboarding call through full independence.</li>
<li>Direct access to founders. No layers, no bureaucracy.</li>
<li>We're profitable and growing. This isn't a company burning runway hoping for a miracle.</li>
<li>Room to grow as the company does.</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<h2 class="h3 margin-bottom-1-25rem">Why you might not</h2>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li>We're a small team. There's no tier 1 to descalate to and no one to hand the hard tickets to.</li>
<li>You'll context-switch constantly. You might close a gnarly ticket in the morning, run a 1,000-endpoint onboarding call after lunch, and record a tutorial before you log off.</li>
<li>You're customer-facing and on camera. If live training and YouTube videos aren't your thing, this isn't the role.</li>
<li>We move fast and expect you to keep up.</li>
<li>We rely on async communication. You need to write clearly and work without waiting to be told what's next.</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<h2 class="h3 margin-bottom-1-25rem">Details</h2>
<div class="margin-bottom-2rem">
<ul class="legal-list">
<li><strong>Hourly Rate:</strong>&nbsp;$30–40 per hour, depending on experience</li>
<li><strong>Location:</strong>&nbsp;Fully remote, work from anywhere.</li>
<li><strong>Schedule:</strong>&nbsp;Full-time (40 hours/week)</li>
<li><em>Occasional after-hours work may be required as needed to support customers.</em></li>
<li><strong>Apply:</strong>&nbsp;<a href="https://ask.level.io/r/supportengineer">https://ask.level.io/r/supportengineer</a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/level-support-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/level-support-engineer</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Persona Talent: Virtual Assistant</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Tennessee</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>All Other Remote</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5413/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Miami, Florida, USA
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.personatalent.com">https://www.personatalent.com</a>
</p>

<h2>Role Summary</h2>
<p>We are hiring Virtual Assistants to help our clients run and grow their businesses. The Virtual Assistant role is flexible and varied, often blending business support with light personal/executive support across multiple workstreams. Ideal for early-career candidates who are tech-fluent, adaptable, and ready to grow with a single client over time.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<h2>Key Responsibilities</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Draft, send, and triage business emails and routine communications</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Take video conferences; capture and distribute notes and action items</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Interface with clients, vendors, and external partners professionally</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Manage calendars and schedule meetings across time zones</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Conduct online research and assemble findings into clean spreadsheets</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Prepare basic reports, decks, and analyses</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Handle creative work as needed: light writing, formatting, simple media coordination</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Provide light personal and executive support (errands coordination, travel research, reminders)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Take on miscellaneous administrative tasks and special projects</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<h2>Required Qualifications</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Fully fluent in English</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Skilled in modern productivity apps and quick to learn new tools</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong written communication and detail orientation</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Ability to commit long-term and full-time</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Ability to work U.S. business hours (PT, CT, or ET)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>No prior work experience is required, but any relevant experience is an advantage</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<h2>Preferred Qualifications</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Associate's or Bachelor's degree in any field</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Prior virtual assistant or remote-support experience</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Comfortable with both business and light personal support tasks</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<h2>Tools &amp; Technologies</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Calendly, Notion, Asana, Slack, Zoom, Loom, basic CRM exposure (HubSpot, Salesforce)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<h2>Core Competencies</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Track record of success at work or in school</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Solves problems with minimal guidance</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Anticipates teammates' needs</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Hard worker with perseverance</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Curious and resourceful</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Professional</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<h2>What We Offer</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Best salaries in the industry</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Work from anywhere permanently</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Opportunities for growth and advancement</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A fast-paced and collaborative environment</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A warm, people-first company culture</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Get paid in your currency of choice</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Full benefits</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>This is a full-time, long-term role, dedicated exclusively to one of our clients. All roles at Persona are 100% work-from-anywhere.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/persona-talent-virtual-assistant">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/persona-talent-virtual-assistant</a></p>
</description>

      <title>sofatutor GmbH: CRO Specialist (all genders)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇦🇹 Austria, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇸🇪 Sweden, and 🇸🇰 Slovakia</country>
      <state>Berlin</state>
      <skills>A/B Testing and Figma</skills>
      <category>Design</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5423/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Berlin
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://jobs.sofatutor.com/">https://jobs.sofatutor.com/</a>
</p>

<div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 dzeKPx"><div><p>Design and run A/B tests that directly impact subscription growth for one of Europe's leading EdTech platforms – 1M+ users, real experiments, measurable results.</p><p><br></p><p>We’re looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist (gn)</strong>&nbsp;to join our Product Growth Team and help drive one of sofatutor’s most important goals: turning more parents into customers who trust us to support their children’s learning journey. In this role, your work will have a direct and measurable impact on the company’s success. By designing and running smart, strategic A/B tests, you’ll help increase user acquisition, activation, and retention across our subscription-based learning products. You’ll collaborate closely with designers, developers, data analysts, and senior leadership to uncover high-potential growth opportunities and turn insights into real results.</p><p><br>&nbsp;<strong>100% remote (EMEA)&nbsp;</strong>| ⏳&nbsp;<strong>32-40h/week</strong></p><p><br></p><h3>Your Tasks:</h3><ul><li><p><strong>Define and implement growth experiments across the funnel —</strong>&nbsp;from hypothesis to launch and evaluation.</p></li><li><p><strong>Maintain a clear pipeline of experiments</strong>&nbsp;based on impact, effort, and learning value.</p></li><li><p><strong>Collaborate closely with design, engineering</strong>, and key&nbsp;<strong>stakeholders</strong>&nbsp;to translate testing concepts into high-quality experiments.</p></li><li><p><strong>Leverage analytics, user research, competitor insights</strong>, and best practices to identify opportunities and build strong hypotheses.</p></li><li><p><strong>Share</strong>&nbsp;experiment&nbsp;<strong>results, insights, and learnings</strong>&nbsp;transparently with the team and stakeholders to drive alignment and continuous improvement.</p></li></ul></div></div><h2 class="sc-1npqnwg-4 sc-1npqnwg-5 sc-1uwf3m5-0 sc-1uwf3m5-1 bvUNBQ custom-css-style-job-requirements">What you bring to the table:</h2><div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 dzeKPx"><ul><li><p>A minimum of<strong>&nbsp;2 – 4+ years of experience</strong>&nbsp;in conversion rate optimization (CRO), website optimization, or growth-focused roles.</p></li><li><p>A&nbsp;<strong>strong track record</strong>&nbsp;of designing and executing experiments that resulted in measurable business outcomes (e.g., increased conversion rates, revenue uplift).</p></li><li><p>Experience working in&nbsp;<strong>high-velocity testing</strong>&nbsp;environments and a drive to continuously improve experimentation speed without sacrificing quality or learning value.</p></li><li><p><strong>Advanced analytical capabilities</strong>&nbsp;with hands-on experience interpreting quantitative data from platforms such as GA4, Amplitude, or Power BI.</p></li><li><p><strong>Strong conceptual thinking</strong>, with the ability to structure and prioritize experiments around strategic growth objectives.</p></li><li><p><strong>Proficiency in Figma or equivalent design tool</strong>&nbsp;is essential, with the ability to independently produce high-fidelity, multi-variant test concepts.</p></li><li><p>Excellent communication skills in English, with the&nbsp;<strong>ability to present insights and strategies clearly</strong>&nbsp;to stakeholders across functions and seniority levels.</p></li><li><p>Experience with A/B testing tools (e.g., Convert) and familiarity with complementary insight tools (e.g., Hotjar).</p></li><li><p>Preferred qualifications (not required): German language skills to better understand customer needs in DACH markets.</p></li></ul><h3>What we offer:</h3><ul><li><p>&nbsp;<strong>Flexible Work:</strong> Flexible hours, remote-first, up to 180 days/year from EU if not located in Germany</p></li><li><p>&nbsp;<strong>Team Events:</strong>&nbsp;Regular meetups – online and in Berlin.</p></li><li><p>&nbsp;<strong>Extra Time Off:</strong> 2 paid volunteering days + Dec 24 &amp; 31 off<br></p></li></ul><p>At sofatutor, we are committed to continuously developing an inclusive work environment that supports your growth - regardless of gender, marital status, sexual orientation, religious beliefs, age, disability, education, or ethnicity. We’d love for you to join us in shaping this together!</p></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sofatutor-gmbh-cro-specialist-all-genders">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sofatutor-gmbh-cro-specialist-all-genders</a></p>
</description>

      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5418/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://runwayml.com">http://runwayml.com</a>
</p>

<p>We are building AI to simulate the world through merging art and science.<br><br>We believe that world models are at the frontier of progress in artificial intelligence. Language models alone won’t solve the world’s hardest problems – robotics, disease, scientific discovery. Real progress requires models that experience the world and learn from their mistakes, the same way that humans do. And this kind of trial and error can be massively accelerated when done in simulation, rather than in the real world.<br><br>World models offer the most clear path to general-purpose simulation, changing how stories are told, how scientific progress is made and how the next frontiers of humanity are reached.</p><p></p><p>Our team consists of creative, open minded, caring and ambitious people who are determined to change the world. We aspire to continuously build impossible things and our ability to do so relies on building an incredible team. If you are driven to do the same, we'd love to hear from you.</p><p></p><h2>About the role</h2><p>*<em>Open to hiring remote across the US — we also have offices in NYC, San Francisco, and Seattle</em></p><p>We are hiring a B2B Marketing Director to drive enterprise pipeline growth through demand generation, targeted account engagement, and experiential marketing. This role will own programs and campaigns that generate qualified pipeline and accelerate opportunities, partnering closely with sales to ensure marketing efforts translate into measurable revenue impact.</p><p>This person should be equally comfortable building digital campaigns, producing high-quality events, and optimizing conversion from lead to opportunity. This is not just a campaign execution role - we are looking for someone who thinks in terms of pipeline and ARR contribution.</p><p></p><h2>What you’ll do</h2><ul><li><p><strong>Enterprise Demand Generation:</strong> Develop and execute multi-channel campaigns that drive qualified enterprise leads and meetings. You’ll partner with sales to identify priority accounts and build targeted programs that convert interest into pipeline. You’ll build landing pages, nurture sequences, and conversion paths tailored to B2B buyers.</p></li><li><p><strong>Experiential and Field Marketing:</strong> Plan and execute strategic conferences, hosted events, and executive experiences designed to generate meetings and accelerate deals. You’ll optimize our event strategy to maximize qualified lead capture and pipeline creation. You’ll track event ROI based on meetings booked, opportunities influenced, and revenue contribution.</p></li><li><p><strong>Account-Based Marketing:</strong> Collaborate closely with sales leadership to align on ICP, target accounts, and messaging. You’ll support outbound sales motions with targeted campaigns and events that move accounts through the funnel.</p></li><li><p><strong>Pipeline and Funnel Optimization:</strong> Analyze lead-to-opportunity conversion rates, identify drop-offs, and recommend improvements. Ensure proper campaign tracking and attribution across digital and field efforts. Maintain reporting on pipeline contribution and campaign effectiveness.</p></li></ul><p></p><h2>What you’ll need</h2><ul><li><p>5+ years of experience in B2B demand generation, field marketing, or enterprise marketing</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated experience generating measurable pipeline from campaigns and events</p></li><li><p>Strong understanding of B2B funnels, lead lifecycle, and sales alignment</p></li><li><p>Experience working closely with sales teams and revenue leadership</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with CRM and marketing automation tools</p></li><li><p>Highly organized with a bias toward action in a fast-moving environment</p></li></ul><p></p><p>Runway strives to recruit and retain exceptional talent from diverse backgrounds while ensuring pay equity for our team. Our salary ranges are based on competitive market rates for our size, stage and industry, and salary is just one part of the overall compensation package we provide.</p><p>There are many factors that go into salary determinations, including relevant experience, skill level and qualifications assessed during the interview process, and maintaining internal equity with peers on the team. The range shared below is a general expectation for the function as posted, but we are also open to considering candidates who may be more or less experienced than outlined in the job description. In this case, we will communicate any updates in the expected salary range.</p><p>Lastly, the provided range is the expected salary for candidates in the U.S. Outside of those regions, there may be a change in the range, which again, will be communicated to candidates.</p><p></p><h3><strong>Working at Runway</strong></h3><p><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kwmj4ato2kw&amp;ab_channel=Runway"><strong>Great things come from great teams.</strong></a><strong> We’d love to hear from you.</strong></p><p>We’re committed to creating a space where our employees can bring their full selves to work and have equal opportunity to succeed. So regardless of race, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, origin, ability, age, veteran status, if joining this mission speaks to you, we encourage you to apply.</p><p>More about Runway</p><ul><li><p><a href="https://runwayml.com/world-simulator.html">Universal World Simulator</a></p></li><li><p><a href="https://runwayml.com/research/introducing-runway-gwm-1">GWM-1</a></p></li><li><p><a href="https://runwayml.com/research/introducing-runway-gen-4.5">Gen-4.5</a></p></li><li><p><a href="https://runwayml.com/research/introducing-general-world-models">General World Models</a></p></li><li><p><a href="https://runwayml.com/research/introducing-runway-gwm-1#robotics-section">Robotics SDK</a></p></li><li><p><a href="https://runwayml.com/research/introducing-runway-gwm-1#avatars-section">Conversational Real-time Agents</a></p></li><li><p><a href="https://runwayml.com/studios">Runway Studios</a></p></li></ul><p>We're excited to be recognized as a best place to work: </p><p><a href="https://www.crainsnewyork.com/awards/best-places-work-2023">Crain's</a> | <a href="https://www.inhersight.com/companies/best/city/new-york-city-ny">InHerSight</a> | <a href="https://builtin.com/awards/new-york-city/2024/best-places-to-work">BuiltIn NYC</a> | <a href="https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2024">INC</a></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/runway-b2b-marketing-director">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/runway-b2b-marketing-director</a></p>
</description>
