      <title>CapsLock: Media Buyer (Google&Meta)</title>
      <region>Remote</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Paid Social Media Advertising, Project Management, Social Media Marketing, Social Media Management, Social Media Ads, Social Media Content, Display Advertising, Construction & Engineering Project Management, and Supply Chain & Logistic Project Management</skills>
      <category>Sales and Marketing</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Madrid, Remote, United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://capslock.global">http://capslock.global</a>
</p>

<p><strong>About Us</strong></p><p>CapsLock is a company that specializes in providing digital marketing services to businesses that are facing sales growth challenges. Our comprehensive services include sales consulting, data analytics, and recruitment support, all seamlessly integrated to ensure efficient and accelerated growth.</p><p>Our company was founded by industry professionals with expertise in IT, design, and data analytics. We identified a significant need for an exclusive, scalable customer acquisition solution in the market. Our vision is to provide a unique integrated solution for B2C clients that enables profitable customer acquisition, flexible scaling, and optimized internal processes.</p><p>At CapsLock, our core values center around our people, client orientation, quality, continuous improvement, integrity, and fostering strong relationships. Our team is diverse and skilled, speaking 10+ languages, and located worldwide. We are dedicated to pioneering new and efficient marketing strategies to ensure our clients’ success.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Job Responsibilities:</strong></p><ul><li>Develop, deploy, and optimize paid media campaigns across multiple digital platforms with high conversion rates and maximized profitability.</li><li>Manage budget allocations and bid parameters to deliver the most efficient results.</li><li>Active (daily) awareness of campaign performance.</li><li>Test new ideas based on insights gained from campaign management.</li><li>Proactively and effectively optimize media buys utilizing KPIs.</li><li>Ensure that campaign KPIs and objectives are met both near and long term.</li><li>Achieving assigned unit goals at or below the target cost-per-acquisition</li><li>Actively contribute to AI creative development for managed sources and team clients</li><li>Identify opportunities to drive efficiencies and improvements</li></ul> <p><strong>Qualifications:</strong></p><ul><li>5+ years experience in digital performance marketing with a focus on media buying</li><li>3+ years of PAID ADVERTISING experience</li><li>Strong experience with Facebook/Google as a main instrument</li><li>Experience in lead generation</li><li>Proven track record handling high campaign volume, large budgets, complex targeting strategies, and driving results.</li><li>Understanding of marketing funnels, channels, attribution, and performance metrics</li><li>Analytical mind to analyze data and metrics and translate insight into actionable strategies</li><li>Proactive approach in proposals of new/different ideas, solutions for problems and main KPI improvement</li><li>Prior experience with AI creative design tools like Gemini, Sora, etc. (Optional but a plus)</li><li>Strategic and creative</li><li>Organizational and multitasking abilities</li><li>Desire to learn new things and not afraid to take risks</li><li>Ability to quickly learn new ad platforms and tools</li><li>Upper-Intermediate English level</li><li>Be open to a long-term working relationship (2+ years)</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>***NO agency owners, NO sub-hire!!!***</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>﻿Why do we deserve your attention?</strong></p><p>Not only do we offer fair and competitive pay, but we also provide perks and benefits that support your well-being and growth. Here are some of them:</p><p><strong>Remote Work</strong></p><p>We are a truly remote-first company. You choose where you feel the most productive and comfortable to make an impact.</p><p><strong>Paid Time Off</strong></p><p>Work-life balance matters to us, and we support it with paid time off for rest, personal time, or simply doing what makes you happy.</p><p><strong>Ongoing Learning</strong></p><p>We believe in curiosity and growth. That’s why we support continuous learning with workshops, online courses, conferences, and certifications.</p><p><strong>Home Office</strong></p><p>We help you set up your perfect workspace by covering equipment and furniture expenses, so you can do your best work from home.</p><p><strong>Physical Well-Being</strong></p><p>From gym memberships and yoga classes to home workout equipment or even a bicycle, we give you the flexibility to stay active your way.</p><p><strong>Unlimited Sick Days</strong></p><p>Your health matters. Take the time you need to rest and recover - we’ll be here when you’re ready to return.</p><p><strong>Medical Coverage</strong></p><p>We support you and your family with reimbursement for medical insurance and health-related expenses, including dental care and psychological support.</p><p><strong>Co-Working Space</strong></p><p>If you sometimes crave a change of scenery or more social interaction, we’ll cover the full cost of a co-working space.</p><p><strong>Fun Stuff</strong></p><p>From gaming nights and fitness challenges to annual retreats at world-class resorts, we make sure there’s never a shortage of fun and connection.</p><p><br></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/capslock-media-buyer-google-meta">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/capslock-media-buyer-google-meta</a></p>
</description>

      <title>The Archetype Strategy: Director of Sales & Marketing</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Sales and Marketing</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://archetypestrategy.com">http://archetypestrategy.com</a>
</p>

<div class="col col-xs-7 description">
<h1>Director of Sales &amp; Marketing</h1><p><strong>Location:</strong> Remote (U.S. preferred) — Travel Required&nbsp;<br><strong>Company:</strong> Archetype Infrastructure Solutions</p><h2>About Us</h2><p>Archetype Infrastructure Solutions is a fast-growing firm specializing in <strong>telecommunications and structured cabling solutions</strong>. We deliver mission-critical infrastructure to support modern businesses and organizations in construction, utilities, and civil engineering. Our services include:</p><ul><li><p><strong>Fiber Optic Services</strong> — Splicing, termination, testing, and maintenance.</p></li><li><p><strong>Low Voltage Cabling</strong> — Structured cabling, Cat5e/6/6a, and backbone solutions.</p></li><li><p><strong>Distributed Antenna Systems (DAS)</strong> — Enhanced wireless coverage and network expansion.</p></li><li><p><strong>Wi-Fi &amp; Network Solutions</strong> — Installation and optimization of wireless networks.</p></li><li><p><strong>Data Center &amp; Server Room Infrastructure</strong> — Rack and cabinet installations, power management, and cooling solutions.</p></li></ul><p>We are building a reputation for reliability, innovation, and results, and we’re now ready to scale.</p><h2>The Opportunity</h2><p>We are seeking a <strong>Director of Sales &amp; Marketing</strong> to take full ownership of our growth strategy. This leader will design and execute the go-to-market plan, expand brand visibility, and generate inbound client interest — all while enjoying the flexibility of a remote role with the excitement of <strong>in-person travel for client engagement, networking, and industry events</strong>.</p><h2>Key Responsibilities</h2><h3>Sales Leadership</h3><ul><li><p>Develop and execute a sales strategy targeting mid-market and enterprise clients across telecom, data infrastructure, and construction.</p></li><li><p>Own the full sales cycle: prospecting, pitching, negotiating, and closing.</p></li><li><p>Build and manage a pipeline of qualified opportunities.</p></li><li><p>Over time, hire and mentor a small team of sales/business development professionals.</p></li></ul><h3>Marketing &amp; Growth</h3><ul><li><p>Launch marketing campaigns that clearly communicate our telecom and infrastructure solutions.</p></li><li><p>Build case studies and client success stories that highlight our fiber, cabling, DAS, Wi-Fi, and data center expertise.</p></li><li><p>Manage online presence (LinkedIn, SEO, website) to ensure Archetype is discoverable and trusted.</p></li><li><p>Explore partnerships, industry events, and PR opportunities to position Archetype as a leader in telecom and cabling solutions.</p></li></ul><h3>Strategy &amp; Reporting</h3><ul><li><p>Partner with company leadership to define growth targets and priorities.</p></li><li><p>Establish KPIs for sales and marketing performance and provide regular reports.</p></li><li><p>Identify new markets, verticals, and opportunities for expansion.</p></li></ul><h2>Qualifications</h2><ul><li><p>5–10 years of experience in B2B sales, business development, or marketing, ideally in <strong>telecommunications, infrastructure, or industrial services</strong>.</p></li><li><p>Proven track record of building and closing pipelines from scratch.</p></li><li><p>Strong understanding of <strong>digital marketing and inbound lead generation</strong>.</p></li><li><p>Entrepreneurial, hands-on, and comfortable working in a growing company environment.</p></li><li><p>Exceptional communication and relationship-building skills.</p></li><li><p>Willingness to travel regularly for client meetings, conferences, and industry events.</p></li><li><p>Bonus: Existing network of telecom, construction, or IT infrastructure contacts.</p></li></ul> </div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-archetype-strategy-director-of-sales-marketing">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-archetype-strategy-director-of-sales-marketing</a></p>
</description>

      <title>EverAI: Junior Performance Marketer (Full Remote - Croatia)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Analytics, Google Analytics, Monitoring and Analytics, Predictive Analytics, Analytics Tools, and Sales Analytics</skills>
      <category>Sales and Marketing</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5417/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Croatia
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://everai.ai">http://everai.ai</a>
</p>

<h1>Our Vision &amp; Products</h1><p><em><strong>🚀 EverAI — Building the Future of AI Companionship</strong></em></p><p><em>One of the Top 15 Largest &amp; Fastest-Growing AI Companies in the World</em></p><p><em>50 Million Users in 2 years — Help Us Reach 100M first, 500M next</em></p><p></p><p>At <strong>EverAI</strong>, we’re shaping what it means to connect with AI. With <strong>50 million users and counting</strong>, we're not just building products — we're creating entirely new categories.</p><p>Our flagship product is the <strong>world’s largest AI companionship platform</strong>, redefining relationships for millions. It is governed by our proprietary moderation system, EverGuard — an internal AI designed to ensure everything we build is <strong>safe, ethical, and human-first</strong>.</p><p><em>And we’re only just getting started!</em></p><p></p><h1>Our Team</h1><p>We are an enthusiastic, passionate and hardworking team of ≈ 75 people. Our founding team has strong entrepreneurial experience building and scaling web products from 0 to IPO.</p><p></p><p><strong>Alexis Soulopoulos </strong>[CEO]</p><p><em>• 10+ years in Tech Executive Leadership</em></p><p><em>• Co-Founder Mad Paws Holdings (from 0 to IPO)</em></p><p><em>• Forbes 30 under 30 + Deloitte TechFast50 ’22 &amp; ‘23</em></p><p></p><p><strong>Michael Monin</strong> [Co-founder &amp; CTO]</p><p><em>• 10+ years as CTO / COO (web2/web3), 1+ year in AI/LLM</em></p><p><em>• Serial-entrepreneur: MTK Digital (exited / 0-&gt;$20m revenue) and Zipchat (AI Chatbot for E-commerce brands)</em></p><p></p><p><strong>Thomas Lacroix </strong>[Co-founder &amp; CMO]</p><p><em>• 8+ years in Customer Acquisition &amp; E-commerce Growth</em></p><p><em>• Serial-entrepreneur: Curatible (sold to Blackstone) and MTK Digital (exited / 0-&gt;$20m revenue)</em></p><p></p><p><strong>Maruša Fasano </strong>[CFO/Legal]</p><p><em>• 25+ years in Finance, Strategy, M&amp;A</em></p><p><em>• Ex-CFO/M&amp;A @Curatible (exited to Blackstone)</em></p><p><em>• Ex-President of the Board @SotremoSA (exited)</em></p><p><em>• Co-founder/CFO @SoftOne (exited)</em></p><p></p><h1>Your Role</h1><p>You will report to and work closely with our <strong>Chief Marketing Officer (CMO)</strong>, playing a <strong>key, hands-on role</strong> in the execution and optimization of our high-volume <strong>paid acquisition channels</strong>.</p><p>This is a fast-paced learning environment where you will execute the <strong>end-to-end User Acquisition process</strong>, from campaign setup and creative iteration to data analysis and reporting. You will have autonomy in your day-to-day execution, with <strong>continuous guidance and feedback</strong> from the team and senior leadership <strong>to accelerate your growth.</strong> Your ideas and analytical contributions will be actively sought to improve channel performance.</p><p></p><h2>Your Responsibilities</h2><h3>Campaign Execution and Scaling Support:</h3><ul><li><p>Assist in the daily management of core paid acquisition channels or DSPs (e.g. Meta, TikTok, Google, etc.)</p></li><li><p>Support the creation of scalable acquisition funnels by ensuring proper tracking implementation and gathering data insights</p></li><li><p>Actively participate in the testing loop by preparing new ad concepts, organizing creative assets, and setting up audience tests</p></li></ul><h3>Performance Analysis and Reporting:</h3><ul><li><p>Monitor campaign and funnel performance using our core tools (Voluum, GA4, internal dashboards) and promptly flag any critical changes or performance anomalies</p></li><li><p>Pull, clean, and organize performance data (CPA, ROAS, retention) to support weekly and monthly strategic reviews</p></li><li><p>Maintain and update internal reporting documents and dashboards</p></li></ul><h3>Creative &amp; Funnel Contribution:</h3><ul><li><p>Support the creative briefing process by gathering performance data and communicating required asset changes and successful angles to the content team</p></li><li><p>Collaborate with Product and Content teams to assist in the launch and testing cycles for landing pages, focusing on conversion rate improvements</p></li><li><p>Assist in documenting and implementing systems designed to streamline creative testing speed and reduce fatigue</p></li></ul><h3>Partnership Management &amp; Learning:</h3><ul><li><p>Build initial rapport with key traffic source representatives, assisting the Senior team in managing communications and reporting performance</p></li><li><p>Research and document potential new acquisition opportunities (networks, formats, tools, etc.)</p></li><li><p>Stay up-to-date on platform rules, policy changes, and algorithm shifts</p></li></ul><p></p><h2>Challenges You’ll Tackle</h2><p>In this role, you will be instrumental in supporting our growth goals. Specifically, you will:</p><ul><li><p><strong>Help us scale fast:</strong> Execute the daily campaign changes needed to grow our budgets while constantly watching the data to keep our cost targets (CAC/ROAS) in check</p></li><li><p><strong>Grow our user base:</strong> Your analysis and execution will directly contribute to hitting our goal of growing from 40 million to <strong>100 million users</strong></p></li><li><p><strong>Launch new channels:</strong> Handle the foundational setup (tracking, ad setup) required to successfully test and launch completely new advertising platforms</p></li><li><p><strong>Improve conversions:</strong> Run A/B tests on landing pages and funnels to find opportunities to make our campaigns more efficient</p></li><li><p><strong>Be the link for creative:</strong> Take performance data, translate it into clear suggestions for our creative team, and ensure the new ad concepts are launched and tracked correctly</p></li></ul><p></p><h1>Your Qualifications</h1><p></p><h2>Hard Skills</h2><ul><li><p><strong>Experience level: </strong>Minimum 1 year of experience required in performance marketing or user acquisition</p></li><li><p><strong>Platform curiosity: </strong>You have explored and understand the basic structures of major ad platforms (like Meta, TikTok, Google, etc.)</p></li><li><p><strong>Technical aptitude:</strong> Ability to quickly learn and master new software, dashboards, and platform interfaces</p></li><li><p><strong>Analytical &amp; Creative ability:</strong> You have a good eye for what makes an ad hook effective, and you possess strong analytical skills (comfortable with data/Excel) to learn how to translate data into creative briefs</p></li></ul><p></p><h3>Nice-to-Haves</h3><ul><li><p>Knowledge of basic online marketing metrics (CPM, CTR, CPA)</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with any analytics or tracking tool (e.g., GA4, Voluum, or basic platform reporting setups)</p></li><li><p>Experience in sensitive or regulated verticals (e.g. dating, femtech, telehealth, etc.)</p></li></ul><p></p><h2>Soft Skills</h2><p><strong>🗣 Good communication skills:</strong> You are fluent in English and can clearly articulate thoughts and findings</p><p><strong>🎯 Driven &amp; Accountable:</strong> You are motivated, take full ownership of your tasks, and commit to achieving goals</p><p><strong>⚡️ Action-oriented:</strong> You thrive in a fast-paced environment and prioritize execution and speed</p><p><strong>🧠 Curious &amp; Detail-oriented:</strong> You are meticulous with data and possess a strong desire to learn the <em>why</em> behind performance</p><p><strong>🧢 Humble learner:</strong> You actively seek feedback and are eager to grow in the field of paid acquisition</p><p></p><h1>Why EverAI?</h1><p>📈 <strong>Exponential Growth</strong>: From 50M users in 2 years, to 100M next — and 500M beyond</p><p>🚀 <strong>Track Record of Category-Creating Innovation</strong>: We consistently launch <strong>world-first AI applications</strong> — setting the pace, not following it</p><p>🌍 <strong>Global Impact</strong>: Top-tier user growth, real-world adoption, and cultural relevance</p><p>🧠 <strong>Proven Leadership</strong>: A senior team that’s <strong>launched, scaled, and exited &amp; IPO’d multiple scale ups</strong> — now fully focused on reshaping AI companionship</p><p>👥 <strong>Elite Remote Team</strong>: 100% remote and built to win — world-class talent from <strong>Tier 1 tech companies</strong>, with a culture of ownership, velocity, and radical creativity</p><p>🛡️ <strong>Ethical Core</strong>: Our AI ecosystem is governed by <strong>EverGuard, our proprietary AI moderation technology</strong>, ensuring responsible development at scale</p><p></p><h1>What We Offer</h1><p>✍️ <strong>Contract Type:</strong> We prefer B2B, but we’re flexible, what matters is long-term commitment and impact<br>📍 <strong>Work From Anywhere:</strong> Fully remote. Choose the environment where you do your best work<br>🏝️ <strong>Paid Time Off:</strong> 4 weeks (20 working days) of PTO per year to recharge and reset<br>👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 <strong>Annual Gathering:</strong> A yearly in-person meetup to connect, brainstorm, and celebrate wins together<br>❤️‍🩹 <strong>Health &amp; Wellness Support: </strong>Monthly allowance of<strong> </strong>100 USD for health insurance expenses + unlimited 1:1 sessions with psychologists and lifestyle experts through <em>OpenUp</em> (also available for up to three family members)<br>🏢 <strong>Co-Working Space Budget:</strong> Work from a co-working space up to twice per month (35 EUR / 40 USD per visit) to stay inspired and connected<br>📚 <strong>Learning Budget:</strong> Dedicated funds to support your professional growth: courses, books, conferences, events, or certifications<br>💻 <strong>Equipment:</strong> Company laptop provided + monitor budget up to 250 USD for your workspace setup<br>⚡ <strong>AI Tools Access:</strong> Premium access to ChatGPT, Cursor, Hugging Face, Claude Code, and any other tool needed to excel at your job, power your ideas and workflows</p><p></p><h1>🎯 Top Tier Talent Is Our Multiplier</h1><p>We’re a fully remote group of <strong>A-players from Tier 1 tech</strong>, led by an exec team who’ve <strong>launched, scaled, and exited multiple companies</strong>. We move fast, and care deeply about what we build — and who we build it with.</p><p>We’re looking for <strong>exceptional talent</strong> ready to ship &amp; distribute world-first AI products at scale, fast, and co-create with us this category-defining business.</p><p><strong>If that’s you — reach out and apply!</strong></p><p></p><h2><strong>💡 External Referral Program</strong></h2><p><strong>Know someone who could be a great fit for this role?</strong> You can refer them through the <strong>EverAI External Referral Program</strong> and earn a bonus of <strong>up to 2,500 USD</strong> if they’re hired. <a class="decorated-link" href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeuvD8GKtVT8Q33nsdF691LTEAFRErTK4JPyFrZlLMaWF82GQ/viewform?usp=preview">Submit a referral here.</a></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/everai-junior-performance-marketer-full-remote-croatia">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/everai-junior-performance-marketer-full-remote-croatia</a></p>

      <title>Binance: Senior Solutions Engineer (API, Python, Node.JS)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Cross-Browser Development, Cryptocurrency, and Cross-Selling</skills>
      <category>DevOps and Sysadmin</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5414/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Europe / Global / Ireland, Dublin / United Kingdom, London / Asia / Japan, Tokyo / Hong Kong / Australia, Brisbane / Australia, Melbourne / Australia, Sydney / Estonia, Tallinn / Greece, Athens / India, Bangalore / Philippines, Manila
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://binance.com">http://binance.com</a>
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.</span></div><div><br></div><div><strong>About the Role</strong></div>
<div><span>We are looking for a driven and technically strong individual to join the Trading Engine team as a Senior API Solutions Engineer. This role combines hands-on software development with a client- and community-facing focus centered around the Binance Trading API. You will be part of a small, fast-moving team that works closely with some of the exchange’s largest global clients, helping them integrate and optimize their trading strategies using our APIs.</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span>The ideal candidate has a solid technical background, strong programming expertise, and a deep understanding of exchange APIs. They should also enjoy engaging with developers and clients, providing guidance, and contributing to the broader API community.</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Responsibilities:</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>Develop and maintain open-source libraries used by the company’s clients for API integrations</li>
<li>Serve as a subject matter expert for REST APIs and WebSocket connectivity, supporting and advising the exchange’s largest clients</li>
<li>Work closely with clients to help them design and optimize trading algorithms, improving efficiency and performance on the exchange</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Requirements:</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>Strong programming skills, preferably in Python and/or JavaScript (<a class="postings-link" href="http://Node.js">Node.js</a>); prior experience working with exchange APIs is highly valued</li>
<li>Experience contributing to open-source projects is a plus</li>
<li>Business-level English; proficiency in additional widely spoken languages is an advantage for supporting global clients</li>
<li>Excellent communication and interpersonal skills</li>
<li>Highly self-motivated, disciplined, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment</li>
<li>Curious mindset with a strong willingness to learn, experiment, and explore new technologies</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>Why Binance</b></div><div><span>• Shape the future with the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem</span></div><div><span>• Collaborate with world-class talent in a user-centric global organization with a flat structure</span></div><div><span>• Tackle unique, fast-paced projects with autonomy in an innovative environment</span></div><div><span>• Thrive in a results-driven workplace with opportunities for career growth and continuous learning</span></div><div><span>• Competitive salary and company benefits</span></div><div><span>• Work-from-home arrangement (the arrangement may vary depending on the work nature of the business team)</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Binance is committed to being an equal opportunity employer. We believe that having a diverse workforce is fundamental to our success.</span></div><div><i>By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our </i><b><a href="https://www.binance.com/en/candidate/privacy/notice"><i>Candidate Privacy Notice</i></a></b><i>.</i></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/binance-senior-solutions-engineer-api-python-node-js">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/binance-senior-solutions-engineer-api-python-node-js</a></p>
</description>

      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>

      <state></state>
      <skills>Cross-Browser Development, Decision Frameworks, MySQL, PostgreSQL, DevOps, NoSQL, PostgreeSQL, Hardware/Software Support, Cross-Selling, and HR Software</skills>
      <category>DevOps and Sysadmin</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> BR
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://cubos.io">http://cubos.io</a>
</p>

<div><h3>Sobre a Cubos:</h3>
<p>Existimos para transformar a realidade ao nosso redor por meio de tecnologia. Somos um hub de conhecimento e inovação, criamos nossas próprias empresas digitais e apoiamos empresas na tomada de decisão, desenvolvimento e resolução de desafios técnicos complexos.</p>
<h4>Nós acreditamos que podemos mudar o mundo, e:</h4>
<p>Não temos medo de cair 😎</p>
<p>Cuidamos e respeitamos as pessoas 💕</p>
<p>Buscamos sair do padrão 🚀</p>
<p>Fazemos entregas fodas 🎁</p>
<p>Focamos nos usuários 🔍</p>
<p>Somos um hub de conhecimento 🧠</p>
<h3>Sobre a vaga:</h3>
<p>A vaga é para o nosso Banco de Talentos de Backend Pleno, ou seja, surgindo uma vaga efetiva, iremos primeiramente olhar para o Banco de Talentos e chamar as pessoas que estejam pré-aprovadas.&nbsp;</p>
<p>Ao se cadastrar para essa vaga, você passará pelo nosso processo seletivo e se tornará uma pessoa apta para as oportunidades que possam surgir a qualquer momento.&nbsp;</p>
<p>Com o Banco de Talentos, não há prazos entre as etapas, mas à medida que você avança, torna-se mais propenso a ser contatado e chamado para entrevistas, além de ficar pré-aprovado para fazer parte do nosso time.</p>
<h4><strong>Responsabilidades:</strong></h4>
<ul>
<li>Contribuir ativamente nas fases de ideação, planejamento e desenvolvimento dos produtos dos nossos clientes, trazendo insights e ideias para aprimorar e inovar nas soluções tecnológicas;</li>
<li>Participar de discussões sobre as tecnologias a serem utilizadas nos projetos, oferecendo avaliações críticas e sugestões para garantir a escolha das melhores ferramentas e abordagens tecnológicas para cada situação;</li>
<li>Criar endpoints de APIs que serão consumidas pelo nosso time Web e Mobile;</li>
<li>Compreender as ferramentas que usa em um contexto DevOps, sendo capaz, em situações problemáticas, de desenvolver um raciocínio lógico consistente para investigar e resolver o problema;</li>
<li>Disposição para ajudar e compartilhar conhecimento;</li>
<li>Ser uma pessoa curiosa e estar disposto a se arriscar em novas tecnologias.<strong><br></strong></li>
</ul>
<h4><strong><strong>Requisitos e Qualificações:</strong></strong></h4>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Experiência construindo APIs em NodeJS com Typescript;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experiência com bancos de dados SQL e NoSQL;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experiência com testes unitários e de integração;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experiência com Docker;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experiência com CI/CD.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4><strong>Diferenciais:</strong></h4>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Conhecimento em Kubernetes;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experiência em processamento assíncrono, fluxos agendados e fluxos com fila de processamento;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experiência em monitoramento, análise de desempenho e resolução de problemas para otimizar a saúde e o desempenho de aplicações;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Leitura na língua inglesa.</p>
</li>
</ul></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/cubos-tecnologia-banco-de-talentos-pessoa-desenvolvedora-backend-pleno">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/cubos-tecnologia-banco-de-talentos-pessoa-desenvolvedora-backend-pleno</a></p>

      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> BR
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://premiersoft.net">http://premiersoft.net</a>
</p>

<div><p><strong>Na Premiersoft, transformamos desafios em soluções reais!</strong><br>Com mais de uma década de atuação em desenvolvimento, somos movidos por um propósito claro: <strong>criar experiências tecnológicas que impulsionam negócios</strong> e aceleram a transformação dos nossos clientes.</p>
<p>Nosso time, formado por mais de 200 <strong>#Heroes</strong>, une excelência técnica ao nosso DNA: <strong>Team Player, Growth Driven e Problem Solver</strong>.&nbsp;Somos movidos por desafios, guiados pela inovação e comprometidos com a <strong>entrega de soluções de alto impacto</strong>, todos os dias.</p>
<p><strong>Sobre a oportunidade:&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>Você atuará como executor das atividades operacionais ao longo das ondas de migração, com forte interação com squads de desenvolvimento e ponto focal técnico para desbloqueios. Oportunidade ideal para quem busca consolidar experiência em projetos DevOps de larga escala, atuando em ambiente corporativo crítico e em time técnico estruturado.&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Você será responsável por:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Realizar validações técnicas pós-migração: integridade de histórico, contagem de objetos, integridade de&nbsp;Git&nbsp;LFS, validação de&nbsp;PRs&nbsp;e&nbsp;issues&nbsp;migrados&nbsp;</li>
<li>Ajustar integrações de pipelines,&nbsp;webhooks&nbsp;e&nbsp;secrets&nbsp;de CI/CD no novo ambiente&nbsp;</li>
<li>Atuar como ponto focal técnico das&nbsp;squads&nbsp;durante a transição, atendendo dúvidas e desbloqueios&nbsp;</li>
<li>Apoiar a elaboração de documentação técnica,&nbsp;runbooks&nbsp;operacionais e materiais de treinamento&nbsp;</li>
<li>Reportar progresso e&nbsp;issues&nbsp;ao&nbsp;Technical&nbsp;Lead em cadência ágil</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>O que você precisa ter:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Experiência prática com&nbsp;Git&nbsp;em nível avançado (rebase, cherry-pick, recuperação de histórico, manipulação de LFS)&nbsp;</li>
<li>Vivência com GitHub (Cloud ou Enterprise) e GitHub&nbsp;Actions&nbsp;</li>
<li>Experiência com pipelines de CI/CD e integração com ferramentas adjacentes (Jira,&nbsp;SonarQube, registries de artefatos)&nbsp;</li>
<li>Scripting&nbsp;em&nbsp;Bash&nbsp;e/ou Python para automação de tarefas operacionais&nbsp;</li>
<li>Perfil hands-on, organizado e com boa comunicação para atuação direta com&nbsp;squads&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Será um diferencial se você tiver:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Experiência prévia em projetos de migração de repositórios&nbsp;Git&nbsp;</li>
<li>Conhecimento em outras plataformas&nbsp;Git&nbsp;(GitLab,&nbsp;Bitbucket, Azure&nbsp;DevOps)&nbsp;</li>
<li>Certificação&nbsp;GitHub Foundations&nbsp;ou&nbsp;GitHub Actions&nbsp;</li>
<li>Vivência com Docker e ambientes&nbsp;containerizados&nbsp;</li>
<li>Inglês técnico&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<p>📍 Contratação Remota</p>
<p><strong><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">🔵 O que oferecemos:&nbsp;</span></strong></p>
<div>
<ul>
<li>Ambiente <strong>colaborativo</strong>, com <strong>troca constante de conhecimento</strong>;</li>
<li>Cultura aberta à <strong>inovação, ideias e protagonismo</strong>;</li>
<li>Uso de <strong>tecnologias atuais</strong> e boas práticas de mercado;</li>
<li>Foco em <strong>excelência técnica </strong>e <strong>impacto real</strong> nas entregas;</li>
<li>Incentivo contínuo ao <strong>aprendizado e desenvolvimento profissional</strong>.</li>
</ul>
</div>
<p><strong>&nbsp;<span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">🔵 Nossos benefícios</span>:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><strong>TotalPass:</strong> acesso a academias, estúdios e práticas de bem-estar;</li>
<li>Convênio com clínica de <strong>saúde mental</strong>;</li>
<li><strong>Descanso remunerado:</strong> 10 dias úteis para recarregar as energias e cuidar de você;</li>
<li>Gifts via Flash<strong> - birthday gift </strong>e <strong>time in company gift</strong>;</li>
<li>Bônus por <strong>indicação de talentos - </strong><strong>R$ 2.000,00 por contratação</strong>;</li>
<li>Desenvolvimento contínuo com <strong>PDI, feedbacks e apoio a certificações</strong>;</li>
<li><strong>Aulas de inglês gratuitas: </strong>preparando você para atuação em oportunidades internacionais;</li>
</ul>
<p>🎯 &nbsp;<a href="https://conhecanossabase.premiersoft.net/" title="Veja como é fazer parte do time Premiersoft">Veja como é fazer parte do time Premiersoft</a> &nbsp;</p>
<p>🎯 <a href="https://premiersoft.net/quem-somos/">Saiba mais sobre nós</a>&nbsp;</p>
<p>🎯 <a href="Conheça%20nossa%20base!%20|%20Premiersoft">Conheça nossa Sede</a> &nbsp;</p>
<p>A comunicação ao longo do processo seletivo acontece por e-mail ou WhatsApp. Para não perder nenhuma atualização, adicione o domínio&nbsp;<strong>@premiersoft.net</strong> à sua lista de remetentes confiáveis e fique de olho na sua caixa de entrada e spam.</p></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/premiersoft-engenheiro-devops-github-e-ci-cd-remoto">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/premiersoft-engenheiro-devops-github-e-ci-cd-remoto</a></p>

priorities</li><li>Excellent communication skills for both technical and non-technical stakeholders</li></ul><p><strong>Startup &amp; Agency Experience:</strong></p><ul><li>Comfort working in metrics</li></ul><p><strong>Automations:</strong></p><ul><li>Work in tandem with our Automations Lead to create automations to support web development</li></ul><br><br><strong>Requirements</strong><br><ul><li>At least 5 years of experience with Figma, Webflow, and WordPress, with a portfolio showcasing your work.&nbsp;</li></ul><ul><li>Strong understanding of UX/UI principles and a strong desire to learn and grow in this field.&nbsp;</li></ul><ul><li>Strong familiarity with responsive design practices demonstrating their communication style — submissions that do not include a video will not be considered</strong></li></ul><br><br><strong>Benefits</strong><br><h3>Why Adoreal?&nbsp;</h3><p>Joining   <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Poland
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://hostinger.com">http://hostinger.com</a>
</p>

<p><strong>Join Hostinger, and we’ll grow fast! 🚀</strong></p><div>&nbsp;</div><p>We’re shaping the future of online success - powered by AI and driven by people. With 900+ talented professionals and over 5 million clients in 150 countries, we help creators and entrepreneurs bring their ideas to life faster and easier than ever before.</p><div>&nbsp;</div><p><strong>Our mission:</strong> To provide tools that help individuals and small businesses succeed online faster and easier.</p><p><strong>Our culture:</strong> Guided by <a href="https://www.hostinger.com/principles"><strong>10 company principles</strong></a><strong>.</strong></p><p><strong>Our formula for success:</strong> Customer obsession, innovative products, and talented teams.</p><div>&nbsp;</div><p><strong>Your role at Hostinger</strong></p><p>As part of Hostinger's Website Builder team, you'll be responsible for&nbsp;shipping end-to-end features that define the future of the Ecommerce and Website Builder platforms. In this role, you'll collaborate closely with designers, product managers, and other engineers to bridge the gap between complex backend logic and pixel-perfect user interfaces, delivering complete and impactful solutions that revolutionize our users' workflows.</p><div>&nbsp;</div><p>Curious to learn more? Connect with your team:<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/greta-alisauskiene">&nbsp;</a>Paulius Gedminas, Head of engineering<br></p><p></p><p><strong>Your day-to-day</strong></p><ul><li><p>Own features end-to-end - Build complete features for Website Builder and eCommerce from database to UI. Ship Vue.js 3 components powered by Node.js APIs that you designed and built yourself.</p></li><li><p>Balance the stack - Split your time between crafting intuitive frontends and building robust backend services. Learn where you're strongest and where you want to grow.</p></li><li><p>Move fast, learn faster - Work in an autonomous squad that ships regularly. Make technical decisions with mentorship from experienced engineers, gradually taking on more responsibility.</p></li><li><p>Solve real problems - Debug across the full stack, optimize performance from SQL queries to bundle sizes, and understand how every piece fits together.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate and contribute - Work with designers on UX, debate API design with backend engineers, and help shape the product direction with PMs.</p></li><li><p>Level up across the board - Deep dive into frontend architecture one sprint, backend scalability the next. We'll help you become a well-rounded engineer who can work anywhere in the stack.</p></li><li><p>The vibe: You're a generalist who loves learning, hates being bored, and wants to understand the full picture. We value adaptability, curiosity, and the drive to ship quality work across the entire stack.<br></p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Your skills and experience</strong></p><ul><li><p>5+ years of full-stack experience with modern JavaScript/TypeScript in both frontend and backend.Frontend: Solid experience with Vue.js, React, or Angular + TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3/SCSS.</p></li><li><p>Backend: Working knowledge of Node.js, REST APIs, and databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL).</p></li><li><p>You know message queueing technologies, like RabbitMQ, BullMQ, or GCP PubSub.</p></li><li><p>Testing discipline - you write unit tests and understand why E2E testing matters.</p></li><li><p>Database proficiency - comfortable writing SQL and using ORMs to manage data effectively.</p></li><li><p>Git collaboration - experienced working in team environments with branches, PRs, and code reviews.</p></li><li><p>Strong communicator - you can explain technical decisions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.</p></li><li><p>Self-driven learner - you tackle unfamiliar challenges, research solutions, and aren't afraid to ask for help when needed.<br></p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Nice to have</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience with Vue 3 Composition API and Pinia.</p></li><li><p>Knowledge of monorepo architecture or Vite.</p></li><li><p>Docker and containerization experience.</p></li><li><p>Performance optimization on either side of the stack.</p></li><li><p>Understanding of WebSockets or real-time features.</p></li><li><p>Any DevOps or CI/CD exposure.<br></p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Benefits for you</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>🚀 360 Growth:</strong> Limitless learning opportunities with access to Reforge, Couch Hub, global conferences, libraries, strong feedback culture, and mentoring through TesoXchange. We're invested in helping you level up from mid to senior.</p></li><li><p><strong>🎯 Freedom &amp; responsibility:</strong> Work from modern offices in Kaunas and Vilnius, home, or anywhere in the world. Flexible schedule, trust-based culture, and the space to bring your ideas to life.</p></li><li><p><strong>💪 Wellness simplified: </strong>Health insurance from Day 1, gym memberships, recharge leave, Headspace subscriptions, and regular health checks. Join sports, arts, and hobby clubs or enjoy work-life balance.</p></li><li><p><strong>🎉 Work hard - play hard:</strong> Company events like Summerfest &amp; Winterfest, Town Hall, team-buildings, workations, Žalgiris Arena VIP Lounge access, and milestone gifts for life's big moments.<br></p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Compensation</strong></p><ul><li><p>Gross salary 5600 - 7600 EUR/month. Specific compensation based on experience and competence.<br></p></li></ul><p><em>We’re always looking for experienced talent to raise the bar. If you’re excited about the role but the listed salary range doesn’t align with your expectations, we still encourage you to apply - we’re open to adjusting compensation based on the impact and value you bring.</em></p><div>&nbsp;</div><div>&nbsp;</div><p>Get ready to take your personal and professional growth to new heights! Join Hostinger today and be part of our journey <strong>🚀</strong></p><p><strong>Three. Two. Onboard</strong></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hostinger-full-stack-developer-node-js-website-builder-based-in-poland">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hostinger-full-stack-developer-node-js-website-builder-based-in-poland</a></p>

      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇺🇸 United States of America</country>
      <state>Nevada</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>All Other Remote</category>
      <type>Contract</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2702/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Las Vegas, Nevada
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://jobs.telusdigital.com/search/jobs?cfm5=Artificial+Intelligence&amp;ns_category=artificial-intelligence">https://jobs.telusdigital.com/search/jobs?cfm5=Artificial+Intelligence&amp;ns_category=artificial-intelligence</a>
</p>

<div class="figma-padding-bottom-32 tw-border-b tw-border-[#E3E6E8]">
<p>Are you a detail-oriented individual with a passion for research and a good understanding of national and local geography? This freelance opportunity allows you to work at your own pace and from the comfort of your own home.</p>
<p><strong>A Day in the Life of an Online Data Analyst:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>In this role, you will be working on a project aimed at enhancing the content and quality of digital maps that are used by millions of people worldwide</li>
<li>Completing research and evaluation tasks in a web-based environment such as verifying and comparing data, and determining the relevance and accuracy of information.</li>
</ul>
<p>Join us today and be part of a dynamic and innovative team that is making a difference in the world!</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>TELUS Digital AI Community</strong></p>
<p>Our global AI Community is a vibrant network of 1 million+ contributors from diverse backgrounds who help our customers collect, enhance, train, translate, and localize content to build better AI models. Become part of our growing community and make an impact supporting the machine learning models of some of the world’s largest brands</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
</div>
<div class="pt-7 figma-padding-bottom-32 tw-border-b tw-border-[#E3E6E8]">
<h4 class="sui-font-heading sui-text-h2 tw-font-bold sui-text-darkGray-darker tw-mb-1">Qualification path</h4>
<p>No previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. This is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement.&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Basic Requirements</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Full Professional Proficiency in Spanish language</li>
<li>Being a resident in United States for the last 5 consecutive years and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in United States</li>
<li>Ability to follow guidelines and conduct online research using search engines, online maps, and website information</li>
<li>Flexibility to work across a diverse set of task types, including maps, news, audio tasks, and relevance</li>
<li>Daily access to a broadband internet connection, computer, and relevant software</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Assessment</strong></p>
<p>In order to be hired into the program, you’ll take an open book qualification exam that will determine your suitability for the position and complete ID verification. Our team will provide you with guidelines and learning materials before your qualification exam. You will be required to complete the exam in a specific timeframe but at your convenience.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Equal Opportunity</strong></p>
<p>All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At TELUS Digital AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.</p>
</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-online-data-analyst-united-states-spanish-speakers-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/telus-digital-online-data-analyst-united-states-spanish-speakers-1</a></p>

      <title>OnTheGoSystems: Head of Customer Success</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Nevada</state>
      <skills>Customer Relationship Management, Client Retention, Client Retention Strategies, and Customer Service</skills>
      <category>Customer Support</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2344/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://onthegosystems.com">http://onthegosystems.com</a>
</p>

<p><a href="https://wpml.org/">WPML</a> is the world's most popular multilingual plugin for WordPress. We power hundreds of thousands of paying customers. Our customers are agencies, store owners, publishers, and governments. We have been profitable for over a decade. We ship real software that real customers depend on. We are not a startup looking for product-market fit. We are a mature company that needs someone to own one of our most important numbers.</p>
<p><strong>The Job</strong></p>
<p>You own retention. Not coordinate it. Own it.</p>
<p>That means:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Churn rate, renewal rate, and net revenue retention are yours.</strong>&nbsp;You set the targets. You build the plan. You ship the work. You report the results.</li>
<li><strong>Our NPS program and our public-rating surfaces (Trustpilot, Capterra, G2) are metrics you move.</strong>&nbsp;They are not projects you status-report on.</li>
<li><strong>You lead the existing Retention team and shape its evolution.</strong>&nbsp;You coach the team. You get more from the people on it than they are getting from themselves today. The team's shape will evolve as your AI-amplified work scales.</li>
<li><strong>You work with Support, Engineering, and Product as your three core counterparts.</strong>&nbsp;Support is where today's churn signal lives. You constantly mine what is trending and what customers are struggling with right now. You will not request reports from Support. You will use our internal intelligence tools and look yourself. Engineering and Product are where you ship retention-critical fixes. You arrive with business cases that make prioritization obvious.</li>
<li><strong>You report to the CEO directly.</strong>&nbsp;No layers. No fancy slides. Only results.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Who You Are</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><strong>You want to be doing the work, not just managing it.</strong>&nbsp;Your best weeks are the ones where you wrote the strategy, ran the analysis, drafted the comms, and shipped the experiment yourself. AI tools are part of your daily working stack. You use them to do more, not to escape doing. If you have been promoted away from doing the work and you miss it, this is the job.</li>
<li>You have measurably moved a retention metric at a previous company. You can describe exactly how. Specific numbers. Specific actions. Specific results.</li>
<li>You come from a self-serve B2B SaaS. SMB, prosumer, or developer tools. You know the difference between running a self-serve renewal motion and running an enterprise CSM team. You have done the former.</li>
<li>You are data-fluent. You read funnels for fun. You can write SQL or instruct an analyst precisely.</li>
<li>You decide. When you have 70% of the information, you commit and adjust. You do not escalate decisions back to your CEO that you were hired to make.</li>
<li>You treat coordination as the cost of the work, not the substance of it.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>If your most recent experience is enterprise CSM with a dedicated book of accounts, this is not the role.</strong></p>
<p><strong>What We Offer</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>A real metric to move. The authority to move it.</li>
<li>Direct, regular access to the CEO. No politics. No committees.</li>
<li><strong>An AI-amplified working culture.</strong>&nbsp;The CEO uses AI tools daily for analysis, drafting, and strategic work. You are expected to do the same. We invest in the tooling and the team norms that let a small operation punch above its weight.</li>
<li>Competitive senior-leadership compensation. Specifics with HR.</li>
<li>100% remote since 2008. Strong async culture. Modest meeting load. Real flexibility on hours.</li>
<li>Competent counterparts. Our engineering team ships. Our product team ships. Our support team is in daily contact with customers and produces real intelligence about what is breaking. You will not be the only person trying to make things happen.</li>
<li><strong>Direct access to customer intelligence.</strong>&nbsp;We have internal tools that let you probe support trends, ticket patterns, account behavior, and churn signals on demand. No reports to request. No meetings to schedule. The data is in front of you whenever you want to look.</li>
<li>Generous time off. Education and conference budget. Hardware.</li>
<li>A 17-year-old profitable company. Stability without bureaucracy.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>We’re excited to hear from people who enjoy building, improving, and making a real impact, and we look forward to learning more about you!</strong></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-head-of-customer-success">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-head-of-customer-success</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Allianz: Pollution Claims Adjuster III | Fully Remote</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Management and Finance</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> 
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://allianz.com">http://allianz.com</a>
</p>

<div class="externalPosting">
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><span>ALLIANZ REINSURANCE OF AMERICA, INC.</span></p>
<p><span>AZRA is a specialty niche reinsurer, domiciled in California and licensed as an admitted insurer in 36 states (including District of Columbia), and is a qualified, accredited, or approved reinsurer in fifteen states. AZRA is a property casualty reinsurer which writes both prospective and legacy reinsurance. AZRA has specific expertise in run-off management of U.S. legacy insurance liabilities. It services Allianz Group affiliates and third parties including third party claims administration of asbestos, environmental, workers compensation, general liability, and construction defect liabilities. </span></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><span>AZRA has approximately 150 employees located nationwide with the majority working on a remote basis. AZRA is rated “AA-“ by Standard &amp; Poor’s. As of December 31, 2025, AZRA had total admitted assets of USD $3.6 billion and policyholders’ surplus of $265 million.</span></p>
<p><span>AZRA is looking for a Claims Specialist III to join our Pollution Team - based anywhere in USA</span></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>What you do:</p>
<ul>
<li>Manage a caseload of complex legacy and long-tail Pollution and Environmental liability claims involving superfund sites, dry cleaner sites, PFAS, and other exposures.</li>
<li>Handle new loss assignments and reassignments promptly and efficiently.</li>
<li>Develop account strategies and oversee site cleanup and litigation activities.</li>
<li>Evaluate potential claim exposures and negotiate claim resolutions, utilizing claim modeling and alternative dispute resolution (ADR) as appropriate.</li>
<li>Oversee defense counsel, consultants, experts and vendors in alignment with agreed strategies.</li>
<li>Provide guidance, input and oversight to defense and coverage counsel.</li>
<li>Analyze coverage issues and make complex coverage decisions by review of policies and other relevant information, collaborating with coverage counsel when necessary.</li>
<li>Support team initiatives including tracking and researching emerging pollution trends and issues.</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>What you bring:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Demonstrated experience handling litigated and non-litigated Pollution or Environmental claims &nbsp;with a record of increasing responsibility.</li>
<li>Ability to apply analytical thinking, attention to detail, and self-motivation to master complex claims and evolving issues.</li>
<li>Possess a strong technical background, with expertise in identifying coverage issues and interpreting policies, especially pre-1987 primary, umbrella, and excess liability policies.</li>
<li>In-depth knowledge of liability policy language and coverage interpretation.</li>
<li>Ability to direct and support decision-tree modeling for exposure evaluation.</li>
<li>Ability to work independently while managing multiple internal and external deadlines.</li>
<li>Experience working in a highly regulated environment and ensure compliance with regulations, policies and procedures.</li>
<li>Ability to communicate effectively both in writing and presentations.</li>
<li>Hold a college degree (J.D. Preferred) or relevant work experience.</li>
<li>Possess required state licenses or able to obtain them.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Have legal authorization to work in the U.S. without the need for current or future immigration sponsorship (including H-1B, H4, L-1, L-2, TN, OPT, CPT, and other nonimmigrant visas).</li>
</ul>
<p>This position may require occasional national travel on short notice.</p>
<p>This position will report to the Director of Pollution Claims</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>Job Posting Range 100,000 - $144,600</p>
<p>Note the job posting range is exclusive of company benefits or other compensation. This role is also eligible for an annual incentive program. If you are hired, your final base salary will be determined based on factors such as geographic location, experience, skills, competencies, and/or education. In addition to those factors, we will also consider internal equity of our current employees. Please keep in mind that the range provided is the full base salary range for the role. Hiring at or near the maximum of the range would not be typical to allow for future and continued salary growth.</p>
<p>94650 | Customer Services &amp; Claims | Professional | Non-Executive | Allianz Reinsurance | Full-Time | Permanent</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><span>Allianz Group is one of the most trusted insurance and asset management companies in the world. Caring for our employees, their ambitions, dreams and challenges is what makes us a unique employer. We are united by a shared commitment: to put our customers first and at the center of everything we do. Their needs inspire our thinking and guide our actions. Together, we can build an environment where everyone feels empowered and confident to explore, grow and shape a better future – for our customers and for the world around us. </span></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><span>At Allianz, we stand for unity: we believe that a united world is a more prosperous world, and we are dedicated to consistently advocating for equal opportunities for all. The foundation for this is our inclusive workplace, where people and performance both matter, and where integrity, fairness, inclusion and trust are at the heart of our culture. We therefore welcome applications regardless of race, ethnicity or cultural background, age, gender, nationality, religion, social class, disability or sexual orientation, or any other characteristics protected under applicable local laws and regulations.</span></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><span>Join us. <strong>Let's care for tomorrow.</strong></span></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/allianz-pollution-claims-adjuster-iii-fully-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/allianz-pollution-claims-adjuster-iii-fully-remote</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Wealth.com: Director of Strategic Accounts</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Management and Finance</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5404/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote, United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://wealth.com">http://wealth.com</a>
</p>

<p><strong>About Us</strong></p><p><a href="http://Wealth.com">Wealth.com</a> is the industry’s leading AI wealth management platform, empowering financial institutions to modernize how they deliver planning advice to clients. Trusted by the largest firms in wealth management, <a href="http://Wealth.com">Wealth.com</a> combines proprietary AI, enterprise-grade security, and deep legal and tax expertise to power scalable, compliant, and personalized planning experiences across the full client lifecycle.</p><div>&nbsp;</div><p>The company has been widely recognized for innovation and leadership, winning Top Estate Planning Technology and Top Estate Planning Implementation at the 2025 <a href="http://WealthManagement.com">WealthManagement.com</a> Industry Awards, and earning #1 in estate planning market share in the 2025 Kitces AdvisorTech Study.</p><div>&nbsp;</div><p>At <a href="http://Wealth.com">Wealth.com</a>, our team is core to everything we build. We foster a collaborative, high-performing environment that values innovation, ownership, and continuous improvement. <a href="http://Wealth.com">Wealth.com</a> is proud to be certified as a Great Place to Work®.</p><p></p><h2><strong>About the Role</strong></h2><p>We are seeking an experienced leader to join the team supporting Charles Schwab. This individual will operate at the intersection of institutional account management, strategy and execution. This role is designed for a highly strategic operator who can own and grow complex relationships, while also driving end-to-end execution of new, often ambiguous initiatives that push into new operating models of how AI-powered financial planning solutions are delivered.</p><p>You will serve as a trusted advisor to executive stakeholders, translating customer needs, constraints, and long-term objectives into actionable strategies, while mobilizing internal teams to deliver high-impact outcomes. This is not a traditional account management role; it requires someone who can think like a strategist, operate like a product leader, and execute like a program owner.</p><h2><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></h2><h3><strong>Strategic Account Leadership</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Own and deepen relationships with a wide range of stakeholders at various levels across Charles Schwab’s multi-entity, multi-vertical organizations</p></li><li><p>Develop a deep understanding of each of Charles Schwab’s business vertical’s operating model, decision frameworks, and value drivers</p></li><li><p>Act as a strategic thought partner, advising on how to best leverage our platform within their broader ecosystems</p></li><li><p>Anticipate customer needs and proactively shape opportunities for expansion and impact</p></li><li><p>Own post-implementation adoption and value realization, co-defining and tracking success metrics</p></li><li><p>Identify and remove barriers to adoption within complex operating environments</p></li><li><p>Ensure delivered solutions translate into measurable business impact, not just successful implementation</p></li><li><p>Remove blockers in production by ensuring feedback and bugs are reported and resolved in a timely manner</p></li><li><p>Create and deliver quarterly Service Level Agreement (SLA) and Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs) to customer stakeholders</p></li></ul><p><br></p><h3><strong>Strategy &amp; Execution</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Translate client goals and constraints into clear, actionable strategic plans</p></li><li><p>Lead zero-to-one initiatives, including new product implementations, workflows, and experiences that may not have precedent within the customer organization or segment</p></li><li><p>Drive execution across ambiguous environments, ensuring progress despite evolving requirements or unclear paths</p></li><li><p>Balance long-term strategic vision with near-term deliverables and milestones</p></li><li><p>Establish structure, operating cadence, and decision frameworks in complex, multi-stakeholder environments</p></li></ul><h3><strong>Cross-Functional Leadership &amp; Influence</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Serve as the voice of the customer in product roadmap discussions, ensuring customer workflows, constraints, and value drivers are clearly represented</p></li><li><p>Translate emerging capabilities (e.g., AI, income tax planning) into frameworks that stakeholders can evaluate and adopt with confidence</p></li><li><p>Navigate customer data sharing, privacy, and legacy system constraints to enable scalable solutions</p></li><li><p>Surface and resolve misalignment early to maintain execution momentum</p></li><li><p>Partner with Charles Schwab’s cross-functional teams (e.g., strategy, product, risk, compliance, operations, technology) to unblock progress, enable successful adoption and valuable feedback loops</p></li><li><p>Serve as the connective tissue across <a href="http://Wealth.com">Wealth.com</a>’s Product, Engineering, Design, Legal, Compliance, and Customer Success</p></li><li><p>Influence internal priorities based on Charles Schwab’s feedback and needs</p></li><li><p>Drive alignment across internal leadership and customer executive stakeholders on priorities, sequencing, and trade-offs</p></li></ul><h3><strong>Program &amp; Project Management</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Lead complex, multi-threaded initiatives with competing priorities and stakeholders</p></li><li><p>Establish clear timelines, milestones, and accountability structures</p></li><li><p>Identify risks early and proactively develop mitigation strategies</p></li><li><p>Ensure seamless execution from strategy through implementation and adoption</p></li></ul><h3><strong>Executive Communication &amp; Storytelling</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Create and deliver compelling presentations for both internal and external audiences</p></li><li><p>Distill complex concepts into clear, actionable narratives for executive stakeholders</p></li><li><p>Regularly communicate progress, insights, and recommendations at the leadership level</p></li></ul><h2><strong>Required Qualifications</strong></h2><ul><li><p>7+ years of experience in financial services, or AI-powered wealth tech, with a mix of:</p><ul><li><p>Strategic account management / relationship management</p></li><li><p>Business strategy and execution</p></li><li><p>Program or product leadership</p></li></ul></li><li><p>Direct experience working with or within a multi-entity financial institution</p></li><li><p>Strong understanding of:</p><ul><li><p>Complex operating models and decision-making structures</p></li><li><p>Delivery channels for financial planning and client-facing roles who sit within these channels</p></li><li><p>How these organizations derive value from platforms like<a href="http://wealth.com/"> </a><a href="http://Wealth.com">Wealth.com</a> and similar AI-powered financial planning solutions</p></li><li><p>Constraints such as risk, compliance, data governance, and legacy systems</p></li></ul></li><li><p>Proven ability to navigate and influence cross-functional stakeholders (internal and external)</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated success leading complex, ambiguous initiatives with no clear precedent</p></li><li><p>Strong project and program management skills, with the ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously</p></li><li><p>Exceptional communication skills, including executive-level presentation development</p></li><li><p>Ability to thrive under ambiguity, adapt quickly, and manage competing priorities effectively</p></li><li><p>Experience translating business, product, and technical teams to drive alignment and execution</p></li></ul><h2><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h2><ul><li><p>MBA, CFPⓇ or related master's degree strongly preferred</p></li><li><p>Experience designing or implementing tax planning or financial planning workflows, including integration into enterprise systems</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with AI-enabled solutions within financial services and their associated risk/governance considerations</p></li><li><p>Background in product management, experience design, or platform strategy</p></li><li><p>Track record of influencing product roadmaps based on customer needs</p></li></ul><h2><strong>What Success Looks Like</strong></h2><p>This role sits at the core of how we translate innovation into real-world impact for some of the most complex  wealth management organizations in financial services. Success requires not just understanding the client, but reshaping how work gets done across both organizations.</p><ul><li><p>You are viewed by clients as a trusted strategic partner, not just a vendor</p></li><li><p>You successfully drive adoption of new capabilities, even in highly complex and constrained environments</p></li><li><p>You create clarity and forward momentum in situations where others see ambiguity or roadblocks</p></li><li><p>You elevate internal teams’ understanding of Schwab’s needs and influence product direction accordingly</p></li><li><p>You consistently deliver outcomes that balance customer value, business impact, scalability, and operational feasibility</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Benefits &amp; Perks</strong></p><ul><li><p>Competitive salary</p></li><li><p>Excellent medical, dental, and vision insurance options, with low-cost premium structures that demonstrate our commitment to offering great value to our employees</p></li><li><p>100% company-paid basic life insurance, short-term and long-term disability insurance</p></li><li><p>100% paid parental leave upon eligibility</p></li><li><p>Company equity managed through Carta</p></li><li><p>401k with match and 100% vesting upon hire</p></li><li><p>Flexible PTO in an environment where taking time off to relax or recharge is supported and encouraged</p></li><li><p>Take time off for holidays — and yes, your birthday counts too. Celebrate, relax, and recharge without thinking twice.</p></li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wealth-com-director-of-strategic-accounts">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wealth-com-director-of-strategic-accounts</a></p>
</description>
