      <title>Empower Retirement: Senior Private Wealth Advisor, Practice Lead - Florida region</title>
      <region>Florida</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>CRM, CRM Systems, and CRM Integration</skills>
      <category>Management and Finance</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5405/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> FL Miami - Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://empower.com">http://empower.com</a>
</p>

<div><p>Our vision for the future is based on the idea that transforming financial lives starts by giving our people the freedom to transform their own. We have a flexible work environment, and fluid career paths. We not only encourage but celebrate internal mobility. We also recognize the importance of purpose, well-being, and work-life balance. Within Empower and our communities, we work hard to create a welcoming and inclusive environment, and our associates dedicate thousands of hours to volunteering for causes that matter most to them.</p><p>Chart your own path and grow your career while helping more customers achieve financial freedom. Empower Yourself.</p><p><i><b>The Ideal candidate lives in the metro Orlando or Miami areas and is excited to meet with clients in person, if needed.</b></i></p><p></p><p><i><b>**This position offers a competitive bonus opportunity in addition to the base salary**</b></i></p><p></p><p>The Senior Private Wealth Advisor, Practice Lead plays a vital role in helping clients achieve long-term financial success by serving as a trusted advisor and primary point of contact for high-net-worth client households. This role is focused on retaining and growing net assets over time by delivering proactive, tailored financial advice through a highly personal and strategic approach.&nbsp;</p><p></p><p>At Empower, our mission is to empower financial freedom for all, and our vision is to transform financial lives through advice, people, and technology. As a Sr. Private Wealth Advisor – Practice Lead, you bring that mission and vision to life—ensuring that every client interaction is Easy, Personal, and Enlightening.&nbsp;</p><p></p><p>This role requires a natural leader, someone who can confidently serve as the lead advisor within a dedicated client practice team, which includes a Wealth Advisor and a Client Experience Specialist. While not a people management position, this role will set the tone for how the team shows up for clients: leading with empathy, clarity, and insight to deliver a first-class experience.&nbsp;</p><p></p><p>This is an opportunity to help build a first-class client experience and make a meaningful impact on the financial lives of the clients we serve.&nbsp;</p><p></p><p><b>What You Will Do</b></p><ul><li>Serve as the lead advisor within a dedicated client team, working in close collaboration with a Wealth Advisor and Client Experience Specialist to build lasting relationships with a dedicated book of high net worth Empower clients</li><li>Provide a first-in-class client experience servicing needs related to client onboarding, financial planning, and investor education. Collaborate with your advisory team resources to grow and maintain strong long-term relationships with highly valued clients</li><li>Comprehensive relationship management to be conducted via phone, email, and virtual meetings. Engagement is both proactive and reactive.</li><li>Retain assets under management and garner additional assets through diligent communication, proactive education, and unfailing responsiveness.</li><li>Act as liaison between clients &amp; various internal groups/departments within Empower Personal Wealth to serve clients.</li><li>An ability to clearly explain the ‘Personal Strategy’ investment strategy; recommend, implement, and review investment strategies that align with clients’ risk tolerance and financial objectives, and engage with clients on portfolio, market, and economic discussions.</li><li>Provide clients with holistic financial planning on a large variety of subjects, including areas such as retirement planning, income optimization, tax-advantaged savings strategies, and education planning. This role will collaborate with Financial Planning Specialists on complex issues or comprehensive financial plans.</li><li>Effectively coordinate with advisory team and various EPW stakeholders for client-related requests.</li><li>Willingness and ability to effectively delegate, coach, train, and develop colleagues and resources.</li></ul><ul><li>Travel required to meet with clients face-to-face and build strong relationships.</li></ul><p></p><p><b>What You Will Bring</b></p><ul><li>10+ years related work experience in financial services and client experience</li><li>Previous experience with direct client contact while exhibiting a knowledgeable, professional demeanor is required.</li><li>Advanced knowledge of wealth management strategies, financial planning, tax and income optimization, and estate planning</li><li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills; strong interpersonal skills; detail oriented; able to manage many time-sensitive tasks simultaneously; pro-active self-starter, strong situational awareness and contextual thinking, and strong organizational and presentation skills</li><li>Exceptional at delivering effective client consultations – always composed, professional, and skilled at establishing trust and building long-term client relationships</li><li>Proven ability to navigate multiple client needs, deliver on multi-product goals, and analyze and present investment portfolios to clients</li><li>Proficient in or ability to quickly learn: Microsoft Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint, Salesforce, NetX360, and other proprietary and recordkeeping systems</li><li>Demonstrated success with high-net-worth clients, complicated planning, NPS, and client retention</li><li>Bachelor’s degree in business or related discipline or equivalent experience</li><li>FINRA Series 65 required</li><li>FINRA fingerprinting required</li><li>CFP strongly preferred</li></ul><p>#PJPW</p><p>#PJHTF</p><p></p><p><b>What we offer you</b></p><p></p><p>We offer an array of diverse and inclusive benefits regardless of where you are in your career. We believe that providing our employees with the means to lead healthy balanced lives results in the best possible work performance.</p><ul><li>Medical, dental, vision and life insurance</li><li>Retirement savings – 401(k) plan with generous company matching contributions (up to 6%), financial advisory services, potential company discretionary contribution, and a broad investment lineup</li><li>Tuition reimbursement up to $5,250/year</li><li><span>Business-casual</span> environment that includes the option to wear jeans</li><li>Generous paid time off upon hire – including a paid time off program plus ten paid company holidays and three floating holidays each calendar year</li><li>Paid volunteer time — 16 hours per calendar year</li><li>Leave of absence programs – including paid parental leave, paid short- and long-term disability, and Family and Medical Leave (FMLA)</li><li>Business Resource Groups (BRGs) – &nbsp;BRGs facilitate inclusion and collaboration across our business internally and throughout the communities where we live, work and play. BRGs are open to all.</li></ul><p></p><p></p><p></p><p><b>Base Salary Range</b></p>$114,000.00 - $165,300.00<p></p><p>The salary range above shows the typical minimum to maximum base salary range for this position in the location listed. Non-sales positions have the opportunity to participate in a bonus program. Sales positions are eligible for sales incentives, and in some instances a bonus plan, whereby total compensation may far exceed base salary depending on individual performance. Actual compensation offered may vary from posted hiring range based upon geographic location, work experience, education, licensure requirements and/or skill level and will be finalized at the time of offer.</p><p></p><p><span>Equal opportunity employer </span><i><span>•</span></i><span> &nbsp;Drug-free workplace</span></p><p></p><p><span>We are an equal opportunity employer with a commitment to diversity. &nbsp;All individuals, regardless of personal characteristics, are encouraged to apply. &nbsp;All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age (40 and over), race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, marital status, pregnancy, religion, physical or mental disability, military or veteran status, genetic information, or any other status protected by applicable state or local law.&nbsp;</span></p><p></p><p></p><p>***For remote and hybrid positions you will be required to provide reliable high-speed internet with a wired connection as well as a place in your home to work with limited disruption. You must have reliable connectivity from an internet service provider that is fiber, cable or DSL internet. Other necessary computer equipment, will be provided. You may be required to work in the office if you do not have an adequate home work environment and the required internet connection.***</p><p></p><p>Job Posting End Date at 12:01 am on:</p>06-23-2026<p></p><p><b>Want the latest money news and views shaping how we live, work and play? Stay in the know with </b><a href="https://www.empower.com/the-currency"><span><b>The Currency</b></span></a><b> &nbsp;and sign up for Empower’s free newsletter.</b></p></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/empower-retirement-senior-private-wealth-advisor-practice-lead-florida-region">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/empower-retirement-senior-private-wealth-advisor-practice-lead-florida-region</a></p>
</description>

      <category>Product</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5400/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Paris, France
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://ifs.com">http://ifs.com</a>
</p>

<div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Company Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>IFS is a billion-dollar revenue company with 7000+ employees on all continents. Our leading AI technology is the backbone of our award-winning enterprise software solutions, enabling our customers to be their best when it really matters–at the Moment of Service™. Our commitment to internal AI adoption has allowed us to stay at the forefront of technological advancements, ensuring our colleagues can unlock their creativity and productivity, and our solutions are always cutting-edge.</p><p>At IFS, we’re flexible, we’re innovative, and we’re focused not only on how we can engage with our customers but on how we can make a real change and have a worldwide impact. We help solve some of society’s greatest challenges, fostering a better future through our agility, collaboration, and trust.</p><p>We celebrate diversity and understand our responsibility to reflect the diverse world we work in. We are committed to promoting an inclusive workforce that fully represents the many different cultures, backgrounds, and viewpoints of our customers, our partners, and our communities. As a truly international company serving people from around the globe, we realize that our success is tantamount to the respect we have for those different points of view.</p><p>By joining our team, you will have the opportunity to be part of a <strong>global, diverse environment;</strong> you will be joining a <strong>winning team</strong> with a <strong>commitment to sustainability;</strong> and a company where we get things done so that you can <strong>make a positive impact</strong> on the world.</p><p>We’re looking for innovative and original thinkers to work in an environment where you can <strong>#MakeYourMoment</strong> so that we can help others make theirs. With the power of our AI-driven solutions, we empower our team to change the status quo and make a real difference.</p><p>If you want to change the status quo, we’ll help you make your moment. Join Team Purple. Join IFS.</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Job Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><strong>IFS Copperleaf</strong>’s software helps some of the world’s largest firms make better strategic decisions. We have a track record of delivering award-winning, industry-changing solutions that enable our clients to build more resilient and sustainable infrastructure.</p><p>Having built and continuously expanding our footprint in the Asset Intensive Market across Europe, we have an opening for a&nbsp;<strong>Account Executive</strong>&nbsp;to develop and execute a go-to market sales strategy across France.&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p><strong>Region &amp; Language:</strong></p><p>The ideal candidate is based in France. You’ll be working remotely from your home city and have responsibility for sales to target accounts in your region. Business fluency in French and English is essential.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p><p>As one of IFS Copperleaf’s Account Executives you will drive the identification and qualification of opportunities while executing account strategy, and generating license, support and services revenues in the region.</p><p>You will be building, facilitating, and maintaining successful relationships with customers, which will be measured by their referenceability, customer satisfaction levels, increased revenue levels and overall account penetration.</p><p><strong>Your role will include the following activities:</strong></p><ul><li>Identify, pursue, and close new sales opportunities through the successful execution of the sales process</li><li>Actively engage with prospective clients and stakeholders to develop relationships at a senior</li><li>executive level with key decision makers</li><li>Work with the wider IFS Copperleaf team (e.g. Technical Sales, Sales Leadership, Marketing etc.) to understand prospect’s current business practices and strategic drivers, develop and identify pain points and create a vision for solving these key pain points</li><li>Continuously gather knowledge of competitors and how to effectively position our solution</li><li>Drive a sales process that will highlight our solution as a strategic advantage to the prospect</li><li>Routinely discuss and communicate opportunity plan sales strategy with other members of the account team, as well as field and corporate management</li><li>Maintain an accurate and documented pipeline of opportunities (prospects and suspects) within CRM</li><li>Attend industry functions, such as association events and conferences, and provide feedback and information on market and creative trends</li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Qualifications</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li>You’re an experienced expert in solution selling and value based selling methodologies</li><li>You know how to navigate complex organizations and have general familiarity with consultative selling training methodologies for complex Sales.</li><li>You have experience and are comfortable selling enterprise software to C level executives</li><li>You can position new business within the account by developing, communicating and driving effective selling strategies that are based on valid, customer-specific value proposition</li><li>You have dynamic presentation skills, ability to articulate customer problems and challenges, and then link them to the value proposition</li><li>You enjoy travelling and are willing to spend 50% of your time visiting clients or attending industry events in the region</li><li>Experience in utility, transport, manufacturing, pharma, chemical, Oil &amp; Gas or related industries is a benefit</li><li>You have a Bachelor’s degree in an engineering or analytical discipline</li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Additional Information</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><em>We believe that coming together as a community, in person, is important for innovation, connection and fostering a sense of belonging. Our roles have the right balance of remote and in-office working to enable flexibility for managing your life along with ensuring a real connection with your colleagues and the broader IFS community.</em></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/ifs-account-executive-net-new-copperleaf-france">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/ifs-account-executive-net-new-copperleaf-france</a></p>
</description>

      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/5402/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Lodgify: Senior Data Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Cross-Browser Development, Infrastructure Orchestration, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Computer Vision, NoSQL, PostgreeSQL, Cross-Selling, Data Cleaning, and ETL Processes</skills>
      <category>Product</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5402/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Spain
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://lodgify.com">http://lodgify.com</a>
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>⭐ </span><strong>Who we are </strong></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span>Lodgify is a fast-growing scale-up company leading the vacation rental industry. Backed by $30M in funding, our platform empowers property owners and managers worldwide to efficiently manage and grow their business through technology.</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span>Headquartered in sunny Barcelona, we're now a team of 380+ people representing over 60 nationalities, united by a passion for transforming the future of short-term rentals.</span></div><div><br></div><div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<h3><strong>⭐ <span>Role Overview</span></strong></h3>
</div>
<div>Lodgify is seeking an experienced Senior Data Engineer to join our growing team and play a vital role in building and managing our modern data platform.</div>
<div>This role involves designing, implementing, and optimizing data pipelines and infrastructure, enabling data-driven decisions across the company.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>⭐ How will you make an impact?</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and infrastructure using our core data stack</li>
<li>Implement data quality checks, monitoring, and contribute to data governance practices</li>
<li>Develop and optimise data models using dbt for analytics and operational use cases</li>
<li>Troubleshoot data issues, potentially assisting with tracking implementation problems</li>
<li>Ensure data infrastructure supports downstream consumers, including analytics and potentially future AI/ML initiatives</li>
<li>Collaborate with analysts and stakeholders to ensure data accessibility for visualisation and operational syncing (Hightouch)</li>
<li>Optimise performance and cost-efficiency of the data platform</li>
<li>Mentor team members and promote data engineering best practices.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>⭐ What makes you a great fit?</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>7+ years in data engineering, with significant hands-on experience using modern data stack tools</li>
<li>Advanced SQL, proficient Python for data engineering tasks, strong data modeling and warehousing fundamentals</li>
<li>Proven experience with tools like orchestration (e.g.,&nbsp;<a class="postings-link" href="http://mage.ai/">mage.ai</a>, Airflow), dbt, ELT solutions (e.g., Fivetran, Airbyte)</li>
<li>Experience with a cloud platform (GCP, AWS, Azure)</li>
<li>Track record of building and maintaining reliable, end-to-end data pipelines in production</li>
<li>Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams and clearly communicate technical concepts</li>
<li>Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>⭐&nbsp;How can you earn extra bonus points?</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>Knowledge of JavaScript/Frontend for tracking and troubleshooting</li>
<li>Experience with BI/visualisation tools</li>
<li>Familiarity with Machine Learning concepts and the data requirements for training and deploying models</li>
<li>Familiarity with event-driven architectures or data privacy regulations (GDPR)</li>
<li>SaaS or Travel/Hospitality industry experience.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><strong>Why you’ll love us:</strong></div>
<div><em>You’ll be part of a growing, dynamic company with a truly international team. At Lodgify, we are full of contagious energy, hard work, and passion for what we do. We celebrate diversity and are proud to acknowledge a variety of backgrounds, perspectives and skills in our team; committed to creating a workplace where everyone is heard and feels a sense of belonging.</em></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong>What's in it for you?</strong><span>*</span></div>
<p><span>🏠 <strong>Remote Flexibility</strong>: The freedom to work from home any day that works for you.</span></p>
<p><span>🌴 <strong>Time to Recharge:</strong> 25 working days of paid vacation and Jornada Intensiva in August.</span><span>.</span></p>
<p><span>💊 <strong>Alan Health Insurance</strong>: Premium health, dental, and mental health support via Alan. Pre-existing conditions are covered.</span></p>
<p><span>😋&nbsp;<strong>Meal Perk:</strong> <strong>€150/month allowance</strong> on your Alan card + 50% off Ametller Origen prepared dishes at the office.</span></p>
<p><span>💸 <strong>Tax-Free Savings</strong>: Increase your take-home pay by using Flexible Remuneration for extra meal costs (up to €70/mo) and public transport (up to €136/mo).</span></p>
<p><span>🖥️ <strong>Home Office Gear:</strong> We provide a <strong>table, ergonomic chair, and monitor</strong> for your home setup.</span></p>
<p><span>🇪🇸 <strong>Language Learning</strong>: Free Spanish classes.</span></p>
<p><span>🤑 <strong>Referrals:</strong> Cash rewards for bringing in new talent.&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span>🌟 <strong>Social Life:</strong> Daily office breakfast and monthly team events</span></p>
<p><span>🎯 <strong>Dynamic Hub: </strong>A high-energy, inclusive environment designed for collaboration and connection with a team that represents over 60 countries.</span></p>
<p>*Benefits offered may differ based on the type of contract that is issued</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>So, what are you waiting for? </strong><em><strong>Apply now!</strong></em></p>
<p><strong>All applications and CVs must be submitted in English 😉</strong></p></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/5403/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Insider One: Product Manager - B2B SaaS (Martech) - Europe</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Paid Social Media Advertising, Social Media Marketing, Tracking and Attribution, Bug Tracking, Social Media Management, Social Media Ads, KPI Tracking, Social Media Content, Inventory Tracking, and Display Advertising</skills>
      <category>Product</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5403/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Berlin, Germany / Amsterdam, Netherlands / Hamburg / London, United Kingdom
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://insiderone.com">http://insiderone.com</a>
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Before jumping into all the information about the role and what you can bring to the table, let us introduce ourselves real quick.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>About us</span></b></div><div><br></div><div><span>Insider One is the</span><b><span> #1 platform </span></b><span>that brings everything marketing and customer engagement teams need in one place so they can reach their peak potential and </span><b><span>become unstoppable.&nbsp;</span></b></div><div><br></div><div><span>Our story began with six desks and a vision to create a single platform to make industry-first technologies and emerging channels accessible to marketers worldwide. Today, Insider One is powered </span><b><span>by 1,500+ team members representing 50+ nationalities across 30+ offices</span></b><span>.&nbsp; With AI at its core and an integrated Customer Data Platform (CDP),</span><b><span> Insider One unites data, personalization, and journey orchestration across the most extensive set of natively supported channels</span></b><span>, including WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Web, App, and Site Search.&nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>We recently raised one of the largest funding rounds in the industry,</span><b><span> a $500M Series E led by General Atlantic</span></b><span>. We are backed by top-notch investors, including </span><b><span>Sequoia Capital, QIA, Riverwood, and Endeavor Catalyst</span></b><span>, and trusted by 2000+ customers from high-growth startups to the most prestigious Fortune 500 companies such as Samsung, Nike, L’Oreal, Singapore Airlines, Nestlé, Nissan, Lenovo, Puma, IKEA, Allianz, Domino's, and the list goes on.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Insider One was congratulated for becoming one of the only </span><b><span>woman-founded, women-led B2B SaaS unicorns </span></b><span>in the world. Loved by customers, recognized by analysts, </span><b><span>we are the only vendor recognized as the #1 leader</span></b><span> in all the capabilities marketing and customer engagement teams need. Don’t just take our word for it —</span><a href="https://www.gartner.com/reviews/market/multichannel-marketing-hubs/compare/product/braze-customer-engagement-platform-vs-insider-vs-salesforce-cloud"><span> see for yourself</span></a><span>. We consistently outperform and continue our leadership, and&nbsp;</span><a href="https://insiderone.com/insider-migration/"><span>the results speak for themselves</span></a><span>.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>From day one, Insider One’s mission has not only been to build a world-class product company, but also to create one of the</span><b><span> most socially progressive technology communities</span></b><span> in the world. Through our social responsibility initiatives like </span><i><span>100 Social Responsibility Projects, AI Training for Teachers, Code Academy, SheCodes, SheLeads, and SheMarkables</span></i><span>, our community has committed to scaling its impact on our communities across 30+ countries, driving initiatives in health, education, farming, animal rights, and increasing women’s representation in STEM.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Behind all these achievements is </span><b><span>an exceptionally talented, visionary team of overachievers</span></b><span> that moves fast and agile, creating cutting-edge products, and focuses on making an impact. If you want to be a part of this journey, just keep reading.</span></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><strong>We are looking for a Product Manager who wants to make the dream a reality.</strong></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong>What is our mission?</strong></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>We are visionaries who guide new product ideas. We are setting the vision for our growing family of products. We use data, research, strategy, and empathy to guide development and design teams toward a common goal since we believe that only our products can alter Insider One`s destiny. We are Insider One’s innovators, our impact starts on day one, and our mission is to prove that break-through products can be created outside Silicon Valley.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong>What are we offering?</strong></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong>Impact</strong>; be a part of a world-class product team where we constantly get challenged with new things and the results of our actions create an impact for hundreds of millions of users every day.</div>
<div><strong>Personal Growth</strong>; work closely with experienced PMs, get mentored by some of the best people in their fields, join tons of different training like sales, design, customer communication. Develop the skills that you need to become a successful product manager.</div>
<div><strong>Experience</strong>; get important responsibilities, learn from your mistakes without getting blamed, watch experienced people work on complex matters, gain one of the most important things to become a great product manager, experience.</div>
<div><strong>Delight</strong>; make tough decisions, release new features, create innovating products which bring ease and joy to the life of many individuals who use them.</div>
<div><strong>Community</strong>; surround yourself with great people who constantly help each other and push each other to be better, join many different events, and become a part of the Insider One Community.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong>What are we searching for?</strong></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong>Leadership</strong>, you can make decisions and set direction while motivating and inspiring people around you to follow you in that direction.</div>
<div><strong>Communication</strong>, you serve as the diplomat of the team, you can transmit complex information to different audiences clearly and you are talented in reaching the information you need on the people you are talking to.</div>
<div><strong>Problem Solving</strong>, you are a natural-born problem solver, finding solutions to complex problems motivates and excites you, and at that moment when you solve the problem, feeling that sense of accomplishment is worth all the effort.</div>
<div><strong>Teamwork</strong>, you are easily able to work with people around you, help them when they need, give or take constructive feedback, despite any personal conflict between you and them.&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong>Listening</strong>, despite the fact that communicating effectively is extremely important, you should also be able to gather information from many sources around you to help you make better-informed decisions on guiding and improving your products and services.</div>
<div><strong>Entrepreneurial Spirit</strong>, rather than waiting to adapt to change, you are actively seeking out change. You have a mindset that embraces critical questioning, innovation, and improvement. You can see the big picture, you are willing to take risks, you constantly seek new opportunities for innovation and you take ownership and pride in what you do. What are you going to do?</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You Will Do</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>Define the <em>why</em>, <em>when</em>, and <em>what</em> of the products our engineering team builds, leading cross-functional teams from ideation to launch.</li>
<li>Build a product and strategy that reflect <strong>Insider One’s vision</strong>, clearly articulating business value to align the team around each release.</li>
<li>Own and optimize the <strong>release process</strong>, coordinating all activities to bring products to market successfully.</li>
<li>Manage and prioritize initiatives, turning insights into actionable ideas by continuously tracking market trends, customer needs, and emerging technologies.</li>
<li>Define and analyze key <strong>product metrics</strong> to measure performance, customer satisfaction, and improvement opportunities.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You Will Need</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>A <strong>Bachelor’s degree</strong> from a top-tier university, preferably in Engineering, Business Management, or a related field.</li>
<li><strong>3+ years of Product Management experience</strong>, preferably with a <strong>B2B SaaS product</strong>.</li>
<li><strong>Hands-on experience in Agile Product Development</strong>.</li>
<li>Exceptional <strong>decision-making</strong> and <strong>communication</strong> skills.</li>
<li>The ability to <strong>manage complex initiatives</strong> with limited supervision.</li>
<li><strong>Fluent in English and Turkish</strong>, both written and verbal, as we have colleagues from all over the world.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What We Offer</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><ul>
<li>Be part of a diverse team that’s as global as it gets — where every voice is heard and 50+ nationalities build together.</li>
<li>Level up with internal trainings covering AI fundamentals, coding, foreign languages, and a wide range of personal development skills.</li>
<li>Feed your curiosity with access to Spotify, LinkedIn Learning, Blinkist, MasterClass, and CloudGuru.</li>
<li>Become a Shareowner through our eligibility-based “ESOP” and own a piece of what you build.</li>
<li>Help build the team you want to work with and enjoy rewarding referral bonuses.</li>
<li>Opportunities to give back to your community through volunteering and purpose-driven social impact projects.</li>
<li>From global retreats to team-building activities, expect year-round events that turn into lifelong memories.</li>
<li>Get inspired by the greatest minds in the tech industry through events like our Tech &amp; Dev Talks.</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>We aren't just hiring for a position; we are hiring for a mission — a mission to build a lasting legacy that will set the benchmark for the most progressive tech companies out there.&nbsp;</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>To do this, we are looking for exceptional talent to join a community of good-hearted individuals who take high ownership and are relentlessly driven to go the extra mile.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>If this sounds like who you are and where you aspire to be, we are excited to meet you.</div><div><br></div><div><span>We provide equal opportunity in a zero-discrimination workplace and not just welcome but also embrace everyone without regard to sex, race, color, nationality, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability status, citizenship, or marital status.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Please follow Insider One on </span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/insiderone/">LinkedIn</a><span>, </span><a href="https://www.instagram.com/insideronehq/">Instagram</a><span>, <a href="https://x.com/insideronehq">X</a>, <a href="https://www.facebook.com/insideronehq/">Facebook </a>and </span><a class="postings-link" href="https://medium.com/insiderengineering"><span>Medium</span></a><span>!</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/insider-one-product-manager-b2b-saas-martech-europe">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/insider-one-product-manager-b2b-saas-martech-europe</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Nexer: Desenvolvedor CRM Sênior - BR</title>
      <region>SP</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>CRM, Cross-Browser Development, Infrastructure Orchestration, Computer Vision, DevOps, CRM Systems, Cross-Selling, CRM Integration, APIs, and REST APIs</skills>
      <category>Customer Support</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5398/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Barueri, SP, Brazil
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://nexerea.com.br">http://nexerea.com.br</a>
</p>

<div class="mb-4"><div><p><strong>NEXER</strong></p>
<p>Quer fazer parte de uma empresa inovadora, que está transformando o mercado de Dynamics que conta com mais de 350 especialistas na plataforma Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&amp;O, CRM e Business Central?</p>
<p>Venha para a <a href="https://nexergroup.com/br/en/">Nexer Brazil</a>😁 uma empresa com mais de 16 anos no mercado, que faz parte de uma <strong>Multinacional Sueca </strong>presente em 9 países com mais de 2.500 funcionários no mundo. Somos uma das maiores <span>parceiras Microsoft na América Latina e a principal consultoria brasileira de implantação do ERP Dynamics 365 F&amp;O, Dynamics 365 CRM e Business Central.</span></p>
<p>A Nexer Brasil, fazemos parceria com a principal empresa mundial de software, a <strong>Microsoft</strong>, para oferecer a você a melhor plataforma possível construída com as tecnologias mais recentes. E como <span>Microsoft Partner com selos nas 5 SOLUTIONS AREAS</span>, somos líderes na comunidade de parceiros e podemos oferecer a você:</p>
<ul>
<li>Uma equipe unificada de especialistas com treinamento avançado e ampla experiência na tecnologia que hoje é líder mundial.</li>
<li>O mais alto nível de padrões em toda a indústria.</li>
<li>As melhores ferramentas e frameworks da categoria.</li>
<li>Experiência consultiva em uma das melhores empresas de implementação dos produtos Microsoft do setor.</li>
<li>Certificações Microsoft</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Nosso momento...</strong></p>
<p>Estamos em franca expansão e buscamos novos profissionais para integrar o nosso time de <strong>CRM</strong> 😎</p>
<p><strong>📝 Atividades:</strong></p>
<p>🔧 Desenvolvimento e Desenho de Soluções</p>
<ul>
<li>Projetar, desenvolver e otimizar plugins avançados em C#, incluindo pipelines complexos, execução assíncrona e padrões de arquitetura modernos.</li>
<li>Criar e manter Web Resources em JavaScript utilizando práticas modernas (modularização, ES6+, padrões de design).</li>
<li>Desenvolver Custom Actions, Custom APIs e extensões avançadas do Dynamics 365.</li>
<li>Projetar e implementar estruturas de dados complexas (entidades, relacionamentos, hierarquias, regras de negócio, formulários, views e command bars).</li>
</ul>
<p>☁️ Integrações e Serviços em Nuvem</p>
<ul>
<li>Construir e manter integrações robustas utilizando Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus, Event Grid e outros serviços modernos do Azure.</li>
<li>Trabalhar com APIs REST e OData do Dynamics 365, garantindo segurança, performance e governança.</li>
<li>Implementar padrões de integração como mensageria, filas, eventos e arquiteturas orientadas a microsserviços quando aplicável.</li>
</ul>
<p>⚙️ Power Platform e Automação</p>
<ul>
<li>Criar soluções avançadas com Power Automate, incluindo fluxos complexos, conectores personalizados e automações de larga escala.</li>
<li>Atuar com Power Apps Model-Driven, Canvas Apps e Power Pages, garantindo aderência às melhores práticas.</li>
<li>Contribuir para governança e ALM (Application Lifecycle Management) utilizando Power Platform Build Tools, pipelines e Git.</li>
</ul>
<p>🛡️ Qualidade, Segurança e Performance</p>
<ul>
<li>Realizar revisões de código, aplicar padrões de arquitetura e garantir boas práticas de desenvolvimento seguro.</li>
<li>Monitorar e otimizar performance de plugins, consultas, integrações e fluxos.</li>
<li>Implementar estratégias de logging, telemetria e observabilidade utilizando Application Insights e ferramentas correlatas.</li>
</ul>
<p>🧩 Suporte Avançado e Apoio ao Time</p>
<ul>
<li>Atuar como referência técnica para o time, apoiando desenvolvedores júnior e pleno.</li>
<li>Conduzir troubleshooting avançado, análise de incidentes e resolução de problemas críticos.</li>
<li>Participar de decisões arquiteturais e contribuir para a evolução da plataforma dentro dos clientes.</li>
<li>Manter-se atualizado com tendências do ecossistema Microsoft, incluindo Dataverse, Copilot Studio, AI Builder e integrações com serviços de IA.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Venha ser um(a) Nexer 🚀</strong></p></div> <h5 class="title">Requirements</h5> <div><p><strong>O que esperamos de você:</strong></p>
<p>🛠️ Competências Técnicas</p>
<ul>
<li>Compromisso com qualidade de entrega, incluindo execução de testes (unitários, integrados e funcionais), validação de cenários críticos e garantia de estabilidade antes da implantação</li>
<li>Domínio sólido de .NET e C#, com experiência em desenvolvimento de soluções complexas e escaláveis.</li>
<li>Proficiência em JavaScript, incluindo uso de bibliotecas e padrões modernos de desenvolvimento.</li>
<li>Bom conhecimento em desenvolvimento web (HTML, CSS e tecnologias front-end complementares).</li>
<li>Capacidade de aplicar boas práticas de arquitetura, padrões de projeto e princípios de desenvolvimento seguro.</li>
<li>Vivência com modelagem de dados orientada ao negócio, garantindo aderência e eficiência nas soluções.</li>
<li>Experiência em análise de performance, otimização de código e identificação de gargalos técnicos.</li>
<li>Habilidade para projetar, desenvolver e manter aplicações web robustas em colaboração com equipes multidisciplinares.</li>
<li>Capacidade de traduzir requisitos funcionais em soluções técnicas bem estruturadas e de alta qualidade.</li>
<li>Experiência consistente em troubleshooting avançado e resolução de problemas complexos.</li>
</ul>
<p>🤝 Competências Interpessoais</p>
<ul>
<li>Comunicação clara, objetiva e colaborativa, facilitando o alinhamento entre áreas técnicas e de negócio.</li>
<li>Capacidade de trabalhar próximo aos clientes, compreendendo suas necessidades e propondo soluções eficazes.</li>
<li>Valorizamos profissionais que buscam estabilidade e engajamento em projetos de médio a longo prazo, acompanhando a evolução das demandas e garantindo consistência nas entregas</li>
<li>Mentalidade orientada à qualidade, com foco em código limpo, sustentável e de fácil manutenção.</li>
<li>Atenção aos detalhes e forte capacidade analítica para tomada de decisões técnicas.</li>
<li>Proatividade na identificação de melhorias, otimizações e oportunidades de evolução contínua.</li>
<li>Maturidade profissional para atuar com autonomia, responsabilidade e visão sistêmica.</li>
</ul>
<p><br>📌 Experiência</p>
<p>Mínimo de 4 anos de experiência nas atividades e tecnologias mencionadas.</p>
<p>🌍 Idiomas</p>
<ul>
<li>Inglês: obrigatório, com capacidade de leitura técnica, comunicação e participação em reuniões quando necessário.</li>
<li>Espanhol: desejável, especialmente para interação com clientes ou equipes de países hispanofalantes.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>O que aumentam as suas chances:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Inglês avançado;</li>
<li>Domínio em Power Automate;</li>
<li>Domínio em componentes do Azure.</li>
<li>Nível de experiência: Sênior (4+ anos de experiência).</li>
</ul></div> <div><h5 class="title">Benefits</h5> <div><p>CLT:</p>
<p>🥗 VA de R$ 260,00 e VR de R$ 770,00</p>
<p>🩺 Plano de Saúde Porto Seguro</p>
<p>🎒 Auxílio Creche</p>
<p>🗣️ Incentivo Idiomas - Parceria com Plataforma direcionada</p>
<p>💳 Cartão Multibenefícios de R$ 500,00 a R$ 1.000 se você fala inglês (mediante a teste)</p>
<p>👩‍🎓 Parcerias com: Mackenzie, USP Esalq, Senac e Renault on Demand</p>
<p>📃 Certificações Microsoft</p>
<p>🌍 Possibilidade de atuação em projetos internacionais</p>
<p>🏦 Empréstimo consignado&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>PJ:</p>
<p>🏖️ Ausência Remunerada - 10 dias ao ano</p>
<p>🩺 Plano de Saúde Porto Seguro</p>
<p>🗣️ Incentivo Idiomas -&nbsp;Parceria com Plataforma direcionada</p>
<p>💳 Cartão Multibenefícios de R$ 500,00 a R$ 1.000 se você fala inglês (mediante a teste)</p>
<p>👩‍🎓 Parcerias com: Mackenzie, USP Esalq, Senac e Renault on Demand</p>
<p>📃 Certificações Microsoft</p>
<p>🌍 Possibilidade de atuação em projetos internacionais</p></div></div> </div>

    <item>
      <title>Auvo Tecnologia: Analista de Lifecycle & CRM</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Analytics, CRM, Data Visualization, Digital Marketing, Email Marketing and Automation, Google Analytics, CRM Systems, Analytics Tools, CRM Integration, and  Data Visualization</skills>
      <category>Customer Support</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> BR
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://auvo.com">http://auvo.com</a>
</p>

<div><h3>SOBRE A OPORTUNIDADE</h3>
<p>Estamos buscando uma pessoa Analista de Lifecycle &amp; CRM para se juntar à nossa Squad de Growth, atuando lado a lado com os times de RevOps, Sales, Customer Success e Produto, com foco em Lifecycle &amp; CRM para Brasil e LATAM.</p>
<p>Essa não é uma vaga para quem quer aprender o que é CRM. É para quem já domina a estratégia, executa com autonomia, monitora os próprios resultados e está pronto(a) para evoluir continuamente. Você vai operar e evoluir estratégias de relacionamento e conversão usando CRM, automação e dados, com dois pilares claros:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Land (Aquisição via base): utilizar a base existente de contatos e negócios para gerar levantada de mão, estimular MQLs e apoiar a geração de New MRR, reduzindo a dependência exclusiva de mídia paga.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Expand (Clientes): atuar com a base de clientes a partir do onboarding, com foco em ativação, engajamento, retenção, adoção e expansão, apoiando estratégias de upsell e cross-sell em parceria com CS, Produto e RevOps.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>Além da execução das réguas e automações, essa pessoa terá papel importante em dashboards, documentação e governança de CRM, garantindo clareza, rastreabilidade e escala da operação de lifecycle para BR e LATAM.</p>
<p>Se você curte um bom desafio, está sempre em busca de evolução, tem espírito empreendedor e vontade de fazer a diferença, essa vaga é pra você! 💜</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<h3>RESPONSABILIDADES E ATRIBUIÇÕES</h3>
<p>Lifecycle &amp; CRM — Land (Aquisição via base)</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Operar e evoluir réguas de relacionamento com foco em gerar demanda via base própria.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Executar cadências de nutrição, recuperação de leads frios e reativação de contatos.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Criar segmentações por histórico de interação, ICP, intenção e país (BR e LATAM).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Estruturar fluxos para estimular levantada de mão, gerar MQLs e apoiar New MRR.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>Lifecycle &amp; CRM — Expand (Clientes)</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Operar réguas e automações para toda a jornada do cliente: onboarding, ativação, engajamento, retenção.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Executar cadências de recuperação de inatividade e reativação de clientes churnados (winback).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Identificar sinais de oportunidade de upsell, cross-sell e add-ons junto a CS e Growth.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Executar comunicações de expansão baseadas em uso, maturidade e valor percebido.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>CRM, Automação e Dados</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Operar de forma avançada ferramentas de CRM e automação (HubSpot ou similares).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Criar e manter segmentações, listas dinâmicas, propriedades e fluxos no CRM.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Garantir higiene de base, governança de campos e consistência de nomenclaturas.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Configurar UTMs e regras de tracking para rastreabilidade CRM x funil x receita.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>Dashboards, Análises e Documentação</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Criar e manter dashboards operacionais e gerenciais de lifecycle (Land + Expand + funil).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Acompanhar métricas e gerar insights contínuos: MQLs, conversão, churn, expansão influenciada.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Documentar réguas, lógica de segmentação, regras de automação e dicionário de campos.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>Atuação Brasil &amp; LATAM</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Adaptar cadências e mensagens por idioma, maturidade de mercado e contexto cultural.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Levar insights estruturados de LATAM para Growth, CS e Produto.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3>REQUISITOS E QUALIFICAÇÕES</h3>
<p>O que você precisa ter</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Experiência prévia com CRM, automação de marketing e/ou lifecycle.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Vivência em ambiente B2B e/ou SaaS (preferencialmente com base SMB).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Perfil analítico e organizado: dados, dashboards e processos fazem parte da rotina.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Capacidade de trabalhar com autonomia e em times multidisciplinares.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>Diferenciais que brilham os olhos</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Experiência avançada com HubSpot e automações complexas.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Looker / Looker Studio, GA4, leitura de funil e conversões.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Vivência com reativação de base e geração de demanda via CRM.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Espanhol intermediário/avançado para suportar operação com LATAM.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Conhecimento de mercados LATAM e atuação multicultural.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3>SALÁRIO E BENEFÍCIOS</h3>
<p><strong>Remuneração competitiva</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Salário fixo (a cominar) + Comissão (média de R$1.800,00) - seu esforço é recompensado!</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>🍽️ Vale-Alimentação</strong></p>
<p>R$32,67 por dia, média de R$718,00 por mês.</p>
<p><strong>📚 Auxílio Educação</strong></p>
<p>R$212,00 por mês no nosso <strong>benefício flexível</strong>, para investir no seu crescimento pessoal e profissional.</p>
<p><strong>🩺 Saúde e Bem-estar</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Plano de saúde com subsídio</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Plano odontológico completo</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Seguro de vida</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Wellhub (antigo Gympass) – cuide do corpo e da mente com acesso a academias, apps e muito mais!</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>🌏Fluency Academy</strong><br>Tenha acesso a<strong> 8 idiomas</strong>, com descontos exclusivos, para impulsionar sua carreira!</p>
<p>🎓<strong>IPOG</strong><br>Descontos em mensalidades de Graduação, Pós-Graduação e Cursos de Curta Duração!</p>
<p>🏖️ <strong>Convênio Nacional com o SESC </strong>– lazer e cultura para toda a família.</p>
<p>🎉<strong> Day Off no seu aniversário</strong> – aproveite o seu dia como quiser!</p>
<p>👕 <strong>No dress code</strong> – aqui, você é livre para ser quem é!&nbsp;<br><br></p>
<h3>DIFERENCIAIS</h3>
<p>📈 <strong>Plano de Carreira</strong> – oportunidades reais de crescimento e desenvolvimento para construir uma trajetória de sucesso.<br>🏆<strong>Stock Options</strong> – após 2 anos de casa, você pode se inscrever para participar do nosso programa de Stock Options – uma oportunidade real de, se aprovado, se tornar sócio da Auvo.<br>👶<strong>Licença Maternidade e Paternidade Estendidos</strong> – mais tempo para curtir e cuidar desse momento tão especial com sua família – 6 meses de licença maternidade e 20 dias de licença paternidade.<br>📤<strong>Programa de Indicação</strong> – indique novos talentos e ganhe R$300,00 por cada indicação contratada que concluir o período de experiência com sucesso.</p>
<h3>📍 INFORMAÇÕES ADICIONAIS</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Regime de contratação: </strong>CLT</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Modelo:</strong> Remoto</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Horário de trabalho:</strong>&nbsp; segunda à sexta-feira, das 08h às 18h.</p>
</li>
</ul></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/auvo-tecnologia-analista-de-lifecycle-crm">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/auvo-tecnologia-analista-de-lifecycle-crm</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Toggl: Senior Product Manager</title>

    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://toggl.com/jobs/">https://toggl.com/jobs/</a>
</p>

<p>We are looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Senior Product Manager</strong>&nbsp;to join one of our&nbsp;<strong>Product Tribes</strong>, the cross-functional units that own the end-to-end experience for a specific Toggl user role. You own your Tribe's direction, prioritization, and outcomes while working hands-on with design and engineering to ship work that matters. You'll do this as we build and launch&nbsp;<strong>Toggl Focus</strong>, our consolidated planning, time tracking, and time intelligence product.</p>
<p>The salary for this position is&nbsp;<strong>€90,000 annually.</strong></p>
<p>You can work&nbsp;<strong>from anywhere in the world as long as your main location is between UTC-4 and UTC+4.</strong></p>
<h2><strong>The Role</strong></h2>
<p>As a Senior Product Manager, you own a product area end-to-end: its direction, prioritization, and outcomes. You are accountable not for process, but for clarity, judgment, and results. You work hands-on with design, engineering, and revenue to identify the highest-value opportunities, shape effective solutions, and ship improvements that matter. You act as a player-coach, raising the quality of thinking, decision-making, and execution within your Tribe.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p>Your main responsibilities will be:</p>
<p><strong>Direction and prioritization</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Set clear direction for your Tribe.</strong>&nbsp;Define goals, translate company priorities into team focus, and identify the biggest opportunities and risks.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Make strong prioritization calls.</strong>&nbsp;Decide what to do and what not to do, sequence work sensibly, and keep low-value work out of the team.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Develop a strong point of view</strong>&nbsp;on your product area. Understand users, the market, and the business deeply enough to make tradeoffs and say no clearly, without escalating decisions unnecessarily.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Discovery and solution shaping</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Build real understanding of user problems</strong>&nbsp;through customer calls, support and sales input, user research, and data.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Shape solutions with design and engineering.</strong>&nbsp;Frame problems, compare options and constraints, and keep solutions tied to user and business value.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Hands-on leadership</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Lead designers within your Tribe.</strong>&nbsp;Guide prototyping, user testing, and UX quality as embedded builders, not through handoffs.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Stay close to the work through execution.</strong>&nbsp;Review flows, experiments, metrics, and shipped output. Resolve ambiguity quickly. Help the team converge faster.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Coach your team</strong>&nbsp;by sharpening problem framing, improving decision quality, and keeping focus on the highest-value work.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Metrics, learning, and communication</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Define success upfront</strong>&nbsp;for every initiative with clear OKRs, KPIs, leading indicators, and kill criteria. Measure impact after launch and decide whether to iterate, scale, or roll back.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Participate in roadmap reviews</strong>, sharing upcoming priorities with leadership and internal stakeholders and surfacing tradeoffs and risks early.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Explain direction and decisions simply.</strong>&nbsp;Keep stakeholders aligned with minimal overhead.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>AI as core leverage</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Use AI tools extensively in your daily work</strong>&nbsp;for research, synthesis, analysis, drafting, exploration, and prototyping, and set that expectation across your Tribe. AI fluency is not optional. It's part of how you increase your speed, depth, and impact.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2><strong>About You</strong></h2>
<p>You will thrive in this role if you:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Have&nbsp;<strong>proven product management experience</strong>, ideally in B2B SaaS, or have built and shipped products people actually use, whether as a PM, founder, or in another role where you owned product decisions end to end.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Hold an&nbsp;<strong>extremely high bar for product quality.</strong>&nbsp;You've developed real craft in product development. You know what great looks like, you notice the details others miss, and you don't ship work you wouldn't be proud to put your name on.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Have&nbsp;<strong>strong product judgment.</strong>&nbsp;You develop a clear point of view on your area, make grounded tradeoffs, and say no without needing permission.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Are a&nbsp;<strong>problem-first thinker.</strong>&nbsp;You start from user needs and business impact, not from solutions or feature lists.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Can&nbsp;<strong>define and own outcomes rigorously.</strong>&nbsp;You set KPIs, run experiments, interpret data, and make tough calls based on results. You're accountable for whether the work matters, not just whether it gets done.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Thrive in ambiguity and move fast.</strong>&nbsp;You don't wait for perfect information or permission. You make confident decisions, adapt when new insights emerge, and course-correct without drama.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Can&nbsp;<strong>pick up a new domain fast.</strong>&nbsp;You're comfortable ramping into unfamiliar user segments and becoming the expert your Tribe needs.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Have a&nbsp;<strong>strong understanding of product-led growth principles</strong>&nbsp;and know how to balance self-serve adoption with sales-assisted motions for larger accounts.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Are&nbsp;<strong>hands-on with AI tools.</strong>&nbsp;You actively use AI for research, analysis, drafting, and prototyping as a core part of how you work, not a side experiment.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Don't need to be managed.</strong>&nbsp;You set your own direction, keep people in the loop, and ask for help when it matters.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Have&nbsp;<strong>excellent written and verbal English communication skills.</strong>&nbsp;You explain direction and decisions simply, communicate tradeoffs clearly, and articulate customer value without jargon.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Value&nbsp;<strong>transparency, ownership, and speed over perfection.</strong>&nbsp;You ship, learn, and improve rather than waiting for the perfect plan.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Nice to have: experience&nbsp;<strong>leading designers</strong>&nbsp;as embedded product builders, guiding user research, prototyping, and usability testing as part of an integrated discovery process, not as a separate handoff step.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2><strong>This Role Is NOT</strong></h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>A meeting organizer, ticket router, or status reporter.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A layer between functions or a process owner whose main contribution is ceremony.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A roadmap administrator who writes detailed specs and manages backlogs rather than deeply understanding users and driving outcomes.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A feature-factory role. If your primary metric is "stories shipped," this isn't the right fit.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A role for people who need heavy process, frequent approvals, or top-down direction to do their best work.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>The Team</strong></p>
<p>We are a global team of ~100 awesome people working from over 40 countries around the globe. We hire globally, you work locally—in the heart of London, a beach outside of Río de Janeiro, or a quiet village near Florence, the choice is yours. Every few months we travel to meet up somewhere in the world and spend some quality time together. We place a huge amount of trust in our people, and we measure the outcomes rather than the work itself.&nbsp;<a href="https://toggl.com/culture/">Our values</a>&nbsp;fuel our results.<br><br><strong>What's Happening at Toggl</strong></p>
<p>Toggl is at an exciting turning point. We're taking our best-in-class time tracking - trusted and loved by millions of users worldwide - and expanding it into something bigger: Toggl Focus. One product that brings together time tracking, planning, capacity management, reporting, and insight. The idea is simple: better time tracking creates better data, which powers everything else. We call it time intelligence.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Benefits</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Freedom to choose when and how much you work—we only measure results</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>24 days of paid time off a year, plus your local holidays</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Unlimited sick leave</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>In-person meetups for team-building (expenses covered)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>4-6 weeks paid sabbatical (depending on tenure)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Laptop budget up to 2,500€ and it renews every 3 years</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>€2,000 budget to set up your home office and an additional €300 every year after 3 years of tenure</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>€3,000 per year for co-working space membership and/or internet service at home</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>€4,000 per year contribution to use for training, workshops, and conferences</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>€2,400 per year contribution for any equipment or services to improve and/or maintain your physical and mental health</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Support for buying tools you need for doing your best work (even eyeglasses if you need a new pair)</p>
</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toggl-senior-product-manager-4">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toggl-senior-product-manager-4</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Jetbrains: Product Manager for Bonsai (Innovation Hub)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Product</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> London, United Kingdom
</p>

<div class=""><br><p>At JetBrains, code is our passion. Ever since we started, back in 2000, we have strived to make the strongest, most effective developer tools on earth. By automating routine checks and corrections, our tools speed up production, freeing developers to grow, discover, and create.</p><br><p>Bonsai is an innovative project within JetBrains' Innovation Hub. Its aim is to help developers keep AI agents aligned and under control, focusing only on what really matters in the development workflow. Our goal is to build an infrastructure for AI-powered spec-driven development that helps teams ship complex systems efficiently, while keeping outcomes trustworthy, auditable, and flexible as requirements and code evolve.</p><br><p>We already have a working prototype and are preparing an Alpha. We’re looking for a Product Manager to work with our team as we move from prototype to product, validating developer needs, sharpening positioning, and setting early priorities.</p><br><p><strong>This will be an exciting opportunity if you:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Want to create something new.</li><br><li>Care about building trust in AI.</li><br><li>Enjoy zero-to-one product development.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Talk to developers and run discovery interviews to understand real workflows and pain points.</li><br><li>Define the product direction, including the ICP, key scenarios, and what we build first.</li><br><li>Track the market and competitors to inform priorities.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>We will be happy to have you on our team if you:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Have at least one year of experience as a Product Manager or in a role with the equivalent level of ownership and responsibility – for example, leading discovery and delivery end to end.</li><br><li>Have a strong technical mindset, ideally, with production coding experience.</li><br><li>Are comfortable working with ambiguity and enjoy turning uncertainty into a plan through discovery.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>We would be especially thrilled if you:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Have zero-to-one product development experience (early product discovery, shaping a new product, design partners, first real adoption).</li><br><li>Have experience with developer tools, IDEs, workflow products, or developer productivity platforms.</li><br></ul><br><p>Are familiar with or curious about AI-assisted development, AI agents, and how teams integrate them into real systems.</p><br><p><span>#LI-REMOTE&nbsp;</span><br><span>#LI-KT1</span></p><br><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>We process the data provided in your job application in accordance with the <a href="https://www.jetbrains.com/legal/docs/privacy/privacy-recruitment/">Recruitment Privacy Policy.</a></em></p></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jetbrains-product-manager-for-bonsai-innovation-hub">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jetbrains-product-manager-for-bonsai-innovation-hub</a></p>
</description>

      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇦🇩 Andorra, 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇦🇺 Australia, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇧🇴 Bolivia (Plurinational State of), 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇧🇿 Belize, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇮 Finland, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇭🇳 Honduras, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇹 Haiti, 🇮🇩 Indonesia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇱 Israel, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇯🇲 Jamaica, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇰🇷 Korea (Republic of), 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇺 Luxembourg, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇦 Morocco, 🇲🇩 Moldova (Republic of), 🇲🇪 Montenegro, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇲🇾 Malaysia, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇳🇿 New Zealand, 🇵🇦 Panama, 🇵🇪 Peru, 🇵🇬 Papua New Guinea, 🇵🇭 Philippines, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇷 Puerto Rico, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇵🇾 Paraguay, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇸🇪 Sweden, 🇸🇬 Singapore, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇸🇻 El Salvador, 🇹🇭 Thailand, 🇺🇦 Ukraine, 🇺🇸 United States of America, 🇺🇾 Uruguay, 🇻🇳 Viet Nam, and 🇿🇦 South Africa</country>
      <state>Delaware</state>
      <skills>Infrastructure Orchestration, Python, SQL, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Large Language Models (LLMs), Engineer, Senior, English, Architect, Architecture, API Integration, AI Agents, and APIs</skills>
      <category>Back-End Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://lemon.io">https://lemon.io</a>
</p>

<p>Are you a talented Senior AI Engineer/Architect looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_ai_engineer/architect_jun_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.</p>
<p><strong>What we offer:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>The rate depends on your skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers.</li>
<li>No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.</li>
<li>We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.</li>
<li>Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours.</li>
<li>We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers.</li>
<li>Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah?</li>
<li>We will support you from the time you submit the application throughout all cooperation stages.</li>
<li>Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do.</li>
<li>Through our community, we will connect you with the best developers from more than 75 countries.</li>
</ul>
<p>We have several AI-related roles; here are some of them.</p>
<p><strong>Requirements - AI Engineer:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>3+ years of commercial experience applying AI to practical technology solutions</li>
<li>A solid understanding of Python is a must; experience with other programming languages commonly used in AI is a plus</li>
<li>Experience with Vector Databases, Pinecone or Weaviate is required</li>
<li>2+ years of experience with large language models (LLMs), RAG, LangChain is mandatory</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Requirements - AI Agent Architect:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>3+ years of experience with Python</li>
<li>3+ years of experience with LLM</li>
<li>Experience with Multi-agent systems architecture, AI agent orchestration, AI telemetry is a must.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Requirements - AI Automation Architect:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>1+ year of experience with Workflow Automation and Webhooks</li>
<li>3+ years with SQL is a must</li>
<li>Familiarity with AI API integration and Claude Cowork is a must</li>
<li>Knowledge of Make.com/n8n/Zapier</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Strong technical skills: as a Senior AI Engineer/Architect, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture.</li>
<li>Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.</li>
<li>Strong self-organizational skills — ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.</li>
<li>Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us and the client down.</li>
<li>Adaptability and Flexibility — the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.</li>
</ul>
<p>Sounds good for you? Apply now and join the <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_ai_engineer/architect_jun_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> community!</p>
<p><strong>NOT YOUR TECH STACK?</strong></p>
<p>We have a variety of projects, so if you have 4+ years of commercial software development experience and are proficient in Site Reliability Engineering, React &amp; Python, React &amp; Golang, React &amp; Java, React &amp; Ruby, PHP &amp; Vue, Vue &amp; Node.js, React &amp; .NET, Android &amp; iOS, Blockchain (Web3/Solana), Angular &amp; Node.js, Vue &amp; .NET, Python &amp; Vue, DevOps with Azure DevOps, MLOps, Data Science, Angular &amp; PHP, Angular &amp; .NET, Symfony &amp; React, Symfony &amp; Vue, Symfony &amp; Angular, Symfony &amp; JavaScript &amp; Next.js &amp; TypeScript, Data Analysis, React &amp; PHP, Data Engineering, Project Management, React Native &amp; Node, Data Annotation, React &amp; Node.js, Svelte &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Node.js, Svelte &amp; TypeScript, Rust, Shopify &amp; JavaScript, Vue &amp; Nuxt, PHP &amp; Laravel, UI/UX Design, Animation, Graphic Design, React &amp; Node &amp; React Native, .NET &amp; C#, Unreal Engine &amp; C++, Python &amp; LLM, Unity, or Machine Learning Engineering, we would be happy to connect with you and match you with a project that fits your experience.</p>
<p>P.S. We work with developers from 75+ countries across different regions: Europe, LATAM, the U.S. (if you have a completed W-9 form), Canada, Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, the Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, South Africa, and Israel), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, and Papua New Guinea), Morocco, and the UK. However, there are some exceptions due to legal constraints.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-ai-engineer-architect">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-ai-engineer-architect</a></p>

      <title>C4Media Inc.: Fractional Sales Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Ontario</state>
      <skills>HubSpot, Sales Management, SaaS, Sales, and Management Consulting</skills>
      <category>Sales and Marketing</category>
      <type>Contract</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5391/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Toronto, Ontario
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.c4media.com/">https://www.c4media.com/</a>
</p>

<p><strong>Overview</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Time Commitment: Part-time, 10-15 hours/week</li>
<li>Type of Work: Fractional Contractor</li>
<li>Contract Duration: 6 months</li>
<li>Residency Location: Must work from Canada or anywhere US (except California)</li>
<li>Work Location: Remote 100%</li>
<li>Payment Type: Monthly Retainer</li>
<li>Required Experience: Must have 6+ years of recent sales experience, selling annual subscription-based packages for continuing learning or online learning to Fortune 1000 companies in the USA. Must have 3+ years of sales leadership experience</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>About the Role</strong></p>
<p>C4Media, Inc. (HQ Toronto, Canada. Private. Established in 2007), is seeking a Fractional Sales Manager with prior experience selling and managing annual subscription-based packages or seats for continuing learning platforms to Fortune 1000 companies in the USA. Join us in a part-time, 6-months fractional contractor capacity.</p>
<p>In this role, you will help define and execute the sales strategy for our software conferences and online learning products, focusing on group ticket sales and annual subscriptions. You will establish scalable sales processes, coach a growing team of Account Executives, and help build a strong foundation for long-term revenue growth.</p>
<p>This opportunity is ideal for a hands-on sales leader who enjoys developing strategy, mentoring talent, and building high-performing sales organizations in a flexible, part-time capacity.</p>
<p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Partner with leadership to design and implement a repeatable sales process and identify critical product features to successfully sell annual subscription-based seat packages for our international software conferences and online learning products to Fortune 1000 companies.</li>
<li>Provide part-time mentorship to the new enterprise sales team, helping them refine skills in areas such as lead gen, consultative selling, relationship-building and negotiation.</li>
<li>Introduce and operationalize proven sales methodologies.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Support leadership in setting sales strategy, defining performance metrics, and establishing forecasting rhythms.</li>
<li>Participate in pipeline reviews and deal strategy sessions, offering guidance on high-value opportunities.</li>
<li>Work with marketing, business development, and customer success teams to ensure alignment across the customer journey.</li>
<li>Help shape hiring profiles, onboarding practices, and team structure to ensure the right team is hired for sales growth.</li>
<li>Occasionally attend virtual client or prospect meetings to model best practices and accelerate team development.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Who You Are</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>A collaborative leader who thrives in both strategic and hands-on coaching roles</li>
<li>Entrepreneurial, process-driven, and analytical</li>
<li>A natural mentor with strong interpersonal skills and a track record of developing high-performing sales teams</li>
<li>Someone who balances strategic vision with tactical execution, able to identify gaps and implement solutions quickly</li>
<li>Highly self-motivated and able to deliver impact in a part-time, flexible engagement</li>
<li>Respectful, empathetic, collaborative, accountable</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>What You’ll Bring</strong></p>
<p>Experience:</p>
<ul>
<li>6+ years of experience selling to Fortune 1000 clients in the USA</li>
<li>3+ years in a sales leadership role (managing a sales team with direct reports)</li>
<li>2 of the last 3 years experience selling SaaS, subscription, or enterprise technology software to Fortune 1000 clients in the USA</li>
<li>Demonstrated ability to coach sales teams and improve performance through process, training, and feedback</li>
<li>Proven success in building, growing and scaling sales teams</li>
<li>Experience managing complex, multi-stakeholder enterprise deals</li>
<li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to influence and advise both executives and frontline sellers</li>
</ul>
<div>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
</div>
<div>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/c4media-inc-fractional-sales-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/c4media-inc-fractional-sales-manager</a></p>
</description>
