      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Florida
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.speechify.com">http://www.speechify.com</a>
</p>

<div><strong><br>Overview<br></strong></div>
<div>With that growth comes the need for a Javascript Engineer to join the existing Web team and continue supporting the growing user base as well as building new and exciting features.</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>This is a key role and ideal for someone who thinks strategically, enjoys high-pace environments, passionate about owning product decisions and has experience building and scaling complex engineering systems.</div>
<div><strong><br>What You’ll Do<br></strong></div>
<ul>
<li>Actively ship production code to the web products</li>
<li>Work closely with your dedicated product team</li>
<li>Participate in product discussions to shape the product roadmap</li>
<li>Have the opportunity to work on new and exciting features that will impact millions of lives</li>
</ul>
<div><strong><br>An Ideal Candidate Should Have<br></strong></div>
<ul>
<li>Experience. You've built and ship products that have scaled to thousands or millions of users</li>
<li>Customer obsession. You are passionate about the field and have the desire to build high quality product that serves customer needs</li>
<li>Speed. You work quickly to generate ideas and know how to decide which things can ship now and what things need time</li>
<li>Focus. We’re a high-growth startup with a busy, remote team. You know how and when to engage or be heads down</li>
<li>Collaboration. You know how to inspire, play, and negotiate with opinionated designers, marketers, and PMs</li>
<li>Tech Stack: Vanilla JS, ReactJS, Redux, Firebase, Typescript</li>
</ul>
<div><strong><br>What We Offer<br></strong></div>
<ul>
<li>A fast-growing environment where you can help shape the culture</li>
<li>An entrepreneurial crew that supports risk, intuition, and hustle</li>
<li>A hands-off approach so you can focus and do your best work</li>
<li>The opportunity to make an impact in a transformative industry</li>
<li>A competitive salary, a collegiate atmosphere, and a commitment to building a great asynchronous culture</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/speechify-inc-senior-software-engineer-web-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/speechify-inc-senior-software-engineer-web-1</a></p>

      <title>E. Breuninger& Co.: Product Owner Zendesk  Customer Service (m/w/d) // remote möglich</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Product</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Stuttgart, Deutschland
</p>

<div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Unternehmensbeschreibung</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>Fashion und Lifestyle, 6.500 Mitarbeiter:innen, 13 Department Stores, Online-Shops in Deutschland, Polen, Österreich, Belgien, Luxemburg, Spanien, Italien, Tschechien, den Niederlanden und der Schweiz, über 2.000 Marken, 25 Restaurants &amp; Confiserien, 15 erstklassige Services, drei Friseur-Salons und stets ein besonderes Einkaufserlebnis – das ist Breuninger. Ein Traditionsunternehmen, das internationale Wege geht, seine Ziele klar definiert und innovative Möglichkeiten schafft.</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Stellenbeschreibung</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><strong>Wer wir sind:&nbsp;Technologischer Taktgeber&nbsp;für exzellenten Service&nbsp;</strong></p><p>In unserer Abteilung Customer Service Services (CSS) sind wir der technologische Taktgeber für den Kundenservice bei Breuninger. Unser Ziel: Wir bauen die technische&nbsp;Infrastruktur, die unsere&nbsp;Kolleg:innen&nbsp;befähigt, Kundenbegeisterung auf Breuninger-Niveau zu erzeugen. Wir administrieren, konfigurieren und orchestrieren die Tools von morgen – von der Telefonie bis zur KI&nbsp;–&nbsp;und schaffen damit einzigartige Kundenerlebnisse.&nbsp;</p><p><strong>Deine Mission: Bauen, Steuern und Begeistern&nbsp;</strong></p><p>Du bist weit mehr als&nbsp;ein:e&nbsp;Administrator:in&nbsp;–&nbsp;Du bist&nbsp;der:die&nbsp;Botschafter:in&nbsp;Deiner Produkte. Du nimmst strategische Leitplanken, sowie operative Problemstellungen&nbsp;auf und übersetzt sie eigenständig in exzellente technologische Lösungen. Du liebst es, tief in die Konfiguration einzutauchen, hältst aber gleichzeitig die Fahne für&nbsp;Deine Produkte hoch und steckst andere mit&nbsp;Deiner Begeisterung für neue Features an. Damit bist&nbsp;Du ein wesentlicher Teil der digitalen Transformation des Customer Service.</p><ul><li><strong>End-to-End Konfiguration</strong>: Du verantwortest die Administration und Weiterentwicklung unserer Low-Code-Produkte (z. B.&nbsp;Zendesk,&nbsp;Babelforce). Du hast Freude daran, „unter die Haube“ zu schauen und Prozesse technisch perfekt&nbsp;abzubilden.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Product&nbsp;Evangelism</strong>: Du machst Lust auf das Produkt! Du vermarktest neue Funktionen intern, begeisterst die&nbsp;User:innen&nbsp;für&nbsp;Deine Lösungen und sorgst für eine hohe Akzeptanz und Freude an der Nutzung.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Demand- &amp; Stakeholder-Management</strong>: Du nimmst Anforderungen aus den&nbsp;Operations&nbsp;auf, priorisierst diese und&nbsp;orchestrierst IT-Schnittstellen und externe Partner bei Bedarf.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><li><strong>KI-Pionierarbeit</strong>: Du spielst eine zentrale Rolle bei der Auswahl und Implementierung von KI-Komponenten. Du beherrschst&nbsp;Prompting&nbsp;und optimierst unsere Systeme für maximale Effizienz.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Projektsteuerung</strong>: Du leitest (Teil-)Projekte von der Marktanalyse bis zum Go-Live und sorgst dafür, dass das "perfekte Produkt" für den Kundenservice entsteht.&nbsp;</li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><p><strong>Das „Breuninger-Plus“ für Dich:&nbsp;</strong></p><ul><li><p><strong>Gestaltungsspielraum: Wir bieten&nbsp;Dir eine zentrale Rolle bei der technologischen Transformation – inklusive der Freiheit,&nbsp;Deine Rolle nach&nbsp;Deinen Stärken (Strategie vs. Technik) mitzugestalten.&nbsp;</strong></p></li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Qualifikationen</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li><strong>Erfahrung und Background</strong>:&nbsp;Du verfügst über mehrjährige Erfahrung als&nbsp;Product/Business&nbsp;Owner:in&nbsp;oder&nbsp;eine vergleichbare&nbsp;Tätigkeit&nbsp;und bist es gewohnt, in einem sich schnell wandelnden <strong>E-Commerce&nbsp;Umfeld</strong>&nbsp;agil&nbsp;und innovativ&nbsp;zu arbeiten.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Qualifikation</strong>: Ein abgeschlossenes Studium im Bereich Betriebswirtschaft oder Wirtschaftsinformatik ist von Vorteil.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Tool-Expertise &amp; Leidenschaft</strong>: Du hast fundierte Erfahrung&nbsp;in der Konfiguration und Administration von<strong>&nbsp;Ticket- oder Telefonie-Systemen im Customer Service </strong>(z. B.&nbsp;Zendesk,&nbsp;Babelforce) und brennst darauf, diese technologisch auf das nächste Level zu heben.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Steuerung</strong>: Du hast Erfahrung in der&nbsp;eigenverantwortlichen&nbsp;Steuerung von Produktweiterentwicklungen oder vergleichbarer&nbsp;Projekte&nbsp;und bist in der Lage externe Partner und Stakeholder zu orchestrieren.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Technisches Mindset</strong>: Du liebst Low-Code/No-Code-Tools und hast eine hohe Affinität für KI-Lösungen und modernes&nbsp;Prompting.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Mindset eines digitalen Gastgeber:in:</strong>&nbsp;Du trägst die&nbsp;Verantwortung,&nbsp;dass Dein Produkt nicht nur reibungslos funktioniert, sondern&nbsp;interne und externe&nbsp;Kunden an jedem Kontaktpunkt begeistert&nbsp;werden.&nbsp;</li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Zusätzliche Informationen</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>Bei Breuninger geht es um mehr als einen Job. Wir leben Wertschätzung und Verantwortung – und genau das spiegeln unsere Benefits wieder. Sie sind ein Zeichen dafür, wie wir Dich begleiten und unterstützen. Und das Beste: Dies ist nur ein Teil dessen, was Dich bei uns erwartet.</p><p><strong>Wertschätzung, die spürbar ist </strong>Freiwilliges Urlaubs- und Weihnachtsgeld sowie Zuschüsse zur Altersvorsorge.</p><p><strong>Dein Stil, Dein Vorteil&nbsp;</strong>30 % Mitarbeitendenrabatt, auch für Deine:n Partner:in, inklusive Gastronomie und Friseur.</p><p><strong>Deine Treue zählt</strong>&nbsp;Ab dem 5. Jahr erhältst Du zusätzliche Urlaubstage.</p><p><strong>Sport-Life-Balance&nbsp;</strong>Zuschuss zu Deiner Urban Sports Mitgliedschaft.</p><p><strong>Wachse mit uns</strong> Von Trainings bis zu Führungsprogrammen.</p><p><strong>Workation available</strong> Bis zu 30 Kalendertage im Jahr in ausgewählten europäischen Ländern.</p><p><strong>Urlaub à la carte</strong>&nbsp;Über Gehaltsumwandlung kannst Du Dir zusätzliche Urlaubstage sichern, ergänzt durch Sabbatical-Option.</p><p><strong>Mobil im Alltag&nbsp;</strong>Mit Company Bike Dein Wunschrad oder E-Bike unkompliziert leasen.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>Haben wir Dein&nbsp;Interesse geweckt?</p><p>Dann sollten wir uns schnell kennenlernen.</p><p>Bei Fragen steht Dir <strong>Sabrina Rösch</strong> gerne jederzeit zur Verfügung.</p><p>Wir freuen uns auf Deine aussagekräftige Online Bewerbung mit Angabe Deiner Verfügbarkeit sowie Gehaltsvorstellung.&nbsp;Bewerbungen per E-Mail können aus Datenschutzgründen <strong>nicht verarbeitet</strong> werden. Nutze daher bitte ausschließlich unser <strong>Online-Bewerbungssystem</strong>.</p><div></div><p><a href="https://www.breuninger.com/de/service/imprint/">Impressum</a></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/e-breuninger-co-product-owner-zendesk-customer-service-m-w-d-remote-moglich">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/e-breuninger-co-product-owner-zendesk-customer-service-m-w-d-remote-moglich</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Aledade: Senior Product Analyst, Remote</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Product</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Bethesda, MD
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div>As a Product Analyst you will be a key supporting member of the teams responsible for ingesting data from our payer partners; specifically, medical and pharmacy claims, patient eligibility, and care gaps data. The Analyst will work alongside the product team members and engineers to triage and investigate issues, provide operational support for data exchange, assist in data analysis and requirements gathering to support new integrations.</div><div><br></div><div>Product Analysts participate in sprint planning and ceremonies alongside the product and engineering team members. This role will serve as a key interface between the product and engineering teams and internal teams that work directly with practices to ensure data accuracy and timeliness.</div><div><br></div><div>As a Product Analyst, you will report to and be mentored by a Senior Product Manager at Aledade. You’ll be hands-on with our payer ingestion data while developing tangential skills. If you’re a data expert with a healthcare background and are interested in working directly with the teams building data ingestion pipelines, this is the role for you.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Primary Duties:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>First line of defense on data quality and accuracy issues with existing payer data ingestion feeds. This includes triage,&nbsp; prioritization, and communication of issues.</li><li>Provide operational support needed to ensure continuity of data exchange between Aledade and payer partners.</li><li>Assist in data analysis requests to support net new integrations and investigate investments for new data-based projects.</li><li>Assist in the product team in gathering requirements and creating specifications for new payer data feeds.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Minimum Qualifications:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Bachelor’s degree in related field or 4+ years of healthcare data experience, preferably with claims data.</li><li>Proficient in SQL, able to write complex queries making use of sub-queries, unions and CTEs.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Preferred Qualifications:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience in triaging and prioritizing operations related data issues and developing processes to support resolution and tracking. Preferably in healthcare data.</li><li>Experience using data and primary research to inform business decision making.</li><li>Excellent organizational and communication skills, with an emphasis on problem-solving, prioritization, and building subject matter expertise.</li><li>Experience participating in Agile / Scrum teams or using Agile methodology/concepts in product development</li><li>Experience with data, data structures (e.g. relational databases), relevant or similar analytics platforms and tech stacks (e.g. Tableau, Snowflake, ETL, healthcare data sets, etc).</li><li>Experience with and understanding of the software development lifecycle and software development methodologies.</li><li>Experience with project management tools like JIRA or Trello.</li><li>Knowledge of alternative payment models related to primary care such as MSSP ACOs, Pioneer ACOs, commercial insurance shared savings programs, PCMH.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><li>Experience with basic quality assurance testing processes.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>Who We Are:</b></div><div>Aledade, a public benefit corporation, exists to empower the most transformational part of our health care landscape - independent primary care. We were founded in 2014, and since then, we've become the largest network of independent primary care in the country - helping practices, health centers and clinics deliver better care to their patients and thrive in value-based care. Additionally, by creating value-based contracts across a wide variety of health plans, we aim to flip the script on the traditional fee-for-service model. Our work strengthens continuity of care, aligns incentives and ensures primary care physicians are paid for what they do best - keeping patients healthy. If you want to help create a health care system that is good for patients, good for practices and good for society - and if you're eager to join a collaborative, inclusive and remote-first culture - you've come to the right place.</div><div><br></div><div><b>What Does This Mean for You?</b></div><div>At Aledade, you will be part of a creative culture that is driven by a passion for tackling complex issues with respect, open-mindedness and a desire to learn. You will collaborate with team members who bring a wide range of experiences, interests, backgrounds, beliefs and achievements to their work - and who are all united by a shared passion for public health and a commitment to the Aledade mission.</div><div><br></div><div>In addition to time off to support work-life balance and enjoyment, we offer the following comprehensive benefits package designed for the overall well-being of our team members:</div><div><br></div><div>Flexible work schedules and the ability to work remotely are available for many roles</div><div>Health, dental and vision insurance paid up to 80% for employees, dependents and domestic partners</div><div>Robust time-off plan (21 days of PTO in your first year)</div><div>Two paid volunteer days and 11 paid holidays</div><div>12 weeks paid parental leave for all new parents</div><div>Six weeks paid sabbatical after six years of service</div><div>Educational Assistant Program and Clinical Employee Reimbursement Program</div><div>401(k) with up to 4% match</div><div>Stock options</div><div>And much more!</div><div><br></div><div><i>At Aledade, we don’t just accept differences, we celebrate them! We strive to attract, develop and retain highly qualified individuals representing the diverse communities where we live and work. Aledade is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. Employment policies and decisions at Aledade are based on merit, qualifications, performance and business needs. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, race, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth or medical conditions related to pregnancy or childbirth), gender identity or expression, religion, physical or mental disability, medical condition, legally protected genetic information, marital status, veteran status, or sexual orientation.</i></div><div><br></div><div>Privacy Policy:<span>&nbsp;By applying for this job, you agree to Aledade's&nbsp;Applicant Privacy Policy available at &nbsp;</span><a class="postings-link" href="https://www.aledade.com/privacy-policy-applicants">https://www.aledade.com/privacy-policy-applicants</a></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use automated tools, including artificial intelligence (AI), to help organize and evaluate application materials. These tools support our recruiters and hiring managers by helping manage large applicant pools. Human judgment plays an essential role in our hiring process, including in the oversight and use of any automated tools. If you would like more information about our screening and hiring process, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/aledade-senior-product-analyst-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/aledade-senior-product-analyst-remote</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Radix: Profissional Web Designer Sênior</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Front-End Programming</category>
      <type/>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> BR
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://radixeng.com.br">http://radixeng.com.br</a>
</p>

<div><div>
<div>
<p><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">A primeira coisa que você precisa saber é que aqui você não vai cair na rotina. A Radix desenvolve soluções para empresas de diferentes setores e indústrias. Cada projeto tem suas tecnologias, soluções e prazos e você terá oportunidade de atuar e experimentar diferentes desafios. Além da nossa atuação pelo Brasil, com escritório no Rio de janeiro, São Paulo e Belo Horizonte, temos também filiais nos Estados Unidos, fazendo com que a Radix se consolide cada vez mais como uma empresa <strong>global</strong>.&nbsp; </span>&nbsp;</p>
</div>
<div>
<p><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">Quer fazer parte dessa história e transformar ideias e sonhos em realidade?</span>&nbsp;</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
</div>
<div>
<p><strong>Como Web Designer você vai:&nbsp;&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p><strong>Responsabilidades:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Executar atividades de design em projetos variados, garantindo qualidade e aderência aos prazos e objetivos acordados;</li>
<li>Criar interfaces e experiências inovadoras, incorporando soluções de Inteligência Artificial (AI) e Generative AI (GenAI) para otimização de fluxos, personalização de conteúdo e automação de interações;</li>
<li>Manter-se atualizado quanto às metodologias e ferramentas de UX/UI e AI/GenAI, promovendo inovação nos projetos;</li>
<li>Realizar pesquisas com usuários, desenvolver personas, mapear jornadas do usuário e construir protótipos de baixa e alta fidelidade;</li>
<li>Testar e validar experiências com usuários, coletando feedbacks e refinando interações suportadas por AI/GenAI;</li>
<li>Colaborar com equipes de Produto, Engajamento e Comercial, integrando insights de AI/GenAI para melhorar a experiência do usuário;</li>
<li>Contribuir para a excelência da equipe de Design, promovendo mentorias, revisões e treinamentos;</li>
<li>Desenvolver interfaces funcionais utilizando frameworks fornecidos pelo cliente ou plataformas de desenvolvimento de mercado, incorporando componentes de AI/GenAI quando aplicável.</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Pré-Requisitos:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Inglês avançado para conversação;</li>
<li>Experiência sólida com UX/UI, incluindo prototipagem para web e aplicativos (desktop, tablet, mobile);</li>
<li>Conhecimento em Design Thinking e metodologias centradas no usuário;</li>
<li>Experiência prática ou interesse em AI e GenAI aplicado a interfaces e experiências digitais;</li>
<li>Ter portfólio robusto, demonstrando habilidades em design de interface e experiência do usuário;</li>
<li>Ter proficiência em Figma e Adobe XD.</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Desejável:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Conhecimentos básicos em CSS e HTML;</li>
<li>Familiaridade com metodologias ágeis (Scrum, Kanban);</li>
<li>Experiência em ferramentas de colaboração (Miro, InVision);</li>
<li>Experiência na integração de AI/GenAI em fluxos de UX, automação e personalização de interfaces.</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
</div>
<div>
<p><strong><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">Benefícios:&nbsp;</span>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Assistência Médica Nacional (para o titular e dependentes, com quarto privativo)</li>
<li>Assistência odontológica nacional (para o titular e dependentes)</li>
<li>Vale refeição / alimentação flexível</li>
<li>Auxílio home office&nbsp;</li>
<li>Day off (no mês do aniversário)</li>
<li>Wellhub (antigo Gympass)</li>
<li>Licença Maternidade (6 meses) e Paternidade (20 dias) estendidas</li>
<li>Auxílio creche para filhos de até 3 anos (por filho)&nbsp;</li>
<li>Apoio em saúde mental com a Wellz</li>
<li>Clube de Vantagens com descontos em diversos parceiros</li>
<li>Convênio com instituições de ensino e cursos de idioma</li>
<li>Desenvolvimento Profissional (Universidade Corporativa)</li>
<li>Parceria com empresa de coworkings no Brasil</li>
<li>Programa de Qualidade de Vida e Bem-Estar</li>
<li>Médico consultor para acompanhamento de radixers</li>
<li>Planos de incentivos</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<div>
<p><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">&nbsp;</span>&nbsp;</p>
</div>
<div>
<p><strong><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">A Radix está sempre no topo das Melhores Empresas para se trabalhar porque:</span><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">&nbsp;</span>&nbsp;</strong></p>
</div>
<div>
<ul>
<li><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">Temos profissionais comprometidos, dedicados, curiosos e inovadores.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li>O espírito de equipe é a nossa maior força. Trabalhamos de forma cooperativa e sabemos que estamos juntos, remando na mesma direção.</li>
<li>Temos um ambiente diverso, que valoriza equidade e inclusão.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Nossa jornada de trabalho é flexível e em quase todos os projetos é possível trabalhar de qualquer lugar do Brasil.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Valorizamos o bem-estar e o cuidado com as nossas pessoas, com programas de apoio à saúde mental, psiquiatra e médico consultor disponíveis.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<p><strong><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">Curtiu?<br></span></strong><strong><span lang="PT-BR" xml:lang="PT-BR">#VemPraRadix</span>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p><strong>Código da vaga: 9fbb</strong></p>
</div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/radix-profissional-web-designer-senior-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/radix-profissional-web-designer-senior-1</a></p>

    <item>
      <title>Vinta: Senior Product Manager - Remote - 13.5-18.3k CLT</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Front-End Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> BR
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://vinta.com.br">http://vinta.com.br</a>
</p>

<div><h3>Quem somos</h3>
<p>A Vinta é uma consultoria de produtos digitais para clientes internacionais em diversos setores há mais de uma década, com um time técnico que constrói excelência num ambiente de melhoramento colaborativo e saudável. Trabalhamos viabilizando tecnicamente a visão de produtos digitais com as melhores práticas de software, trazendo qualidade, escalabilidade e eficiência, e estabelecendo relações de longo prazo com nossos clientes e profissionais.</p>
<p>Nosso diferencial são os times que possuem cultura forte, numa interface próxima com os clientes. Esse trabalho só é possível em um ambiente altamente colaborativo que trabalha numa aplicação de ponta-a-ponta, com espaços de desenvolvimento e crescimento, segurança e flexibilidade.</p>
<p>Somos 100% remotos e async first. A comunicação assíncrona é central em nosso dia-a-dia, nos favorecendo horas de trabalho focado sem interrupções. Transformar reuniões em reports assíncronos nos ajuda a promover qualidade de vida e equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional de verdade!</p>
<p>Para conhecer mais, veja o <a href="https://www.vinta.com.br/">nosso site</a>. Temos também muita colaboração pra comunidade de código aberto em nosso <a href="https://github.com/vintasoftware">Github</a>, e palestras disponíveis em <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@VintaSoftware">nosso canal do Youtube</a>. Dá uma olhada também em nosso <a href="https://www.glassdoor.com.br/Vis%C3%A3o-geral/Trabalhar-na-Vinta-Software-EI_IE2757112.13,27.htm">Glassdoor</a>!</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h3>Seu trabalho na Vinta</h3>
<p>O mercado de healthcare nos Estados Unidos é grande, e repleto de soluções tecnológicas burocráticas, pesadas e datadas que não conversam com as necessidades de seus usuários finais - médicas, enfermeiras, equipes interdisciplinares, hospitais e operadoras de saúde. A Vinta tem obtido sucesso nesse mercado se posicionando como uma facilitadora da inovação nessa área, simplificando a construção de produtos de saúde que falem diretamente com o que o mercado precisa.&nbsp;</p>
<p>Você construirá a visão, estratégia e a execução do nosso principal produto proprietário: o Vinta Building Blocks, um conjunto de funcionalidades e componentes para construção de produtos healthtech, onde você atuará como Product Owner.&nbsp;</p>
<p>Seu objetivo é conhecer o ecossistema de saúde dos EUA a fundo (seus EHR’s, possibilidades de AI e seus agentes, e Design Systems), transformando componentes isolados em experiências unificadas que garantam um time-to-market acelerado para novos projetos healthtech, habilitando o time técnico de devs e design para a geração de valor. Você também viabilizará e acompanhará esse projeto para que seja tecnicamente viável, considerando riscos, oportunidades e recursos, fornecendo soluções para construir e acelerar o produto e nosso time, atendendo os objetivos, visões e preocupações de nossos stakeholders internos, CPO e CTO.</p>
<p>Com esse domínio de mercado, você também auxiliará o Expansion com discovery contínuo e outras ações que convertam leads e expandem contas atuais, demonstrando tecnicamente como nossos building blocks resolvem os problemas de negócio dos clientes, gerando provas sociais em demos que mostram como nossa consultoria healthtech é exatamente o que eles precisam pra os produtos digitais de saúde deles.</p>
<p>Pessoas gestoras de time na Vinta também paralelizam atividades em outros projetos. Apesar desse ser o escopo inicial de seu trabalho, esperamos que após algum tempo assentada nessa posição, que você também ganhe contexto de outros projetos e atue neles com outro time.&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<h3>Experiência que buscamos:</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Prática com discovery contínuo: Baseando soluções em dores reais de leads, clientes e pesquisa de mercado, para impulsionar a adesão a nossos produtos e conversão de nossas propostas para o ecossistema de saúde dos EUA.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Independência estratégica: Autonomia para guiar a estratégia, roadmap e rotina desses Building Blocks, questionando C-levels e time técnico com base em dados e visão de produto.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Capacidade de inovação:&nbsp; Desenhando e coordenando a UX/UI dos componentes modulares de nosso produto junto devs e designers, experimentando e construindo esse produto para que seja AI-native</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Velocidade e Pragmatismo: Foco em time-to-market, priorizando prototipar, testar e iterar em ciclos curtos, focando em escopos estratégicos e remover bloqueios de time, produto e stakeholders.&nbsp;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Direcionamento de time: Esperamos que você lidere sua equipe de desenvolvimento e design, agindo estrategicamente para garantir objetivos claros e que habilite a produtividade da equipe numa cultura colaborativa, garantindo feedback contínuo e orientação para o crescimento da equipe.&nbsp;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Paralelizando times: Nossa expectativa é que após esteja assentada nessa primeira cadeira, você seja capaz de também direcionar outros times técnicos em outros projetos, negociando escopos e acompanhando entregas entregas do time e satisfação de clientes.&nbsp;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Competência comunicacional: Fluente em inglês para atuar amparando Expansion e projetos, vendendo nossa visão de produto e técnica de forma persuasiva.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h3>É diferencial se você:</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Tiver entendimento do ecossistema de saúde digital (EHRs, workflows clínicos, Medplum/FHIR);</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Tiver vivência montando produtos AI-native;</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h3>Nossos benefícios:</h3>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Salário de R$ 13.500 a R$ 18.300 no regime CLT, reajustado anualmente;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>O Vinta Beyond Program remunera, de forma variável e anual, o equivalente a até dois salários e meio, com metas com base em sua performance e desenvolvimento da Vinta;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Vinta +Home: Use R$ 500 mensais, de maneira totalmente flexível, para deixar sua experiência de home-office mais confortável.&nbsp;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Equidade de licença parental: 4 meses de licença paternidade para filhos adotivos e biológicos, para todos os tipos de família;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Cartão Flash: R$ 1600 em benefícios mensais em cartão bandeira Visa, a ser usado em múltiplos estabelecimentos: restaurantes, iFood e Uber Eats, supermercados, postos de gasolina, etc.;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>SulAmérica saúde e odontológico nacional, com direito a parto e quarto, totalmente pago pela Vinta e sem abatimento na folha. A inclusão dos dois primeiros dependentes também é coberta pelo benefício;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Auxílio-creche: R$ 347 reais mensais até 6 anos, 11 meses e 29 dias da criança.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Compra de cursos, livros e material técnico para seu desenvolvimento profissional;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Wellhub (antigo Gympass): acesso a diversas modalidades de atividades físicas e a uma ampla rede de academias e estúdios parceiros no país, para fazer quando e onde quiser. Além disso, você terá acesso a aulas individuais ou em grupo, e também a aplicativos de atividades físicas, bem-estar emocional, hábitos saudáveis e mais;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Ingresso e bônus de até R$1500,00 adicional ao aprovar palestras em conferências nacionais alinhadas à estratégia da Vinta. Passagem e estadia também coberto em caso evento presenciais</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p></p></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinta-senior-product-manager-remote-13-5-18-3k-clt">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinta-senior-product-manager-remote-13-5-18-3k-clt</a></p>

      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/5219/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Luxury Presence: Staff Software Engineer - AI Website Builder - US (Remote)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills>Cross-Browser Development, Database, Infrastructure Orchestration, Computer Vision, and Cross-Selling</skills>
      <category>Front-End Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5219/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://luxurypresence.com">http://luxurypresence.com</a>
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span><strong>Luxury Presence </strong>is building the AI growth platform for real estate. Backed by Bessemer Venture Partners and other top investors, we're a Series C company on track to hit $100M in annual recurring revenue in the next six months. More than 90,000 real estate professionals, including over </span><span>30% of the WSJ Real Trends top 100 agents in the United States, use us to run and grow their business.</span></div><div><br></div><div>
<h3>The Role</h3>
<p>As a <strong>Staff Software Engineer</strong>, you will be a key contributor on a cross-functional team, building the foundation of our AI-first platform. You’ll take ownership of major features and services, drive meaningful improvements to our architecture, and collaborate closely with product, design, and AI teams to deliver high-impact outcomes for our customers.</p>
</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You’ll Do</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><div>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Contribute to key architectural decisions and support a large scale re-imagining of our Site Generation and Site Builder Experience</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Design and build cloud-native APIs, services, and front-end experiences used across our platform to support building Websites</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver AI-powered workflows to Site Building experiences</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Write clean, testable, scalable code across the stack</p>
</li>
</ul>
</div></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What We’re Looking For</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><div>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Passion for building in an AI-augmented environment</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Familiarity with modern AI tools; experience developing AI-driven solutions is a plus (Claude Code is a must)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>5+ years of professional experience in full-stack engineering (leaning backend), ideally having supported a product from MVP to scale in rapid iterations</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong skills in JavaScript/TypeScript, <a href="http://node.js/">Node.js</a>, and React</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experience with scalable microservice architecture (AWS preferred)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Solid command of GraphQL, event-driven systems (Kafka/SQS), and distributed databases</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Track record of delivering high-quality features in rapid prototyping environments and integrating with feedback quickly</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>While you will have Product and Design partners, we value strong communicators and collaborators; able to work with limited product and design guidance, and operate independently in chasing well defined outcomes</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Customer-first mindset with the ability to empathize with internal and external stakeholder needs</p>
</li>
</ul>
</div></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Tech Stack</h3><div class="posting-requirements plain-list"><div><div>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Frontend: React, Tailwind, Apollo, SingleSPA</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Backend: Node.js, TypeScript (microservices), Python ETLs</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>AI: LangChain, LangFuse, OpenRouter, Mastra, Claude Code</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Data: PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, Elasticsearch</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Infrastructure: AWS, Kubernetes, Lambda</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Messaging: Kafka, SQS</p>
</li>
</ul>
</div></div></div></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>$200,000 - $250,000 a year</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><span><strong>Join us in shaping the future of real estate</strong></span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span>The real estate industry is in the midst of a seismic shift, and the future belongs to those who break new ground. As one of the fastest-growing companies in the proptech and marketing sectors, Luxury Presence challenges the status quo of what technology can do for real estate agents, leaders, and brokerages.</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span>We're a team of agile and tenacious innovators working collaboratively to drive the industry forward. Together, we build game-changing products that empower modern real estate entrepreneurs to dominate their markets. From award-winning web design to agile SEO solutions to cutting-edge AI tools, we deliver tech that anticipates market shifts and keeps our clients ahead of their competition.</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span>Founded in 2016 by Stanford Business School alum Malte Kramer, Luxury Presence has grown to a global team ranked on the Inc. 5000 fastest-growing companies list three years in a row. We're backed by world-class investors, including Bessemer Venture Partners, NextEquity Partners, Toba Capital, and Switch Ventures, and have raised $89 million to date.</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span>More than 18,000 real estate businesses rely on our platform, including 30% of the Wall Street Journal RealTrends top agents and teams. Additionally, many of the industry's most powerful brokerages rely on Luxury Presence as a trusted business partner.</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><span>Every year since 2020, Luxury Presence has ranked on BuiltIn's Best Place to Work lists. HousingWire named our founder and CEO a 2024 Tech Trendsetter, we've received several Tech100 Awards, and we just scored an Inman Innovation Award for Best AI-Powered Platform.</span></div>
<div>&nbsp;</div>
<div><strong><span>Luxury Presence is an Equal Opportunity Employer.</span></strong><span> All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, or national origin.</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/luxury-presence-staff-software-engineer-ai-website-builder-us-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/luxury-presence-staff-software-engineer-ai-website-builder-us-remote</a></p>
</description>

      <expires_at>Sat, 20 Jun 2026 20:03:04 +0000</expires_at>

    <item>
      <title>Hint Health: Senior Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Product</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA, Canada, Costa Rica, Uruguay - Remote
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>About Hint Health</span></div><div>Hint Health is the leading digital health company dedicated to supporting the growth and success of the Direct Primary Care (DPC) movement. With a mission to power direct care and make it the new standard, the HintOS platform supports thousands of clinics and networks across the nation providing care for over a million members. Hint also produces Hint Summit, the leading DPC innovation conference and supports Hint Connect, a curated national network of independent DPC clinics. Founded in 2013, the company is headquartered in San Francisco, CA. To learn more visit <a href="http://www.hint.com/company">www.hint.com/company</a>.</div><div><br></div><div><span>Hint Health is seeking a</span><b> Senior Product Manager</b><span> to join us in our mission to make great healthcare accessible and affordable. Reporting to our Director of Product, you’ll play a pivotal role in building software that empowers healthcare providers to scale direct care models nationwide. You’ll partner closely with Hint’s community of forward-thinking providers to reimagine how healthcare is delivered – from the first patient enrollment to ongoing care – driving better experiences, better outcomes, and lower costs.</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>In this role, you’ll serve as the product owner responsible for a major portion of the Core side of Hint’s platform. Hint Core is the operating system for Direct Primary Care (DPC): it powers the essential business backbone that makes membership-based care models run smoothly, including enrollment, membership management, billing and payments infrastructure, and day-to-day operational workflows. Thousands of DPC practices rely on Hint Core to keep their businesses running so providers can automate away the admin work and stay focused on delivering excellent care.</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><b>About the Team</b></div><div><span>Our mission on this team is simple: help DPC clinicians practice at the top of their license by automating the boring stuff. Providers don’t want to wrestle with billing, complex payment processing, or administrative overhead – they want to care for patients. At the same time, they’re entrepreneurs pioneering new models of care and need technology that gives them confidence, business resilience, and the ability to grow.</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>As the Senior Product Manager on Core, you’ll steward critical product areas that ensure DPC practices can run effectively and sustainably. This role involves evolving a mature, widely-used platform – balancing incremental improvements with thoughtful system modernization and long-term scalability. Your decisions will shape the infrastructure and user experience that keeps thousands of practices humming and enables clinics across the country to deliver more personalized, relationship-centered care.</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Key Responsibilities:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Be the owner of the product vision for your product zone, continually refining it based on customer insights and rallying the team around it</li><li>Define the product priorities and short, medium, and long-term roadmap</li><li>Lead the team to deliver the roadmap through agile sprint cycles, breaking down the product roadmap into executable stories and requirements with partners in Engineering and Design</li><li>Use data and insights, including product analytics, market research, user research, and business needs, to inform product work and prioritization</li><li>Define success metrics and consistently measure the impact of the team’s work</li><li>Build strong cross-functional relationships, founded on clear communication, to take new products and features to market in a way that maximizes their success</li><li>Build bridges and feedback loops directly with Hint customers, from engagement with Hint’s user community to lean user research and design activities</li><li>Mentor and support broader product team and improve on product best practices at Hint</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>This role might be for you if…</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>You excel in established product environments. You thrive working with legacy products, balancing reliability and maintenance with pushing forward continuous innovation and meaningful product evolution.</li><li>Cutting through ambiguity is your <a class="postings-link" href="http://superpower.You">superpower.</a>&nbsp;You can get to the root of a problem and create a compelling vision and actionable plans that align your team and stakeholders.</li><li>You have a technical PM background. You bring strong technical fluency, with experience shaping products that involve APIs, system integrations, backend workflows, and complex data flows.</li><li>You get energy from both discovery and delivery in regulated domains. You’re comfortable exploring new problem spaces and shepherding complex initiatives, like payments, billing, or financial workflows – from concept through build, release, and adoption, ideally within health or fintech contexts</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What you bring.... </h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>At least 5 years of Product Management experience in a consumer or B2B software company, with a track record of shipping impactful products across the end-to-end product lifecycle</li><li>Technical PM background or strong technical fluency. You’re comfortable digging into APIs, system integrations, backend workflows, and data infrastructure</li><li>A balance of strategic and executional strengths – you can zoom out to define long-term vision and priorities, then zoom in to drive sprint-level details with an eagle eye for detail</li><li>Entrepreneurial and creative attitude when problem solving</li><li>Excellent communication and storytelling abilities – you quickly build trust with customers, partners, and cross-functional teams, and can translate complex concepts into clear narratives</li><li>Adept at making small and large trade-off decisions based on product and company priorities</li><li>Strong product sense and business judgment, grounding all product decisions in data, user feedback, and measurable impact</li><li>Curiosity, openness, and experimental mindset toward using AI to accelerate product development, improve workflows, or enhance the user experience</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Nice to haves:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Healthcare or fintech experience</li><li>Mix of web and mobile UX experience. Experience shaping companion mobile experiences to a primarily web based product</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Life at Hint</span></div><div>Our team is inquisitive, kind, open, and smart. We share glimpses of our lives—introducing our kids and pets—and host virtual hangouts to stay connected. Our employee Slack channels include spaces for women, caregivers, and our Diversity &amp; Inclusion Committee. We also have regular cadences for company all-hands updates and team learning sessions so all Hinters can stay connected to how their work is changing the landscape of healthcare.</div><div><br></div><div>Hint has taken the <a href="https://www.parity.org/">Parity Pledge</a> and is committed to racial and gender parity. Furthermore, those historically underrepresented in tech—including people of color, immigrants, members of the LGBTQ+ community, people with disabilities and veterans—are encouraged to apply. We look for the best candidate for the job based on demonstrable skills, and do not screen for educational background, age, or markers of socioeconomic status.</div><div><br></div><div><span>Benefits</span></div><div>At Hint we support our teams to be their best by taking care of them and providing attractive benefits.</div><div>* Competitive compensation of base salary &amp; stock options</div><div>* 401k plan</div><div>* Progressive paid parental leave for both parents</div><div>* Comprehensive medical, dental &amp; vision + DPC membership or HSA stipend</div><div>* Remote-first workplace, home office stipend, &amp; optional in-person meet-ups</div><div>* Flexible working hours, flexible vacation, &amp; paid national holidays</div><div><br></div><div>As Hint Health is a remote company, we use e-verify for all US employees to complete an I9. More about this can be found <a href="https://www.e-verify.gov/sites/default/files/everify/posters/EVerifyParticipationPoster.pdf">here</a> and <a href="https://www.e-verify.gov/sites/default/files/everify/posters/IER_RightToWorkPoster%20Eng_Es.pdf">here</a>. </div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hint-health-senior-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hint-health-senior-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0074/2689/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Automattic: Support Engineer, WordPress VIP</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇺🇸 United States of America</country>
      <state>Alabama</state>
      <skills>WordPress</skills>
      <category>Customer Support</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0074/2689/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote 
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://automattic.com/">https://automattic.com/</a>
</p>

<p><a href="https://wpvip.com/">WordPress VIP</a>, the enterprise division of&nbsp;<a href="https://automattic.com/">Automattic</a>, is the world’s leading agile content management platform. Our suite of open solutions and services brings the ease and agility of&nbsp;<a href="https://wordpress.org/">WordPress</a>&nbsp;to the world’s largest enterprises. Our large and growing ecosystem of technologies, services, and integrations is designed to bring the freedom and power of open source to our customers, who include Meta, CNN, Salesforce, and hundreds more.</p>
<p>The Support Engineer role is responsible for providing advanced technical support to our enterprise customers, serving as an escalation point for complex issues that require deeper investigation. In this customer-facing role, you will handle challenging debugging scenarios, troubleshoot intricate application and platform issues, and help resolve problems that go beyond standard support workflows. You’ll work primarily through Zendesk tickets, collaborating closely with Support Engineers and Customer Success Engineers to ensure timely, high-quality resolutions while building your technical expertise and customer relationships.</p>
<p>You’ll serve as a technical resource for both customers and internal teams, bridging support and specialized engineering functions in high-impact situations. Support is provided 24/7, so scheduled weekday and weekend shifts, on-call rotations, as well as some holiday and evening availability, will be a requirement. Our customers are global and rely on our team to provide expedient support at any time of day.</p>
<p><strong>About You</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>You are a technical problem-solver who thrives on helping customers. You may have a background in WordPress development, technical support, or agency work, and you’re ready to take on more complex challenges while continuing to build your engineering skills. You enjoy the variety of working with a wide spectrum of interesting global customers.</li>
<li>You never stop learning. You have a willingness to rapidly learn new technologies and deepen your expertise in areas like PHP, JavaScript, and the WordPress ecosystem. You’re excited by the challenge of debugging unfamiliar applications and expanding your technical toolkit.</li>
<li>You are curious and love to dig deeper. When an issue is escalated to you, you’re not satisfied with surface-level fixes. You’re driven to understand the root cause and to document what you learn, so the team can benefit from your investigation.</li>
<li><a href="https://automattic.com/creed/">Communication is our oxygen</a>&nbsp;and the basis of everything we do. You have excellent written English and can communicate technical concepts to customers and colleagues, even when things go wrong. You know how to translate complex debugging findings into clear, actionable guidance. You like actively solving problems, and helping others solve them too. You enjoy collaborative troubleshooting, whether that’s pairing with a Support Engineer on a tricky ticket, or consulting with a CSE on a deeper platform issue. Customer support, and what you learn solving customer problems, drive you.</li>
<li>You are passionate about customer success and team growth. You love working directly with customers and find satisfaction in mentoring teammates. Experience in a technical support environment—especially enterprise WordPress support—is highly valued.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Technical Requirements</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><strong>WordPress expertise with a solid understanding of core concepts,</strong>&nbsp;including themes, plugins, hooks and filters, WP-CLI, imports, and common troubleshooting patterns. Familiarity with the block editor (Gutenberg) and ecommerce solutions (WooCommerce) is a plus.</li>
<li><strong>Proficient in reading and troubleshooting code in multiple languages</strong>, including HTML, CSS, PHP, and JavaScript. You should be comfortable navigating unfamiliar codebases to identify issues and able to write small code snippets or patches when needed.</li>
<li><strong>Understanding of web technologie</strong>s, including REST APIs, HTTP, DNS, domain management, and version control (primarily Git). Familiarity with reverse proxy configurations and caching layers is helpful but not required.</li>
<li><strong>Familiarity with software engineering practices</strong>, including coding standards, source control workflows, and basic testing concepts. Experience working alongside engineering teams or contributing to team repositories is valued.</li>
<li><strong>Solid understanding of performance and scalability concepts in WordPress environments</strong>, including common causes of slow queries, caching strategies, and resource optimization. Security awareness and familiarity with common vulnerabilities are welcome but not required.</li>
<li><strong>Comfortable using monitoring and debugging tools&nbsp;</strong>such as New Relic, Kibana, or similar platforms to investigate application behavior, identify errors, and trace performance issues.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Requirements</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><strong>US-based position.</strong>&nbsp;Candidates must be based in the United States, undergo background checks as required, and hold American citizenship.</li>
<li><strong>Self-motivated and collaborative work ethic.</strong>&nbsp;Self-starters who love taking initiative and seeing things through to completion do well on our teams.&nbsp;</li>
<li><strong>Strong troubleshooting abilities.</strong>&nbsp;You can take complex problems and break them down systematically, identifying root causes through methodical investigation. You know how to gather the right information, isolate variables, and work toward resolution—or clearly document your findings when escalating.</li>
<li><strong>Experience in customer-facing technical roles.&nbsp;</strong>You’ve worked directly with customers in a support, agency, or consulting environment, and understand how to balance technical accuracy with clear, empathetic communication. Experience in enterprise WordPress support or a similar environment where customers expect fast, personal responses is an advantage.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>What to Expect</strong></p>
<p>Your day-to-day work will include:</p>
<ul>
<li>Providing high-quality technical support and consultation through Zendesk tickets and customer calls.</li>
<li>Handling escalated customer issues that require deeper investigation, including urgent tickets and complex debugging scenarios.</li>
<li>In-depth debugging that requires close examination of logs, analysis of customer codebases, and collaboration with engineering teams.</li>
<li>Providing technical guidance to customers on WordPress best practices, performance optimization, and common implementation patterns.</li>
<li>Building and updating internal and customer-facing documentation.</li>
<li>Contributing to the continuous improvement of our platform, processes, and customer experience.</li>
</ul>
<p>Support is provided 24/7, so scheduled weekday and weekend shifts, as well as some holiday and evening availability, will be a requirement. There will be on-call rotations involving work with government contracts.</p>
<p><strong>Salary range:</strong>&nbsp;$55,000 to $85,000 USD – Please note that salary ranges are global, regardless of location, and we pay in local currency.</p>
<p>We are searching for high-caliber candidates with the skills and qualities to have a net positive for Automattic. Pay will reflect the potential contribution and the impact you can bring, which may, in some cases, go beyond the range stated.</p>
<p>We’re pleased to offer a straightforward, competitive base salary, providing financial clarity without complex variable components. This isn’t your typical work-from-home job: we are a fully-remote company with an open vacation policy. To see a full list of benefits by country, consult our&nbsp;<a href="https://automattic.com/benefits/">Benefits Page</a>. And check out these links to learn more about&nbsp;<a href="https://automattic.com/how-we-hire/">How We Hire</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a href="https://automattic.com/expectations/">What We Expect from Ourselves</a>.&nbsp;</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/automattic-support-engineer-wordpress-vip">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/automattic-support-engineer-wordpress-vip</a></p>
</description>

      <expires_at>Mon, 06 Jul 2026 20:33:03 +0000</expires_at>
      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/automattic-support-engineer-wordpress-vip</guid>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/5078/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Your Resource Group LLC: Remote Inside Sales</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Maryland</state>
      <skills>Sales</skills>
      <category>Sales and Marketing</category>
      <type>Contract</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5078/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://yourresourcegroup.com/">https://yourresourcegroup.com/</a>
</p>

<p>Account Executive - Inside Sales<br><strong>About US<br><br></strong>We are a financial services start up focusing on helping US consumers improve their credit.<br><br>Here you can feel good about helping people while working from home and earning a generous commission package. <br><br>We offer a $1,000 USD training draw for your first month, no lead costs, and tons of growth opportunity.&nbsp;<br><br>If you are a seasoned Sales Professional with near native English language proficiency, we want to hear from you!<strong><br></strong><br><strong>Compensation<br><br></strong>This is a 100% commission role (draw or commission, whichever is higher)<br><br>OTE (first year) for top reps is $4,500/Month<br><br>Average OTE (first year) is $3,000/Month<strong><br><br></strong><br><strong>What will you be doing?<br><br></strong>Help inbound callers understand their credit situation and provide consultations with the goal of enrolling them in one of our services should they be a good fit. <br><strong><br>What will make you successful?</strong><br><br>You will be directly compensated for your ability to help meet business targets: daily KPI goals, clients assisted, and revenue collected.<br><br>Goal Oriented – self-starters who can meet and exceed sales goals<br><br>Learners – always looking to improve and grow<br><br>Tech savvy – able to navigate digital tools</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/your-resource-group-llc-remote-inside-sales-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/your-resource-group-llc-remote-inside-sales-1</a></p>

    <item>
      <title>EverAI: Mid/Senior AI Cinematic Video Editor (Full Remote - Worldwide)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Santa Venera</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>All Other Remote</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Malta
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://everai.ai">http://everai.ai</a>
</p>

<h1>Our Vision &amp; Products</h1>
<p><em><strong> EverAI — Building the Future of AI Companionship</strong></em></p>
<p><em>One of the Top 15 Largest &amp; Fastest-Growing AI Companies in the World</em></p>
<p><em>50 Million Users in 2 years — Help Us Reach 100M first, 500M next<br><br></em></p>
<p>At&nbsp;<strong>EverAI</strong>, we’re shaping what it means to connect with AI. With&nbsp;<strong>50 million users and counting</strong>, we're not just building products — we're creating entirely new categories.</p>
<p>Our flagship product is the&nbsp;<strong>world’s largest AI companionship platform</strong>, redefining relationships for millions. It is governed by our proprietary moderation system, EverGuard — an internal AI designed to ensure everything we build is&nbsp;<strong>safe, ethical, and human-first</strong>.</p>
<p><em>And we’re only just getting started!</em></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h1>Our Team</h1>
<p>We are an enthusiastic, passionate and hardworking team of ≈ 75 people. Our founding team has strong entrepreneurial experience building and scaling web products from 0 to IPO.<br><br></p>
<p><strong>Alexis Soulopoulos&nbsp;</strong>[CEO]</p>
<p><em>• 10+ years in Tech Executive Leadership</em></p>
<p><em>• Co-Founder Mad Paws Holdings (from 0 to IPO)</em></p>
<p><em>• Forbes 30 under 30 + Deloitte TechFast50 ’22 &amp; ‘23</em></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Michael Monin</strong>&nbsp;[Co-founder &amp; CTO]</p>
<p><em>• 10+ years as CTO / COO (web2/web3), 1+ year in AI/LLM</em></p>
<p><em>• Serial-entrepreneur: MTK Digital (exited / 0-&gt;$20m revenue) and Zipchat (AI Chatbot for E-commerce brands)</em></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Thomas Lacroix&nbsp;</strong>[Co-founder &amp; CMO]</p>
<p><em>• 8+ years in Customer Acquisition &amp; E-commerce Growth</em></p>
<p><em>• Serial-entrepreneur: Curatible (sold to Blackstone) and MTK Digital (exited / 0-&gt;$20m revenue)</em></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Maruša Fasano&nbsp;</strong>[CFO/Legal]</p>
<p><em>• 25+ years in Finance, Strategy, M&amp;A</em></p>
<p><em>• Ex-CFO/M&amp;A @Curatible (exited to Blackstone)</em></p>
<p><em>• Ex-President of the Board @SotremoSA (exited)</em></p>
<p><em>• Co-founder/CFO @SoftOne (exited)</em></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h1>Your Role</h1>
<p><strong>We are looking for a Mid/Senior AI Cinematic Video Editor who is deeply embedded in generative video workflows and can independently craft high-quality, narrative-driven content from concept to final output.</strong></p>
<p>You are a sharp-eyed video editor comfortable operating at the intersection of creativity and emerging technology, building visually compelling longform videos using AI-first pipelines. You take ownership of the entire production stack — from prompting and generation to editing, compositing, graphic design work and final delivery. You thrive in a high-performance environment where your quick wits and passion for story-telling shine.</p>
<p>Reporting to your Content Lead, this is what you'll be doing:</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>Key Responsibilities</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Conceptualise scripts based on current production needs and centred around existing AI characters (our own IPs)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Create&nbsp;<strong>narrative-driven, longform video content</strong>, including stylized and explicit NSFW visuals, with a strong focus on storytelling, atmosphere, and visual coherence throughout</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Own and manage&nbsp;<strong>end-to-end AI video production workflows</strong>, from ideation and prompting to generation, editing, and post-production</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Work extensively with&nbsp;<strong>ComfyUI pipelines</strong>, building, customizing, and optimizing node-based workflows for image and video generation</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Utilize tools such as&nbsp;<strong>Stable Diffusion (AUTOMATIC1111), ComfyUI, Runway, Pika, and other AI video platforms</strong>&nbsp;to produce high-quality visual sequences</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Develop and maintain&nbsp;<strong>consistent character appearance, style, and scene continuity</strong>&nbsp;across longer narratives using advanced techniques</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Integrate&nbsp;<strong>motion graphic design and colour correction</strong>&nbsp;to deliver cohesive final outputs</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experiment rapidly with new&nbsp;<strong>AI models, tools, and techniques</strong>, incorporating them into production workflows and sharing skills with the rest of the team</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Align with your Content Lead’s creative direction while maintaining a high degree of&nbsp;<strong>autonomy in execution and technical decision-making</strong></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Continuously refine workflows for&nbsp;<strong>efficiency, scalability, and output quality</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h1>Your Qualifications</h1>
<h2>Hard Skills</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>4–6+ years of experience in&nbsp;<strong>video production, VFX, or digital art</strong>, with a strong portfolio (AI-driven video work is a must)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Proven experience with&nbsp;<strong>ComfyUI (mandatory)</strong>, including building and managing complex node-based workflows</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong proficiency in&nbsp;<strong>Stable Diffusion / AUTOMATIC1111</strong>&nbsp;and related tooling (Advanced prompting, working with trained LoRAs, refining, upscaling, inpainting etc.)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Hands-on experience with the latest&nbsp;<strong>AI video tools and models</strong>&nbsp;(e.g., Kling, Seedance, Happy Horse, and similar emerging options)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Solid understanding of&nbsp;<strong>AI image/video generation pipelines</strong>, including prompting, batching, consistency techniques, and post-processing</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Experience with traditional tools like&nbsp;<strong>Premiere Pro, After Effects or similar</strong>&nbsp;for final assembly and polish</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong grasp of&nbsp;<strong>visual storytelling, pacing, composition, and cinematic language</strong></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Ability to maintain&nbsp;<strong>character and scene consistency across sequences</strong>&nbsp;in AI-generated content</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>Soft Skills</h2>
<p> Strong communication &amp; collaboration skills (fluent in English)</p>
<p> High ownership — able to take ideas from concept to completion independently</p>
<p>⚡️ Experimental mindset — comfortable navigating ambiguity and evolving tools</p>
<p>⏱️ Fast iteration cycles — able to test, fail, refine, and improve quickly</p>
<p> Curious and self-driven — constantly exploring new AI capabilities and workflows</p>
<p> Open to feedback and continuous improvement</p>
<p> #NSFW — Comfortable working with uncensored models and explicit adult content</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>Bonus Points</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Experience in&nbsp;<strong>AI-native storytelling or filmmaking</strong></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Background in&nbsp;<strong>3D, VFX, technical art or as a colourist</strong></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Familiarity with&nbsp;<strong>training/customizing models (LoRAs, embeddings, fine-tuning)</strong></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Prior experience in&nbsp;<strong>adult, dating, or adjacent creative industries a huge bonus</strong></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h1>Why EverAI?</h1>
<ul>
<li><strong>Exponential Growth</strong>: From 50M users in 2 years, to 100M next — and 500M beyond</li>
<li><strong>Track Record of Category-Creating Innovation</strong>: We consistently launch&nbsp;<strong>world-first AI applications</strong>&nbsp;— setting the pace, not following it</li>
<li><strong>Global Impact</strong>: Top-tier user growth, real-world adoption, and cultural relevance</li>
<li><strong>Proven Leadership</strong>: A senior team that’s&nbsp;<strong>launched, scaled, and exited &amp; IPO’d multiple scale ups</strong>&nbsp;— now fully focused on reshaping AI companionship</li>
<li><strong>Elite Remote Team</strong>: 100% remote and built to win — world-class talent from&nbsp;<strong>Tier 1 tech companies</strong>, with a culture of ownership, velocity, and radical creativity</li>
<li>️<strong>Ethical Core</strong>: Our AI ecosystem is governed by&nbsp;<strong>EverGuard, our proprietary AI moderation technology</strong>, ensuring responsible development at scale</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h1>What We Offer</h1>
<ul>
<li><strong>Contract Type:</strong> We prefer B2B, but we’re flexible, what matters is long-term commitment and impact</li>
<li><strong>Work From Anywhere:</strong>&nbsp;Fully remote. Choose the environment where you do your best work</li>
<li><strong>Paid Time Off:</strong> 4 weeks (20 working days) of PTO per year to recharge and reset</li>
<li><strong>Annual Gathering:</strong> A yearly in-person meetup to connect, brainstorm, and celebrate wins together</li>
<li><strong>Health &amp; Wellness Support:&nbsp;</strong>Monthly allowance of<strong>&nbsp;</strong>100 USD for health insurance expenses + unlimited 1:1 sessions with psychologists and lifestyle experts through&nbsp;<em>OpenUp</em> (also available for up to three family members)</li>
<li><strong>Co-Working Space Budget:</strong> Work from a co-working space up to twice per month (35 EUR / 40 USD per visit) to stay inspired and connected</li>
<li><strong>Learning Budget:</strong> Dedicated funds to support your professional growth: courses, books, conferences, events, or certifications</li>
<li><strong>Equipment:</strong> Company laptop provided + monitor budget up to 250 USD for your workspace setup</li>
<li><strong>AI Tools Access:</strong>&nbsp;Premium access to ChatGPT, Cursor, Hugging Face, Claude Code, and any other tool needed to excel at your job, power your ideas and workflows<br><br></li>
</ul>
<h1>Top Tier Talent Is Our Multiplier</h1>
<p>We’re a fully remote group of&nbsp;<strong>A-players from Tier 1 tech</strong>, led by an exec team who’ve&nbsp;<strong>launched, scaled, and exited multiple companies</strong>. We move fast, and care deeply about what we build — and who we build it with.</p>
<p>We’re looking for&nbsp;<strong>exceptional talent</strong>&nbsp;ready to ship &amp; distribute world-first AI products at scale, fast, and co-create with us this category-defining business.</p>
<p><strong>If that’s you — reach out and apply!</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2><strong> External Referral Program</strong></h2>
<p><strong>Know someone who could be a great fit for this role?</strong>&nbsp;You can refer them through the&nbsp;<strong>EverAI External Referral Program</strong>&nbsp;and earn a bonus of&nbsp;<strong>up to 2,500 USD</strong>&nbsp;if they’re hired.&nbsp;<a class="decorated-link" href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeuvD8GKtVT8Q33nsdF691LTEAFRErTK4JPyFrZlLMaWF82GQ/viewform?usp=preview">Submit a referral here.</a></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/everai-mid-senior-ai-cinematic-video-editor-full-remote-worldwide">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/everai-mid-senior-ai-cinematic-video-editor-full-remote-worldwide</a></p>
</description>

      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4689/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.reveleer.com/">https://www.reveleer.com/</a>
</p>

<p><strong>Full Stack AI Engineer<br>Remote Opportunity</strong></p>
<p>As the industry’s pioneering value-based care (VBC) technology platform, Reveleer is purpose-built to solve the most pressing real-world challenges faced by providers and health-plan organizations today. By unifying retrieval, clinical intelligence, risk adjustment, quality improvement, and member management solutions into one intelligent, AI-powered system, Reveleer streamlines fragmented workflows to supercharge productivity, enhance care quality, and optimize performance on high-priority value-based initiatives.</p>
<p><strong>About the Team:</strong></p>
<p>You will be joining a small team within Reveleer AI division, in charge of developing the next generation agentic model for clinical prospective suspecting. As a full stack software developer in our team, you will be working in the unique environment of a small team with large scale impact to enable the expansion of our product and fast growth of our users.</p>
<p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Obsess over the details and applying first principle mindset to address challenges.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Understand business needs and build end-to-end product experiences.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Solve product problems and build delightful user experiences for our users.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Contribute to building and scaling infrastructure.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Develop and continually improve observability of activity and infra at scale.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Continually challenge status quo and existing solutions to improve scalability &amp; efficiency</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Partner closely with other engineers and scientists to build highly scalable, ML driven system(s), help run experiments, and surface insights across all points of customer interactions</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Resolve problems and provide daily troubleshooting, analysis, and problem definition for production issues.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Required Skills:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>5+ years of experience building high quality code and infrastructure.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>3+ years of experience working with large-scale systems.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>2+ Experience with AWS and Google Cloud</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>A passion for building delightful Customer-centric user experiences, from the backend to the frontend.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Proven curiosity with the latest Generative AI advances.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Hands-on experience in client-side development using ReactJS, CSS, JavaScript, Typescript.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Hands-on experience in NodeJS and MongoDB.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Familiarity with common best practices, design and architectural patterns.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Great problem-solving skills, eager to learn and face new challenges.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Highly motivated, self-learner with great attention to detail.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Thrive in a collaborative environment involving different functions, stakeholders, and subject matter experts.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Attention to detail, especially around performance, accessibility, reliability, and security.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>WHAT YOU’LL RECEIVE:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Competitive salary </li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Medical, Dental and Vision benefits </li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>401k match</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Generous PTO plan </li>
</ul>
<p> Our compensation reflects the cost of labor across several US geographic markets. Pay is based on several factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience.</p>
<p>Reveleer E-Verifies all new hires.</p>
<p>Reveleer is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or genetic information, in compliance with applicable federal, state and local law.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/reveleer-full-stack-ai-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/reveleer-full-stack-ai-engineer</a></p>
</description>
