      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/4688/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Tether: AI Research Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>California</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Back-End Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4688/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> El Salvador
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://careers.tether.io/">https://careers.tether.io/</a>
</p>

<div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 kbZOmE">
<div>
<p><strong><em>Why Join Us?</em></strong></p>
<p>Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.</p>
<p>If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.</p>
<p><strong>Are you ready to be part of the future?</strong></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>About the job</strong></p>
<p>As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in reinforcement learning approaches for advanced models. Your work will optimize decision-making and adaptive behavior to deliver enhanced intelligence, improved performance, and domain-specific capabilities for real-world challenges. You will work across a broad spectrum of systems, including resource-efficient models designed for limited hardware environments and complex multi-modal architectures that integrate data such as text, images, and audio.</p>
<p>We expect you to have deep expertise in designing reinforcement learning systems and a strong background in advanced model architectures. You will adopt a hands-on, research-driven approach to developing, testing, and implementing novel reinforcement learning algorithms and training frameworks. Your responsibilities include curating specialized simulation environments and training datasets, strengthening baseline policy performance, and identifying as well as resolving bottlenecks in the reinforcement learning process. The ultimate goal is to unlock superior, domain-adapted AI performance and push the limits of what these models can achieve in dynamic, real-world environments.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Develop and implement state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms designed to optimize decision-making processes in both simulated and real-world settings. Establish clear performance targets such as reward maximization and policy stability.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Build, run, and monitor controlled reinforcement learning experiments. Track key performance indicators while documenting iterative results and comparing outcomes against established benchmarks.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Identify and curate high-quality simulation environments and training datasets that are tailored to specific domain challenges. Set measurable criteria to ensure that the selection and preparation of these resources significantly enhance the learning process and overall model performance.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Systematically debug and optimize the reinforcement learning pipeline by analyzing both computational efficiency and learning performance metrics. Address issues such as reward signal noise, exploration strategy, and policy divergence to improve convergence and stability.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate reinforcement learning agents into production systems. Define clear success metrics such as real-world performance improvements and robustness under varied conditions and ensure continuous monitoring and iterative refinements for sustained domain adaptation.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<h2 class="sc-1npqnwg-4 sc-1npqnwg-5 sc-1uwf3m5-0 sc-1uwf3m5-1 gCDcOw custom-css-style-job-requirements">Job requirements</h2>
<div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 kbZOmE">
<div>
<ul>
<li>
<p>A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&amp;D (with good publications in A* conferences).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Proven experience with large-scale reinforcement learning experiments, including online RL techniques such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), is essential. Your contributions should have led to measurable improvements in domain-specific decision-making and overall policy performance.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Deep understanding of reinforcement learning algorithms is required, including state-of-the-art online RL methods and other gradient-based optimization approaches like policy gradients, actor-critic, and GRPO. Your expertise should emphasize enhancing policy stability, exploration, and sample efficiency in complex, dynamic environments.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong expertise in PyTorch and relevant reinforcement learning frameworks is a must. Practical experience in developing RL pipelines, from simulation and online training to post-training evaluation and deploying RL-based solutions in production environments is expected.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Demonstrated ability to apply empirical research to overcome reinforcement learning challenges such as sample inefficiency, exploration-exploitation tradeoffs, and training instability. You should be proficient in designing robust evaluation frameworks and iterating on algorithmic innovations to continuously push the boundaries of RL agent performance.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Important information for candidates</strong><br>Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>Apply only through our official channels.</strong>&nbsp;We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page:&nbsp;https://tether.recruitee.com/</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Verify the recruiter’s identity.</strong>&nbsp;All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Be cautious of unusual communication methods.</strong>&nbsp;We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Double-check email addresses.</strong>&nbsp;All communication from us will come from emails ending in&nbsp;<strong>@</strong><a href="http://tether.to/">tether.to</a><strong>&nbsp;or&nbsp;@</strong><a href="http://tether.io/">tether.io</a></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>We will never request payment or financial details.</strong> If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tether-ai-research-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tether-ai-research-engineer</a></p>
</description>

      <title>CRAE GROUP LTD: Customer Support Agent (Remote)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇧🇬 Bulgaria, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇭🇺 Hungary, 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇷🇸 Serbia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, and 🇺🇦 Ukraine</country>
      <state>Lemesos</state>
      <skills>Email / Chat Support</skills>
      <category>Customer Support</category>

      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2945/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cyprus
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://craegroup.com">https://craegroup.com</a>
</p>

<p>CRAE GROUP is one of the fastest-growing B2B service providers based in Cyprus. We develop, maintain and deploy various IT and customer based services to numerous businesses in various industries around the world.</p>
<p>Founded in 2018, our continuous energy and efforts aim towards becoming a leading service provider, with an already impressive growth since our launch. We are a young, dynamic team who enjoy working in tech among creative and talented individuals.</p>
<p>Our asset is the great people within our company with a unique approach on how to properly maintain our services and products.</p>
<p>We are looking for talented&nbsp;<strong>Customer Support Representative&nbsp;</strong>to join our team remotely.</p>
<p><strong>Monthly salary range:&nbsp;</strong>€1,400-€2,000 (gross)&nbsp;+ performance bonus<em><br>Depending on experience and performance.<br><strong><br></strong></em><strong>Work schedule:&nbsp;</strong>4 days on, 4 days off.<br><strong><br>An option of 2 shifts to be permanently put on:</strong> 10:00-22:00 or 22:00-10:00 (Cyprus local time).</p>
<p><strong>Job Description &amp; Responsibilities:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Communication with customers through live chat and e-mails.</li>
<li>Maintain prompt and empathetic attitude towards customers.</li>
<li>Acknowledge and resolve customers’ issues and queries.</li>
<li>Keeping up to date with products terms, offers and functions.</li>
<li>Report and escalate advanced customer queries to the relevant departments.</li>
<li>Perform first-step investigations on queries and issues.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Experience and qualifications:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Proficiency in both written and verbal English, with excellent language skills.</li>
<li>Strong communication abilities, enabling effective interaction and collaboration.</li>
<li>Solid computer literacy and adept typing skills.</li>
<li>Ability to perform effectively within a multitasking work environment.</li>
<li>2+ years experience in&nbsp;online customer support is mandatory.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>What We Offer:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>A competitive and attractive remuneration package that values your skills and contributions.</li>
<li>The chance to join a dynamic, forward-thinking European company and play a key role in its success.</li>
<li>Performance-based monthly bonuses.</li>
<li>Flexible remote work.</li>
</ul>
<p>We look forward to hearing from you!</p>
<p><em>Please note: Due to the high volume of applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you for your understanding.</em></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/crae-group-ltd-customer-support-agent-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/crae-group-ltd-customer-support-agent-remote</a></p>

    <item>
      <title>The CareSide: Performance Marketing Specialist</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Western Australia</state>
      <skills>Digital Marketing, Paid Social Media Advertising, and Google Ads</skills>
      <category>Sales and Marketing</category>
      <type>Contract</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Perth, Australia
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.thecareside.com.au/">https://www.thecareside.com.au/</a>
</p>

<p>The CareSide is looking to bring on a freelance paid media specialist to oversee our advertising efforts on Facebook, Instagram, and Google. We’ve dabbled in TikTok in the past and are open to exploring other channels as well.&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>As a freelancer, you won’t be viewed as a line item. Instead, you’ll play an integral role in our marketing campaigns. At the same time, we also appreciate that you likely have other projects you’re juggling and a life outside of work. You’ll have the flexibility to manage your schedule and balance other commitments, while still making a real impact.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>You won’t be working in a silo. You’ll collaborate closely with our designers, content team, and analytics lead to launch creative, data-driven campaigns that drive real results. You understand that paid media isn’t just about spend and ROAS — it’s about knowing the buyer, reading the market, and tapping into human psychology.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>We’re looking for someone hands-on, strategic, and ready to get into the weeds with us.</p>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>Qualifications:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>4+ years of experience managing paid search and paid social campaigns for B2C brands</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong understanding of Meta’s algorithm and the types of creatives that resonate on Facebook and Instagram</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Proven track record of optimizing Google PPC campaigns to drive down acquisition costs</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Sharp analytical skills with the ability to separate signal from noise in campaign data</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Comfortable working independently and collaboratively in a remote environment</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Bonus points if you have experience advertising on Reddit, TikTok, or YouTube</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>Responsibilities:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Deliver monthly reports with clear, actionable performance insights</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Work with the web lead to execute A/B tests across Google Ad campaigns&nbsp;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Conduct keyword research, analyze competitors, and study our customer journey to inform campaign strategy</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Propose recommendations for new campaign strategies</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Collaborate with our designers and content team to create high-performing ad creatives</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Participate in sprint reviews (every 6 weeks), monthly check-ins, and the occasional virtual social</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Make positive contributions to the team culture and work environment</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>Compensation: $50-$80 USD per hour</p>
<p>Location: United States, Canada, or Europe</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-careside-performance-marketing-specialist">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-careside-performance-marketing-specialist</a></p>
</description>

      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0170/9402/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Mobena: Frontend Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇺🇸 United States of America</country>
      <state>Maryland</state>
      <skills>Figma, HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and UI/UX</skills>
      <category>Front-End Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0170/9402/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://mobena.co/">https://mobena.co/</a>
</p>

<p class="MsoNormal">Mobena is a three-person, remote-first startup building the “evolution” of multi-generational tax/estate planning software, targeting the advisors of America’s 2 million wealthiest families. We’re currently hiring our first dedicated UI Engineer to “own” the frontend of our flagship product, Mobena Evolution, for which we have little to no frontend code. You’ll work directly with our backend/algorithm-focused CTO, as well as our designer-founder, to turn evolving Figma concepts into fast, maintainable, and scalable user interfaces.</p>
<p class="MsoNormal"><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p>
<ul>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">Choose and justify the frameworks and tools that best fit our needs.</li>
<ul>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">We have some holdover prototype code in Vite JS, but you can take it or leave it; all of our Figma concepts are new.</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">The backend is a standard HTTP API. We are open to everything from established web stacks (React, Angular, Svelte, Vite) to cross-platform or native solutions (Qt, WASM, .NET MAUI, Tauri, Electron, Tk)—literally anything, if you can convince us it’s the right choice.</li>
</ul>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">Build our UI from the ground up, establishing clear, maintainable patterns for components, state management, styling, testing, performance, and accessibility.</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">Collaborate to refine and sometimes re-frame existing screen designs in Figma.</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">Connect the frontend to our APIs (REST, GraphQL, or similar).</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">Lay groundwork for future mobile clients; however, experience in this regard is a plus rather than a requirement.</li>
</ul>
<p class="MsoNormal"><strong>About You</strong></p>
<ul>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">You’ve shipped an interactive application—web, desktop, or mobile—via coursework, open source, side project or professional work.</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">You care about usability and design quality. (That is, you care about the user.)</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">You learn by <em>doing:</em> building things rather than sitting in committee.</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">You are happy to say <em>I don’t know.</em> We try to cultivate <a title="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shoshin" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shoshin">“beginner’s mind”</a> at Mobena—it helps us avoid conventional traps and groupthink. The first step of thinking like a beginner is acknowledging your own ignorance! 😊</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">You can defend your technical choices in clear English, and can take credit for your successes as well your mistakes.</li>
<li class="MsoListParagraph">You are comfortable in an early-stage, collaborative environment.</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mobena-frontend-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mobena-frontend-engineer</a></p>
</description>

      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0170/9092/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Forager: Growth Lead</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>California</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Sales and Marketing</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0170/9092/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Los Angeles
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://forager.ai">http://forager.ai</a>
</p>


<div>
<p>We're seeking a dynamic and results-oriented <strong>Growth Lead</strong> to drive our user acquisition and, most importantly, <strong>maximize the conversion of free users to paid subscriptions&nbsp;</strong>on our new web application. You’ll be the architect of our conversion funnel, leveraging data-driven strategies to optimize user engagement and accelerate revenue growth.</p>
<p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Develop and execute comprehensive strategies focused on converting free users to paid subscriptions.</strong>&nbsp;This includes identifying key conversion points, designing targeted campaigns, and implementing effective messaging and incentives.</li>
<li><strong>Analyze user behavior and identify opportunities to improve conversion rates.</strong>&nbsp;Utilize analytics tools to track key metrics, conduct A/B testing, and optimize the user journey.</li>
<li><strong>Design and implement targeted email marketing campaigns, in-app messaging, and other communication strategies to nurture free users and drive conversions.</strong>&nbsp;Craft compelling copy and personalized offers to resonate with different user segments.</li>
<li><strong>Collaborate with the product and engineering teams to optimize the onboarding process and improve the overall user experience.</strong>&nbsp;Ensure a seamless transition from free to paid.</li>
<li><strong>Create and manage compelling marketing content, including landing pages, blog posts, and social media campaigns, to support conversion efforts.</strong>&nbsp;Highlight the value proposition of our paid subscription and address potential user objections.</li>
<li><strong>Develop and manage paid advertising campaigns (e.g., Google Ads, social media ads) to drive targeted traffic to our free trial and subscription pages.</strong>&nbsp;Optimize campaigns for conversion and ROI.</li>
<li><strong>Monitor and report on key performance indicators (KPIs) related to user acquisition, conversion rates, and revenue growth.</strong>&nbsp;Provide regular updates and insights to the leadership team. &nbsp;</li>
<li><strong>Stay up-to-date on the latest growth marketing trends and best practices, particularly in the SaaS subscription space.</strong>&nbsp;Continuously experiment and iterate to improve conversion performance.</li>
<li><strong>Implement and optimize referral programs and other strategies to leverage existing users for acquisition and conversion.</strong></li>
<li><strong>Develop and implement customer segmentation strategies to tailor marketing messaging and offers for different user groups, with a focus on maximizing conversion potential.</strong></li>
</ul>
</div>


<h2>Requirements</h2>
<div>
<ul>
<ul>
<li>Proven track record of driving user acquisition and&nbsp;<strong>significantly improving free-to-paid subscription conversion rates.</strong></li>
<li>Strong analytical skills and experience using data to inform marketing decisions.</li>
<li>Proficiency in marketing automation tools, CRM systems, and analytics platforms (e.g., Google Analytics, Mixpanel, HubSpot).</li>
<li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li>
<li>Experience in the SaaS or B2B space is a plus.</li>
<li>Experience with A/B testing, and funnel optimization.</li>
<li>Deep understanding of customer lifecycle marketing.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
</div>


<h2>Benefits</h2>
<div>
<ul>
<li>Work in a fast-paced, collaborative, and supportive environment.</li>
<li>Opportunity to grow and advance your career.</li>
<li>Opportunity to be on the ground floor of a fast-growing startup</li>
<li>Competitive salary and benefits package</li>
</ul>
</div>


<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/forager-growth-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/forager-growth-lead</a></p>
</description>

    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://app.dataannotation.tech/worker_signup?worker_src=ZR&amp;projects=OSA&amp;utm_medium=display&amp;utm_source=wwr&amp;utm_campaign=pewt">https://app.dataannotation.tech/worker_signup?worker_src=ZR&amp;projects=OSA&amp;utm_medium=display&amp;utm_source=wwr&amp;utm_campaign=pewt</a>
</p>

<div><br>This is a full-time or part-time REMOTE position. You'll be able to choose which projects you want to work on, and you can work on your own schedule. Projects are paid hourly, starting at $15-20 per hour, with bonuses for high-quality and high-volume work. With a variety of projects to choose from, many involving writing or evaluating chatbot conversations, you can choose to work on what interests you the most!<br><br></div><div><br>-----<br><br></div><div><br>We are looking for writers and curious, detail-oriented people to join our team and teach our AI chatbots. You will have conversations with chatbots that we are building in order to measure their progress, as well as write novel conversations in order to teach them what to say.<br><br></div><div><br>In this role, you will need a strong imagination and attention to detail to create useful conversations and measure their quality. You do not need experience to apply, since we will provide training, and many people find this work quite engaging and repeatable.<br><br></div><div><br>Responsibilities:<br>- Come up with diverse conversations<br>- Write high-quality answers<br>- Compare the performance of different AI models<br>- Research and fact-check AI responses<br><br></div><div><br><br>Qualifications:<br><br></div><div><br>- Fluency in English<br>- Detail-oriented<br>- Excellent writing and grammar skills<br>- Strong research and fact-checking skills to ensure accuracy and originality<br>- Available to work at least 10 hours per week<br>- A bachelor's degree (completed or in progress)<br><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dataannotation-tech-ft-pt-remote-ai-prompt-engineering-evaluation-will-train">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dataannotation-tech-ft-pt-remote-ai-prompt-engineering-evaluation-will-train</a></p>
